t.khattab: Allah responded, “Soon they will be truly regretful.”
t.ghali: Said He, "In a little while indeed they will definitely become remorseful
t.irving: He said: "Some morning soon they will feel regretful
t.iwq: Allah said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Dalam sedikit waktu lagi pasti mereka akan menjadi orang-orang yang menyesal".
t_id.sabiq: Dengan menekankan janji-Nya, Allah berkata kepada Hûd, "Tidak lama lagi mereka akan menyesali apa yang mereka lakukan sekarang, setelah siksa Kami menimpa mereka nanti."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Dalam sedikit waktu lagi) sebentar lagi. Huruf Ma di sini adalah Zaidah (pasti mereka akan menjadi) akan menjadi orang-orang (yang menyesal") atas kekafiran dan kedustaan mereka.
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Dalam sedikit waktu lagi pasti mereka akan menjadi orang-orang yang menyesal".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال عما قليل» من الزمان وما زائدة «ليصبحن» ليصيرن «نادمين» على كفرهم وتكذيبهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيلٖ لَّيُصۡبِحُنَّ نَٰدِمِينَ (عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ: بَعْدَ زَمَنٍ قَرِيبٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Dalam sedikit waktu lagi) sebentar lagi. Huruf Ma di sini adalah Zaidah (pasti mereka akan menjadi) akan menjadi orang-orang (yang menyesal") atas kekafiran dan kedustaan mereka

ar: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّیۡحَةُ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَجَعَلۡنَـٰهُمۡ غُثَاۤءࣰۚ فَبُعۡدࣰا لِّلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِینَ
ar_simple: فأخذتهم ٱلصیحة بٱلحق فجعلنهم غثاء فبعدا للقوم ٱلظلمین

t.sahih-int: So the shriek seized them in truth, and We made them as [plant] stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people
t.asad: And then the blast [of Our punishment] overtook them, justly and unavoidably, and We caused them to become as the flotsam of dead leaves and the scum borne on the surface of a torrent: and so - away with those evildoing folk
t.yusuf-ali: Then the Blast overtook them with justice, and We made them as rubbish of dead leaves (floating on the stream of Time)! So away with the people who do wrong
t.pickthall: So the (Awful) Cry overtook them rightfully, and We made them like as wreckage (that a torrent hurleth). A far removal for wrongdoing folk
t.arberry: And the Cry seized them justly, and We made them as scum; so away with the people of the evildoers
t.hilali-khan: So As-Saihah (torment - awful cry, etc.) overtook them with justice, and We made them as rubbish of dead plants. So away with the people who are Zalimun (polytheists, wrong-doers, disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah, disobedient to His Messengers, etc)
t.itani: Then the Blast struck them, justifiably, and We turned them into scum. So away with the wicked people.
t.mubarakpuri: So, the Sayhah overtook them in truth, and We made them as rubbish of dead plants. So, away with the people who are wrongdoers.
t.qarib: So the blast justly struck them, and We swept them away like scum. Away then with the oppressive people
t.wahiduddin: The blast justly struck them and We reduced them to rubble. Away with such wicked people
t.shakir: So the punishment overtook them in justice, and We made them as rubbish; so away with the unjust people
t.haleem: The blast justly struck them and We swept them away like scum. Away with the evildoers
t.maariful: So the Cry seized them according to the true (promise), and We turned them in to scum. So, away with the wrongdoing people
t.khattab: Then the ˹mighty˺ blast overtook them with justice, and We reduced them to rubble. So away with the wrongdoing people
t.ghali: So the Shout took them (away) with the truth, then We made them (as) stubble; so far away (are gone) the unjust people
t.irving: The Blast really caught them and We turned them into rubbish. Away with such wicked folk
t.iwq: So the shriek seized them in truth, and We made them as plant stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people

t_id.kemenag: Maka dimusnahkanlah mereka oleh suara yang mengguntur dengan hak dan Kami jadikan mereka (sebagai) sampah banjir maka kebinasaanlah bagi orang-orang yang zalim itu.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka pun kemudian ditimpa siksa berupa pekikan amat keras yang membinasakan. Mereka memang pantas dibinasakan. Mereka Kami jadikan terhina dan tak berdaya bagai sampah--seperti batang kayu dan dedaunan--yang hanyut dihempas air. Binasalah dan terusirlah orang-orang yang zalim itu dari kasih sayang Kami akibat sifat buruk dan kesombongan mereka!"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka dimusnahkanlah mereka oleh suara yang mengguntur) suara yang menandakan turunnya azab dan binasanya makhluk (dengan hak) maka matilah mereka (dan Kami jadikan mereka bagaikan tumbuh-tumbuhan yang kering) Kami jadikan mereka seperti tanaman yang kering atau mati (maka alangkah jauhnya) dari rahmat (bagi orang-orang yang zalim itu) yakni orang-orang yang mendustakan Rasul itu.
t_id.iwq: Maka dimusnahkanlah mereka oleh suara yang mengguntur dengan hak dan Kami jadikan mereka (sebagai) sampah banjir maka kebinasaanlah bagi orang-orang yang zalim itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأخذتهم الصيحة» صيحة العذاب والهلاك كائنة «بالحق» فماتوا «فجعلناهم غثاءً» هو نبت يبس أي صيرناهم مثله في اليبس «فبعداً» من الرحمة «للقوم الظالمين» المكذبين
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّيۡحَةُ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُمۡ غُثَآءٗۚ فَبُعۡدٗا لِّلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ (غُثَاءً: كَغُثَاءِ السَّيْلِ الَّذِي يَطْفُو عَلَى المَاءِ, فَبُعْدًا: فَهَلَاكًا وَإِبْعَادًا مِنَ الرَّحْمَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka dimusnahkanlah mereka oleh suara yang mengguntur) suara yang menandakan turunnya azab dan binasanya makhluk (dengan hak) maka matilah mereka (dan Kami jadikan mereka bagaikan tumbuh-tumbuhan yang kering) Kami jadikan mereka seperti tanaman yang kering atau mati (maka alangkah jauhnya) dari rahmat (bagi orang-orang yang zalim itu) yakni orang-orang yang mendustakan Rasul itu

ar: ثُمَّ أَنشَأۡنَا مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِینَ
ar_simple: ثم أنشأنا من بعدهم قرونا ءاخرین

t.sahih-int: Then We produced after them other generations
t.asad: AND AFTER them We gave rise to new generations
t.yusuf-ali: Then We raised after them other generations
t.pickthall: Then after them We brought forth other generations
t.arberry: Thereafter, after them, We produced other generations
t.hilali-khan: Then, after them, We created other generations
t.itani: Then, after them, We raised other generations.
t.mubarakpuri: Then, after them, We created other generations.
t.qarib: After them, We gave rise to new generations
t.wahiduddin: Then We raised up other generations after them
t.shakir: Then We raised after them other generations
t.haleem: We raised other generations after them
t.maariful: Then, after them, We created another generation
t.khattab: Then We raised other generations after them
t.ghali: Thereafter even after them, We brought into being other generations
t.irving: Then We raised up other generations after them
t.iwq: Then We produced after them other generations

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian Kami ciptakan sesudah mereka umat-umat yang lain.
t_id.sabiq: Setelah mereka, Kami menciptakan lagi beberapa generasi yang lain seperti kaum Shâlih, Lûth dan Syu'ayb.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami ciptakan sesudah mereka umat-umat) kaum-kaum (yang lain).
t_id.iwq: Kemudian Kami ciptakan sesudah mereka umat-umat yang lain.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم أنشأنا من بعدهم قروناً» أقواماً «آخرين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ أَنشَأۡنَا مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِينَ (قُرُونًا: أُمَمًا وَأَجْيَالًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami ciptakan sesudah mereka umat-umat) kaum-kaum (yang lain)

ar: مَا تَسۡبِقُ مِنۡ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا یَسۡتَءۡخِرُونَ
ar_simple: ما تسبق من أمة أجلها وما یستءخرون

t.sahih-int: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter]
t.asad: [for,] no community can ever forestall [the end of] its term - and neither can they delay [its coming]
t.yusuf-ali: No people can hasten their term, nor can they delay (it)
t.pickthall: No nation can outstrip its term, nor yet postpone it
t.arberry: no nation outstrips its term, nor do they put it back
t.hilali-khan: No nation can anticipate their term, nor can they delay it
t.itani: No nation can advance its time, nor can they postpone it.
t.mubarakpuri: No nation can advance their term, nor can they delay it.
t.qarib: No community can speed up or hold back its appointed destiny
t.wahiduddin: no community can advance or postpone its appointed time
t.shakir: No people can hasten on their doom nor can they postpone (it)
t.haleem: no community can advance or delay its time
t.maariful: No community can go ahead of its appointed time, nor can they become late
t.khattab: No people can advance their doom, nor can they delay it
t.ghali: In no way does any nation outstrip its term, and in no way are they able to postpone
t.irving: No nation may anticipate its deadline nor will they ever postpone it
t.iwq: No nation will precede its time of termination, nor will they remain thereafter

t_id.kemenag: Tidak (dapat) sesuatu umatpun mendahului ajalnya, dan tidak (dapat pula) mereka terlambat (dari ajalnya itu).
t_id.sabiq: Masing-masing umat memiliki batas akhir kehidupannya yang tidak akan maju atau mundur sedikit pun.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tidak dapat sesuatu umat pun mendahului ajalnya) seumpamanya mereka mati sebelum ajal mereka (dan tidak dapat pula mereka terlambat) dari ajalnya itu. Lafal Yasta'khiruna dalam bentuk jamak dikaitkan kepada lafal Ummatin yang bentuknya muannats, hal ini memandang dari segi maknanya, karena ummatin berarti jamak.
t_id.iwq: Tidak (dapat) sesuatu umatpun mendahului ajalnya, dan tidak (dapat pula) mereka terlambat (dari ajalnya itu).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ما تسبق من أمة أجلها» بأن تموت قبله «وما يستأخرون» عنه ذكر الضمير بعد تأنيثه رعاية للمعنى
tafsir.siraj-ar: مَا تَسۡبِقُ مِنۡ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسۡتَـٔۡخِرُونَ (أَجَلَهَا: مَوْعِدُ هَلَاكِهَا المُحَدَّدُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tidak dapat sesuatu umat pun mendahului ajalnya) seumpamanya mereka mati sebelum ajal mereka (dan tidak dapat pula mereka terlambat) dari ajalnya itu. Lafal Yasta'khiruna dalam bentuk jamak dikaitkan kepada lafal Ummatin yang bentuknya muannats, hal ini memandang dari segi maknanya, karena ummatin berarti jamak

ar: ثُمَّ أَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتۡرَاۖ كُلَّ مَا جَاۤءَ أُمَّةࣰ رَّسُولُهَا كَذَّبُوهُۖ فَأَتۡبَعۡنَا بَعۡضَهُم بَعۡضࣰا وَجَعَلۡنَـٰهُمۡ أَحَادِیثَۚ فَبُعۡدࣰا لِّقَوۡمࣲ لَّا یُؤۡمِنُونَ
ar_simple: ثم أرسلنا رسلنا تترا كل ما جاء أمة رسولها كذبوه فأتبعنا بعضهم بعضا وجعلنهم أحادیث فبعدا لقوم لا یؤمنون

t.sahih-int: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another [to destruction], and We made them narrations. So away with a people who do not believe
t.asad: And We sent forth Our apostles, one after another: [and] every time their apostle came to a community, they gave him the lie: and so We caused them to follow one another [into the grave], and let them become [mere] tales: and so - away with the folk who would not believe
t.yusuf-ali: Then sent We our messengers in succession: every time there came to a people their messenger, they accused him of falsehood: so We made them follow each other (in punishment): We made them as a tale (that is told): So away with a people that will not believe
t.pickthall: Then We sent our messengers one after another. Whenever its messenger came unto a nation they denied him; so We caused them to follow one another (to disaster) and We made them bywords. A far removal for folk who believe not
t.arberry: Then sent We Our Messengers successively; whenever its Messenger came to a nation they cried him lies, so We caused some of them to follow others, and We made them as but tales; so away with a people who do not believe
t.hilali-khan: Then We sent Our Messengers in succession, every time there came to a nation their Messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another (to destruction), and We made them as Ahadith (the true stories for mankind to learn a lesson from them). So away with a people who believe not
t.itani: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time a messenger came to his community, they called him a liar. So We made them follow one another, and made them history. So away with a people who do not believe.
t.mubarakpuri: Then We sent Our Messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation their Messenger, they denied him; so, We made them follow one another, and We made them as Ahadith. So, away with a people who believe not!
t.qarib: Then We sent Our Messengers in succession. Whenever a messenger came to a community he was invariably rejected, so We destroyed them one after the other, until they became mere tales. Away, then, with the people who do not believe
t.wahiduddin: then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time their messenger came to a people, they rejected him. So We destroyed them one after the other, and let them become mere tales. So away with the people who will not believe
t.shakir: Then We sent Our apostles one after another; whenever there came to a people their apostle, they called him a liar, so We made some of them follow others and We made them stories; so away with a people who do not believe
t.haleem: and We sent Our messengers in succession: whenever a messenger came to a community they invariably called him a liar, so We destroyed them one after the other and made them into cautionary tales. Away with the disbelievers
t.maariful: Thereafter, We sent Our messengers successively. Whenever its messenger came to a community, they rejected him. Then We made some of them follow others (in destruction) and turned them into tales (of history). So, away with a people who do not believe
t.khattab: Then We sent Our messengers in succession: whenever a messenger came to his people, they denied him. So We destroyed them, one after the other, reducing them to ˹cautionary˺ tales. So away with the people who refuse to believe
t.ghali: Thereafter we sent Our Messengers intermittently. Whenever its Messenger came to a nation, they cried lies to him. Then We caused some of them to follow others, and We made them (as) discourses, so far away (are gone) a people that do not believe
t.irving: Then We sent Our messengers one after another. Each time its messenger came to some nation, they rejected him, so We followed some of them up with others and turned them into conversation pieces. Away with any folk who will not believe
t.iwq: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another to destruction, and We made them narrations. So away with a people who do not believe

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian Kami utus (kepada umat-umat itu) rasul-rasul Kami berturut-turut. Tiap-tiap seorang rasul datang kepada umatnya, umat itu mendustakannya, maka Kami perikutkan sebagian mereka dengan sebagian yang lain. Dan Kami jadikan mereka buah tutur (manusia), maka kebinasaanlah bagi orang-orang yang tidak beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Lalu Kami mengutus rasul-rasul Kami kepada kaumnya masing-masing secara berturut-turut. Setiap kali seorang rasul datang kepada kaumnya, ia dianggap bohong dalam menyampaikan dakwahnya. Mereka pun kemudian Kami binasakan secara berturut-turut. Kabar tentang mereka Kami jadikan bahan omongan dan keheranan orang. Terusirlah dari kasih sayang Kami dan binasalah orang-orang yang tidak mempercayai dan tidak tunduk kepada kebenaran!
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami utus rasul-rasul Kami berturut-turut) lafal Tatran dapat pula dibaca Tatraa tanpa memakai harakat Tanwin, artinya berturut-turut yang di antara kedua rasul terdapat pemisah jarak waktu yang cukup lama. (Manakala datang kepada suatu umat) lafal Jaa-a Ummatan dapat dibaca Jaa-a ummatan yakni dengan mentashhilkan huruf Hamzah yang kedua, sehingga ucapannya seolah-olah ada huruf Wau (Rasul, umat itu mendustakannya, maka Kami perikutkan sebagian mereka dengan sebagian yang lain) Kami samakan mereka dengan umat-umat terdahulu dalam hal terbinasa (dan Kami jadikan mereka buah tutur manusia maka kebinasaanlah bagi orang-orang yang tidak beriman).
t_id.iwq: Kemudian Kami utus (kepada umat-umat itu) rasul-rasul Kami berturut-turut. Tiap-tiap seorang rasul datang kepada umatnya, umat itu mendustakannya, maka Kami perikutkan sebagian mereka dengan sebagian yang lain. Dan Kami jadikan mereka buah tutur (manusia), maka kebinasaanlah bagi orang-orang yang tidak beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم أرسلنا رسلنا تتراً» بالتنوين وعدمه متتابعين بين كل اثنين زمان طويل «كلما جاء أمة» بتحقيق الهمزتين وتسهيل الثانية بينها وبين الواو «رسولها كذبوه فأتبعنا بعضهم بعضاً» في الهلاك «وجعلناهم أحاديث فعبداً لقوم لا يؤمنون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ أَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتۡرَاۖ كُلَّ مَا جَآءَ أُمَّةٗ رَّسُولُهَا كَذَّبُوهُۖ فَأَتۡبَعۡنَا بَعۡضَهُم بَعۡضٗا وَجَعَلۡنَٰهُمۡ أَحَادِيثَۚ فَبُعۡدٗا لِّقَوۡمٖ لَّا يُؤۡمِنُونَ (تَتْرَا: يَتْبَعُ بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضًا, أَحَادِيثَ: أَخْبَارًا لِمَنْ بَعْدَهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami utus rasul-rasul Kami berturut-turut) lafal Tatran dapat pula dibaca Tatraa tanpa memakai harakat Tanwin, artinya berturut-turut yang di antara kedua rasul terdapat pemisah jarak waktu yang cukup lama. (Manakala datang kepada suatu umat) lafal Jaa-a Ummatan dapat dibaca Jaa-a ummatan yakni dengan mentashhilkan huruf Hamzah yang kedua, sehingga ucapannya seolah-olah ada huruf Wau (Rasul, umat itu mendustakannya, maka Kami perikutkan sebagian mereka dengan sebagian yang lain) Kami samakan mereka dengan umat-umat terdahulu dalam hal terbinasa (dan Kami jadikan mereka buah tutur manusia maka kebinasaanlah bagi orang-orang yang tidak beriman)

ar: ثُمَّ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ بِءَایَـٰتِنَا وَسُلۡطَـٰنࣲ مُّبِینٍ
ar_simple: ثم أرسلنا موسى وأخاه هرون بءایتنا وسلطن مبین

t.sahih-int: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority
t.asad: AND THEN We sent forth Moses and his brother Aaron with Our messages and a manifest authority [from Us]
t.yusuf-ali: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron, with Our Signs and authority manifest
t.pickthall: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our tokens and a clear warrant
t.arberry: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a manifest authority
t.hilali-khan: Then We sent Musa (Moses) and his brother Harun (Aaron), with Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) and manifest authority
t.itani: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron, with Our signs and a clear authority.
t.mubarakpuri: Then We sent Musa and his brother Harun, with Our Ayat and manifest authority,
t.qarib: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority
t.wahiduddin: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and clear authority
t.shakir: Then We sent Musa and his brother Haroun, with Our communications and a clear authority
t.haleem: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron, with Our signs and clear authority
t.maariful: Thereafter, We sent Mūsā and his brother Hārūn with Our signs and a clear proof
t.khattab: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and compelling proof
t.ghali: Thereafter We sent Musa (Moses) and his brother Harun (Aaro) with Our signs and an evident, all-binding authority
t.irving: Next We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and clear authority
t.iwq: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian Kami utus Musa dan saudaranya Harun dengan membawa tanda-tanda (Kebesaran) Kami, dan bukti yang nyata,
t_id.sabiq: Setelah itu Kami mengutus Mûsâ dan saudaranya, Hârûn, dengan membawa bukti-bukti kuat yang menunjukkan kebenaran mereka. Selain itu, mereka juga membawa alasan-alasan yang jelas, yang menerangkan bahwa mereka benar-benar diutus oleh Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami utus Musa dan saudaranya Harun dengan membawa tanda-tanda kebesaran Kami, dan bukti yang nyata) hujah yang nyata, yaitu berupa tangan, tongkat dan mukjizat-mukjizat lainnya.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian Kami utus Musa dan saudaranya Harun dengan membawa tanda-tanda (Kebesaran) Kami, dan bukti yang nyata,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم أرسلنا موسى وأخاه هارون بآياتنا وسلطان مبين» حجة وهي اليد والعصا وغيرهما من الآيات
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هَٰرُونَ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَسُلۡطَٰنٖ مُّبِينٍ (بِآيَاتِنَا: وَهِيَ تِسْعٌ: العَصَا، وَاليَدُ، وَالجَرَادُ، وَالقُمَّلُ، وَالضَّفَادِعُ، وَالدَّمُ، وَالطُّوفَانُ، وَالسِّنُونَ، وَنَقْصُ الثَّمَرَاتِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami utus Musa dan saudaranya Harun dengan membawa tanda-tanda kebesaran Kami, dan bukti yang nyata) hujah yang nyata, yaitu berupa tangan, tongkat dan mukjizat-mukjizat lainnya

ar: إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَإِی۟هِۦ فَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوۡمًا عَالِینَ
ar_simple: إلى فرعون وملإیه فٱستكبروا وكانوا قوما عالین

t.sahih-int: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people
t.asad: unto Pharaoh and his great ones; but these behaved with arrogance, for they were people wont to glorify [only] themselves
t.yusuf-ali: To Pharaoh and his Chiefs: But these behaved insolently: they were an arrogant people
t.pickthall: Unto Pharaoh and his chiefs, but they scorned (them) and they were despotic folk
t.arberry: unto Pharaoh and his Council; but they waxed proud, and they were a lofty people
t.hilali-khan: To Fir'aun (Pharaoh) and his chiefs, but they behaved insolently and they were people self-exalting (by disobeying their Lord, and exalting themselves over and above the Messenger of Allah)
t.itani: To Pharaoh and his nobles, but they turned arrogant. They were oppressive people.
t.mubarakpuri: To Fir`awn and his chiefs, but they behaved insolently and they were people self-exalting (by disobeying their Lord).
t.qarib: to Pharaoh and his inner circle, but they were an arrogant, haughty people
t.wahiduddin: to Pharaoh and his courtiers, but they behaved insolently, for they were an arrogant people
t.shakir: To Firon and his chiefs, but they behaved haughtily and they were an insolent people
t.haleem: to Pharaoh and his prominent leaders, but they responded with arrogance: they were a haughty people
t.maariful: towards Fir‘aun (Pharaoh) and his advisors. But they showed arrogance and they were haughty people
t.khattab: to Pharaoh and his chiefs, but they behaved arrogantly and were a tyrannical people
t.ghali: To Firaawn (Pharaoh) and his chiefs. Yet they waxed proud, and they were an exalted people
t.irving: to Pharaoh and his courtiers, and they acted too proudly and were such haughty folk
t.iwq: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people

t_id.kemenag: kepada Fir'aun dan pembesar-pembesar kaumnya, maka mereka ini takbur dan mereka adalah orang-orang yang sombong.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka Kami utus kepada Fir'aun dan pengikut-pengikutnya yang kemudian menolak dengan sombong untuk beriman kepada ajaran mereka. Mereka memang kaum yang memiliki sifat sombong, angkuh dan keras.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kepada Firaun dan pembesar-pembesar kaumnya, maka mereka ini takabur) sombong tidak mau beriman kepada ayat-ayat dan mukjizat-mukjizat, dan juga mereka tidak mau beriman kepada Allah (dan mereka adalah orang-orang yang sombong) yaitu menindas kaum Bani Israel secara lalim.
t_id.iwq: kepada Fir'aun dan pembesar-pembesar kaumnya, maka mereka ini takbur dan mereka adalah orang-orang yang sombong.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلى فرعون وملئه فاستكبروا» عن الإيمان بها وبالله «وكانوا قوماً عالين» قاهرين بني إسرائيل بالظلم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَإِيْهِۦ فَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ وَكَانُواْ قَوۡمًا عَالِينَ (عَالِينَ: مُتَكَبِّرِينَ مُتَطَاوِلِينَ عَلَى النَّاسِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kepada Firaun dan pembesar-pembesar kaumnya, maka mereka ini takabur) sombong tidak mau beriman kepada ayat-ayat dan mukjizat-mukjizat, dan juga mereka tidak mau beriman kepada Allah (dan mereka adalah orang-orang yang sombong) yaitu menindas kaum Bani Israel secara lalim

ar: فَقَالُوۤا۟ أَنُؤۡمِنُ لِبَشَرَیۡنِ مِثۡلِنَا وَقَوۡمُهُمَا لَنَا عَـٰبِدُونَ
ar_simple: فقالوا أنؤمن لبشرین مثلنا وقومهما لنا عبدون

t.sahih-int: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude
t.asad: And so they said: “Shall we believe [them] two mortals like ourselves - although their people are our slaves?”
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "Shall we believe in two men like ourselves? And their people are subject to us
t.pickthall: And they said: Shall we put faith in two mortals like ourselves, and whose folk are servile unto us
t.arberry: and they said, 'What, shall we believe two mortals like ourselves, whose people are our servants
t.hilali-khan: They said: "Shall we believe in two men like ourselves, and their people are obedient to us with humility (and we use them to serve us as we like)
t.itani: They said, “Are we to believe in two mortals like us, and their people are our slaves?”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "Shall we believe in two men like ourselves, and their people are obedient to us with humility!"
t.qarib: They said, "Should we believe two human beings like us while their people are serving us
t.wahiduddin: They said, "Are we to believe in two human beings like ourselves, while their people are subject to us
t.shakir: And they said: What! shall we believe in two mortals like ourselves while their people serve us
t.haleem: They said, ‘Are we to believe in two mortals like us? And their people are our servants?’
t.maariful: So they said, “shall we believe in two humans who are like ourselves and whose people are serving us as slaves?”
t.khattab: They argued, “Will we believe in two humans, like ourselves, whose people are slaves to us?”
t.ghali: So they said, "Shall we believe two mortals like ourselves, and their people are our worshipers
t.irving: So they said: "Are we to believe in two human beings like ourselves while their people are slaving for us
t.iwq: And they said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude

t_id.kemenag: Dan mereka berkata: "Apakah (patut) kita percaya kepada dua orang manusia seperti kita (juga), padahal kaum mereka (Bani Israil) adalah orang-orang yang menghambakan diri kepada kita?"
t_id.sabiq: Mereka berkata dengan penuh heran dan ingkar, "Apakah kita harus beriman kepada dua orang manusia yang sama seperti kita? Sedangkan pengikut-pengikut mereka saja, yaitu Banû Isrâ'îl, tunduk dan patuh kepada kita bagaikan budak!"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata, "Apakah pantas kita percaya kepada dua orang manusia seperti kita juga, padahal kaum mereka adalah orang-orang yang menghambakan diri kepada kita?") yakni kaum Bani Israel; mereka tunduk dan dianggap hina oleh Firaun.
t_id.iwq: Dan mereka berkata: "Apakah (patut) kita percaya kepada doa orang manusia seperti kita (juga), padahal kaum mereka (Bani Israil) adalah orang-orang yang menghambakan diri kepada kita?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فقالوا أنؤمن لبشرين مثلنا وقومهما لنا عابدون» مطيعون خاضعون
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَقَالُوٓاْ أَنُؤۡمِنُ لِبَشَرَيۡنِ مِثۡلِنَا وَقَوۡمُهُمَا لَنَا عَٰبِدُونَ (عَابِدُونَ: مُتَذَلِّلُونَ مُطِيعُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata, "Apakah pantas kita percaya kepada dua orang manusia seperti kita juga, padahal kaum mereka adalah orang-orang yang menghambakan diri kepada kita?") yakni kaum Bani Israel; mereka tunduk dan dianggap hina oleh Firaun

ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَكَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلۡمُهۡلَكِینَ
ar_simple: فكذبوهما فكانوا من ٱلمهلكین

t.sahih-int: So they denied them and were of those destroyed
t.asad: Thus, they gave the lie to those two, and earned (thereby) their place among the doomed
t.yusuf-ali: So they accused them of falsehood, and they became of those who were destroyed
t.pickthall: So they denied them, and became of those who were destroyed
t.arberry: So they cried them lies, and they were among the destroyed
t.hilali-khan: So they denied them both [Musa (Moses) and Harun (Aaron)] and became of those who were destroyed
t.itani: So they called them liars, and thus were among those destroyed.
t.mubarakpuri: So, they denied them both and became of those who were destroyed.
t.qarib: So they called them both liars, and were consequently destroyed
t.wahiduddin: So they rejected them both, and became those who were destroyed
t.shakir: So they rejected them and became of those who were destroyed
t.haleem: and so they called them both liars: they became another ruined people
t.maariful: Thus they rejected both of them and were among the destroyed
t.khattab: So they rejected them both, and ˹so˺ were among those destroyed
t.ghali: Then they cried lies to them (both); so they were among the perished
t.irving: They rejected them both, and so eventually were wiped out
t.iwq: Thus they denied them and were of those destroyed

t_id.kemenag: Maka (tetaplah) mereka mendustakan keduanya, sebab itu mereka adalah termasuk orang-orang yang dibinasakan.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka pun mendustakan dakwah yang di sampaikan oleh Mûsâ dan Hârûn. Mereka akhirnya termasuk orang-orang yang Kami binasakan dengan cara menenggelamkan mereka ke dalam lautan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka tetaplah mereka mendustakan keduanya, sebab itu mereka adalah termasuk orang-orang yang dibinasakan).
t_id.iwq: Maka (tetaplah) mereka mendustakan keduanya, sebab itu mereka adalah termasuk orang-orang yang dibinasakan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فكذبوهما فكانوا من المهلكين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَكَانُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡمُهۡلَكِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Maka tetaplah mereka mendustakan keduanya, sebab itu mereka adalah termasuk orang-orang yang dibinasakan

ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَیۡنَا مُوسَى ٱلۡكِتَـٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ یَهۡتَدُونَ
ar_simple: ولقد ءاتینا موسى ٱلكتب لعلهم یهتدون

t.sahih-int: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided
t.asad: for, indeed, We had vouchsafed revelation unto Moses in order that they might find the right way
t.yusuf-ali: And We gave Moses the Book, in order that they might receive guidance
t.pickthall: And We verily gave Moses the Scripture, that haply they might go aright
t.arberry: And We gave Moses the Book, that haply they would be guided
t.hilali-khan: And indeed We gave Musa (Moses) the Scripture, that they may be guided
t.itani: And We gave Moses the Scripture, that they may be guided.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed We gave Musa the Scripture, that they may be guided.
t.qarib: And We gave Moses the Book so that they might be guided
t.wahiduddin: We gave Moses the Book so that they might be guided
t.shakir: And certainly We gave Musa the Book that they may follow a right direction
t.haleem: We gave Moses the Scripture, so that they might be rightly guided
t.maariful: And, of course, We gave Mūsā the Book, so that they may take the right path
t.khattab: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture, so perhaps his people would be ˹rightly˺ guided
t.ghali: And indeed We already brought M?s'a the Book, that possibly they would be (rightly) guided
t.irving: Yet We had given Moses the Book so that they might be guided
t.iwq: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami berikan Al Kitab (Taurat) kepada Musa, agar mereka (Bani Israil) mendapat petunjuk.
t_id.sabiq: Kami mewahyukan Tawrât kepada Mûsâ, agar kaumnya dapat mengambil petunjuk, pelajaran, hukum dan jalan kebahagiaan melalui kitab suci itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami berikan Kitab kepada Musa) kitab Taurat (agar mereka) kaumnya, yaitu bangsa Bani Israel (mendapat petunjuk) dengan adanya kitab Taurat itu dari kesesatan. Aku memberikannya sekali turun sesudah Firaun dan kaumnya binasa
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami berikan Al Kitab (Taurat) kepada Musa, agar mereka (Bani Israil) mendapat petunjuk.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد آتينا موسى الكتاب» التوراة «لعلهم» قومه بني إسرائيل «يهتدون» به من الضلالة، وأوتيها بعد هلاك فرعون وقومه جملة واحدة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَا مُوسَى ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَهۡتَدُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami berikan Kitab kepada Musa) kitab Taurat (agar mereka) kaumnya, yaitu bangsa Bani Israel (mendapat petunjuk) dengan adanya kitab Taurat itu dari kesesatan. Aku memberikannya sekali turun sesudah Firaun dan kaumnya binasa

ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا ٱبۡنَ مَرۡیَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥۤ ءَایَةࣰ وَءَاوَیۡنَـٰهُمَاۤ إِلَىٰ رَبۡوَةࣲ ذَاتِ قَرَارࣲ وَمَعِینࣲ
ar_simple: وجعلنا ٱبن مریم وأمه ءایة وءاوینهما إلى ربوة ذات قرار ومعین

t.sahih-int: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water
t.asad: And [as We exalted Moses, so, too,] We made the son of Mary and his mother a symbol [of Our grace], and provided for both an abode in a lofty place of lasting restfulness and unsullied springs
t.yusuf-ali: And We made the son of Mary and his mother as a Sign: We gave them both shelter on high ground, affording rest and security and furnished with springs
t.pickthall: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a portent, and We gave them refuge on a height, a place of flocks and watersprings
t.arberry: and We made Mary's son, and his mother, to be a sign, and gave them refuge upon a height, where was a hollow and a spring
t.hilali-khan: And We made the son of Maryam (Mary) and his mother as a sign, And We gave them refuge on high ground, a place of rest, security and flowing streams
t.itani: And We made Mary’s son and his mother a sign, and We sheltered them on high ground with security and flowing springs.
t.mubarakpuri: And We made the son of Maryam and his mother as a sign, and We gave them refuge on a Rabwah, Dhat Qarar, and Ma`in.
t.qarib: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign, and sheltered them within a hill where there was a meadow and a flowing spring
t.wahiduddin: We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and gave them shelter on a peaceful hillside watered by a fresh spring
t.shakir: And We made the son of Marium and his mother a sign, and We gave them a shelter on a lofty ground having meadows and springs
t.haleem: We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign; We gave them shelter on a peaceful hillside with flowing water
t.maariful: And We made the son of Maryam (Mary) and his mother a sign, and gave them shelter on a height, having a place of rest and running springs
t.khattab: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign, and gave them refuge on high ground—a ˹suitable˺ place for rest with flowing water
t.ghali: And We made Maryam's (Mary's) son and his mother a sign, and gave an abode to (both of) them upon a mound, with (Literally: owing, comprising) a (refreshing) residence and a profuse (spring)
t.irving: We set up the son of Mary and his mother as a sign, and sheltered them both on a hilltop where there was both lodging and a spring
t.iwq: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level areas and flowing water

t_id.kemenag: Dan telah Kami jadikan (Isa) putera Maryam beserta ibunya suatu bukti yang nyata bagi (kekuasaan Kami), dan Kami melindungi mereka di suatu tanah tinggi yang datar yang banyak terdapat padang-padang rumput dan sumber-sumber air bersih yang mengalir.
t_id.sabiq: Kemudian, Kami menciptakan 'Isâ putra Maryam yang dikandung oleh bundanya tanpa proses berhubungan dengan laki-laki. Kelahiran 'Isâ tanpa ayah itu merupakan bukti yang jelas mengenai kemahakuasaan Kami. Maryam pun Kami tempatkan di tebing tinggi terhampar yang baik untuk tempat tinggal. Di sana terdapat persediaan air yang cukup sebagai sarana utama penunjang kehidupan yang mudah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan telah Kami jadikan putra Maryam) yakni Nabi Isa (beserta ibunya suatu tanda) kekuasaan Kami. Dalam ayat ini tidak disebutkan dua tanda karena keduanya terlibat dalam satu tanda itu, yaitu Maryam dapat melahirkan Nabi Isa tanpa suami (dan Kami menempatkan keduanya di suatu tanah tinggi) yakni tempat di dataran tinggi, yaitu di Baitulmakdis, atau di Damaskus, atau di Palestina; sehubungan dengan hal ini banyak pendapat mengenainya (yang datar) rata tanahnya sehingga para penghuninya menetap dengan nyaman (dan mempunyai banyak sumber air) yang mengalir lagi jernih sebagai suatu kenyataan.
t_id.iwq: Dan telah Kami jadikan (Isa) putera Maryam beserta ibunya suatu bukti yang nyata bagi (kekuasaan Kami), dan Kami melindungi mereka di suatu tanah tinggi yang datar yang banyak terdapat padang-padang rumput dan sumber-sumber air bersih yang mengalir.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وجعلنا ابن مريم» عيسى «وأمه آية» لم يقل آيتين لأن الآية فيهما واحدة: ولادته من غير فحل «وآوينهما إلى ربوة» مكان مرتفع وهو بيت المقدس أو دمشق أو فلسطين، أقوال «ذات قرار» أي مستوية يستقر عليها ساكنوها «ومعين» وماء جار ظاهر تراه العيون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا ٱبۡنَ مَرۡيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةٗ وَءَاوَيۡنَٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبۡوَةٖ ذَاتِ قَرَارٖ وَمَعِينٖ (وَآوَيْنَاهُمَا: جَعَلْنَا لَهُمَا مَاوًى وَمَسْكَنًا, رَبْوَةٍ: مَكَانٍ مُرْتَفِعٍ مِنَ الأَرْضِ, ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ: مُسْتَوٍ لِلاِسْتِقْرَارِ عَلَيْهِ, وَمَعِينٍ: مَاءٍ جَارٍ ظَاهِرٍ لِلْعُيُونِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan telah Kami jadikan putra Maryam) yakni Nabi Isa (beserta ibunya suatu tanda) kekuasaan Kami. Dalam ayat ini tidak disebutkan dua tanda karena keduanya terlibat dalam satu tanda itu, yaitu Maryam dapat melahirkan Nabi Isa tanpa suami (dan Kami menempatkan keduanya di suatu tanah tinggi) yakni tempat di dataran tinggi, yaitu di Baitulmakdis, atau di Damaskus, atau di Palestina; sehubungan dengan hal ini banyak pendapat mengenainya (yang datar) rata tanahnya sehingga para penghuninya menetap dengan nyaman (dan mempunyai banyak sumber air) yang mengalir lagi jernih sebagai suatu kenyataan

ar: یَـٰۤأَیُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلطَّیِّبَـٰتِ وَٱعۡمَلُوا۟ صَـٰلِحًاۖ إِنِّی بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ عَلِیمࣱ
ar_simple: یأیها ٱلرسل كلوا من ٱلطیبت وٱعملوا صلحا إنی بما تعملون علیم

t.sahih-int: [Allah said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed, I, of what you do, am Knowing
t.asad: O YOU APOSTLES! Partake of the good things of life, and do righteous deeds: verily, I have full knowledge of all that you do
t.yusuf-ali: O ye messengers! enjoy (all) things good and pure, and work righteousness: for I am well-acquainted with (all) that ye do
t.pickthall: O ye messengers! Eat of the good things, and do right. Lo! I am Aware of what ye do
t.arberry: O Messengers, eat of the good things and do righteousness; surely I know the things you do
t.hilali-khan: O (you) Messengers! Eat of the Taiyibat [all kinds of Halal (legal) foods which Allah has made legal (meat of slaughtered eatable animals, milk products, fats, vegetables, fruits, etc.], and do righteous deeds. Verily! I am Well-Acquainted with what you do
t.itani: O messengers, eat of the good things, and act with integrity. I am aware of what you do.
t.mubarakpuri: O Messengers! Eat of the Tayyibat and do righteous deeds. Verily, I am Well-Acquainted with what you do.
t.qarib: [God said], "O Messengers, eat good things and do good. I know all that you do
t.wahiduddin: Messengers, eat what is wholesome and do good deeds: I am well aware of what you do
t.shakir: O apostles! eat of the good things and do good; surely I know what you do
t.haleem: Messengers, eat good things and do good deeds: I am well aware of what you do
t.maariful: O messengers, eat from the good things, and act righteously. Of whatever you do, I am fully aware
t.khattab: O messengers! Eat from what is good and lawful, and act righteously. Indeed, I fully know what you do
t.ghali: O you the Messengers, eat of the good things, and do righteousness; surely I am Ever-Knowing of whatever you do
t.irving: messengers, eat wholesome things and act honorably; I am Aware of anything you do
t.iwq: Allah said, "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed, I, of what you do, am Knowing

t_id.kemenag: Hai rasul-rasul, makanlah dari makanan yang baik-baik, dan kerjakanlah amal yang saleh. Sesungguhnya Aku Maha Mengetahui apa yang kamu kerjakan.
t_id.sabiq: Kami katakan kepada rasul-rasul Kami untuk disampaikan kepada pengikut-pengikut mereka, "Makanlah dan nikmatilah aneka ragam makanan yang halal dan baik. Syukurilah karunia itu dengan melakukan amal saleh. Sesungguhnya Aku Mahatahu apa yang kalian lakukan dan akan memberi balasannya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Hai Rasul-rasul! Makanlah dari makanan yang baik-baik) makanan-makanan yang halal (dan kerjakanlah amal yang saleh) amal-amal yang fardu dan sunah. (Sesungguhnya Aku Maha Mengetahui apa yang kalian kerjakan) maka kelak Aku akan memperhitungkannya atas kalian.
t_id.iwq: Hai rasul-rasul, makanlah dari makanan yang baik-baik, dan kerjakanlah amal yang saleh. Sesungguhnya Aku Maha Mengetahui apa yang kamu kerjakan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يا أيها الرسل كلوا من الطيبات» الحلالات «واعلموا صالحاً» من فرض ونفل «إني بما تعملون عليم» فأجازيكم عليه
tafsir.siraj-ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُواْ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبَٰتِ وَٱعۡمَلُواْ صَٰلِحًاۖ إِنِّي بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ عَلِيمٞ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Hai Rasul-rasul! Makanlah dari makanan yang baik-baik) makanan-makanan yang halal (dan kerjakanlah amal yang saleh) amal-amal yang fardu dan sunah. (Sesungguhnya Aku Maha Mengetahui apa yang kalian kerjakan) maka kelak Aku akan memperhitungkannya atas kalian

ar: وَإِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦۤ أُمَّتُكُمۡ أُمَّةࣰ وَ ٰحِدَةࣰ وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمۡ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ar_simple: وإن هذه أمتكم أمة و حدة وأنا ربكم فٱتقون

t.sahih-int: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me
t.asad: And, verily, this community of yours is one single community, since I am the Sustainer of you all: remain, then, conscious of Me
t.yusuf-ali: And verily this Brotherhood of yours is a single Brotherhood, and I am your Lord and Cherisher: therefore fear Me (and no other)
t.pickthall: And lo! this your religion is one religion and I am your Lord, so keep your duty unto Me
t.arberry: Surely this community of yours is one community, and I am your Lord; so fear Me
t.hilali-khan: And verily! This your religion (of Islamic Monotheism) is one religion, and I am your Lord, so keep your duty to Me
t.itani: This nation of yours is one nation, and I am your Lord, so fear Me.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, this your religion is one religion, and I am your Lord, so have Taqwa."
t.qarib: This community of yours is one community, and I am your Lord, so be ever conscious of Me
t.wahiduddin: Your religion is but one religion -- and I am your only Lord, therefore, fear Me
t.shakir: And surely this your religion is one religion and I am your Lord, therefore be careful (of your duty) to Me
t.haleem: This community of yours is one- and I am your Lord: be mindful of Me
t.maariful: Surely, this is your creed, a single creed, and I am your Lord. So fear Me
t.khattab: Surely this religion of yours is ˹only˺ one, and I am your Lord, so fear Me ˹alone˺
t.ghali: And surely this nation of yours is one nation, and I am your Lord; so have piety towards Me
t.irving: This nation of yours [forms] one community while I am your Lord, so heed me
t.iwq: And verily this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya (agama tauhid) ini, adalah agama kamu semua, agama yang satu, dan Aku adalah Tuhanmu, maka bertakwalah kepada-Ku.
t_id.sabiq: Kami katakan kepada rasul-rasul Kami untuk disampaikan kepada pengikut-pengikutnya, "Sesungguhnya agama yang kalian Aku utus untuk membawanya adalah satu, baik akidah, maupun pokok-pokok ajarannya. Kalian pun adalah satu umat sepanjang masa." Di antara pengikut-pengikut mereka itu ada yang mendapat petunjuk dan ada juga yang tersesat. Aku adalah Tuhan yang memerintahkan kalian untuk mengikuti agama itu. Maka takutlah siksa-Ku jika kalian mendurhakai-Ku.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan) ketahuilah (bahwasanya ini) yakni agama Islam (adalah agama kalian) hai orang-orang yang diajak bicara, maksudnya kalian harus memeluknya (agama yang satu) lafal Ummatan Waahidatan ini menjadi Hal yang bersifat Lazimah atau tetap. Menurut suatu qiraat yang lain lafal Anna haadzihi dibaca Takhfif sehingga menjadi An Haadzihi, sedangkan menurut qiraat yang lainnya lagi dibaca Inna Haadzihi, dan dianggap sebagai jumlah Isti'naf atau kalimat baru, sehingga artinya menjadi, sesungguhnya agama Islam ini (dan Aku adalah Rabb kalian, maka bertakwalah kalian kepada-Ku) artinya takutlah kalian kepada-Ku.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya (agama tauhid) ini, adalah agama kamu semua, agama yang satu, dan Aku adalah Tuhanmu, maka bertakwalah kepada-Ku.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «و» اعلموا «إنَّ هذه» أي ملة الإسلام «أمتكم» دينكم أيها المخاطبون أي يجب أن تكونوا عليها «أمة واحدة» حال لازمة وفي قراءة بتخفيف النون وفي أخرى بكسرها مشددة استئنافا «وأنا ربكم فاتقون» فاحذرون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمۡ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمۡ فَٱتَّقُونِ (أُمَّتُكُمْ: دِينُكُمْ يَا مَعْشَرَ الأَنْبِيَاءِ, أُمَّةً وَاحِدَةً: دِينًا وَاحِدًا هُوَ: الإِسْلَامُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan) ketahuilah (bahwasanya ini) yakni agama Islam (adalah agama kalian) hai orang-orang yang diajak bicara, maksudnya kalian harus memeluknya (agama yang satu) lafal Ummatan Waahidatan ini menjadi Hal yang bersifat Lazimah atau tetap. Menurut suatu qiraat yang lain lafal Anna haadzihi dibaca Takhfif sehingga menjadi An Haadzihi, sedangkan menurut qiraat yang lainnya lagi dibaca Inna Haadzihi, dan dianggap sebagai jumlah Isti'naf atau kalimat baru, sehingga artinya menjadi, sesungguhnya agama Islam ini (dan Aku adalah Rabb kalian, maka bertakwalah kalian kepada-Ku) artinya takutlah kalian kepada-Ku

ar: فَتَقَطَّعُوۤا۟ أَمۡرَهُم بَیۡنَهُمۡ زُبُرࣰاۖ كُلُّ حِزۡبِۭ بِمَا لَدَیۡهِمۡ فَرِحُونَ
ar_simple: فتقطعوا أمرهم بینهم زبرا كل حزب بما لدیهم فرحون

t.sahih-int: But the people divided their religion among them into sects - each faction, in what it has, rejoicing
t.asad: But they (who claim to follow you) have torn their unity wide asunder, piece by piece, each group delighting in [but] what they themselves possess [by way of tenets]
t.yusuf-ali: But people have cut off their affair (of unity), between them, into sects: each party rejoices in that which is with itself
t.pickthall: But they (mankind) have broken their religion among them into sects, each group rejoicing in its tenets
t.arberry: But they split in their affair between them into sects, each party rejoicing in what is with them
t.hilali-khan: But they (men) have broken their religion among them into sects, each group rejoicing in its belief
t.itani: But they tore themselves into sects; each party happy with what they have.
t.mubarakpuri: But they have broken their religion among them into sects, each group rejoicing in what is with it.
t.qarib: Yet [your followers] tore their unity piece by piece, each faction rejoicing in what it has
t.wahiduddin: Yet they divided themselves into factions, each rejoicing in what they had
t.shakir: But they cut off their religion among themselves into sects, each part rejoicing in that which is with them
t.haleem: but they have split their community into sects, each rejoicing in their own
t.maariful: But they split up ways from one another (dividing themselves) into factions, each faction happy with what lies before it
t.khattab: Yet the people have divided it into different sects, each rejoicing in what they have
t.ghali: Then they cut up their Command among themselves into denominations, (i.e., differed about the command of Allah) each party exulting with whatever they had close to them. (i.e., their tenets)
t.irving: Yet they carve up their business into cartels among themselves, each faction happy with whatever lies before them
t.iwq: But the people divided their religion among them into sects - each faction, in what it has, rejoicing

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian mereka (pengikut-pengikut rasul itu) menjadikan agama mereka terpecah belah menjadi beberapa pecahan. Tiap-tiap golongan merasa bangga dengan apa yang ada pada sisi mereka (masing-masing).
t_id.sabiq: Umat manusia kemudian memutus kesatuan agama itu. Mereka ada yang mendapat petunjuk, ada juga yang tersesat, yang mengikuti kecenderungan hawa nafsu. Akibatnya, mereka terpecah belah menjadi beberapa kelompok yang saling bermusuhan. Masing-masing kelompok merasa senang dan puas dengan apa yang ada padanya, dan menyangka bahwa hanya dialah yang benar.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian mereka memecah belah) para pengikut Rasul itu (perkara mereka) yakni agama mereka (menjadi beberapa pecahan di antara mereka) lafal Zuburan ini menjadi Hal dari Fa'ilnya lafal Taqaththa'uu, artinya, menjadi sekte-sekte yang bertentangan, seperti yang terjadi di kalangan orang-orang Yahudi dan orang-orang Nasrani serta lain-lainnya. (Tiap-tiap golongan terhadap apa yang ada pada sisi mereka) agama yang mereka pegang (merasa bangga) merasa puas dan gembira.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian mereka (pengikut-pengikut rasul itu) menjadikan agama mereka terpecah belah menjadi beberapa pecahan. Tiap-tiap golongan merasa bangga dengan apa yang ada pada sisi mereka (masing-masing).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فتقطعوا» أي الأتباع «أمرهم» دينهم «بينهم زبرا» حال من فاعل تقطعوا أي أحزابا متخالفين كاليهود والنصارى وغيرهم «كل حزب بما لديهم» أي عندهم من الدين «فرحون» مسرورون
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَتَقَطَّعُوٓاْ أَمۡرَهُم بَيۡنَهُمۡ زُبُرٗاۖ كُلُّ حِزۡبِۭ بِمَا لَدَيۡهِمۡ فَرِحُونَ (فَتَقَطَّعُوا أَمْرَهُم: فَتَفَرَّقَ الأَتْبَاعُ فِي الدِّينِ, زُبُرًا: شِيَعًا، وَأَحْزَابًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian mereka memecah belah) para pengikut Rasul itu (perkara mereka) yakni agama mereka (menjadi beberapa pecahan di antara mereka) lafal Zuburan ini menjadi Hal dari Fa'ilnya lafal Taqaththa'uu, artinya, menjadi sekte-sekte yang bertentangan, seperti yang terjadi di kalangan orang-orang Yahudi dan orang-orang Nasrani serta lain-lainnya. (Tiap-tiap golongan terhadap apa yang ada pada sisi mereka) agama yang mereka pegang (merasa bangga) merasa puas dan gembira

ar: فَذَرۡهُمۡ فِی غَمۡرَتِهِمۡ حَتَّىٰ حِینٍ
ar_simple: فذرهم فی غمرتهم حتى حین

t.sahih-int: So leave them in their confusion for a time
t.asad: But leave them alone, lost in their ignorance, until a [future] time
t.yusuf-ali: But leave them in their confused ignorance for a time
t.pickthall: So leave them in their error till a time
t.arberry: So leave thou them in their perplexity for a time
t.hilali-khan: So leave them in their error for a time
t.itani: So leave them in their bewilderment until a time.
t.mubarakpuri: So, leave them in their error for a time.
t.qarib: So, leave them in their confusion for a while
t.wahiduddin: So leave them in their bewilderment for a while
t.shakir: Therefore leave them in their overwhelming ignorance till
t.haleem: So [Muhammad] leave them for a while steeped [in their ignorance]
t.maariful: So leave them in their negligence for some time
t.khattab: So leave them ˹O Prophet˺ in their heedlessness for a while
t.ghali: So leave them out in their perplexity for a while (of time)
t.irving: Leave them in their excitement for a while
t.iwq: Thus leave them in their confusion for a time

t_id.kemenag: Maka biarkanlah mereka dalam kesesatannya sampai suatu waktu.
t_id.sabiq: Oleh karena itu, hai Muhammad, biarkan orang-orang kafir berada dalam kebodohan dan kedunguan selama kamu telah menasihati mereka, sampai Allah memutuskan hukuman buat mereka dengan siksaan yang akan segera tiba.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka biarkanlah mereka) biarkanlah orang-orang kafir Mekah itu (dalam kesesatannya) (sampai suatu waktu) hingga saat kematian mereka.
t_id.iwq: Maka biarkanlah mereka dalam kesesatannya sampai suatu waktu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فذرهم» اترك كفار مكة «في غمرتهم» ضلالتهم «حتى حين» إلى حين موتهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَذَرۡهُمۡ فِي غَمۡرَتِهِمۡ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ (غَمْرَتِهِمْ: ضَلَالَتِهِمْ، وَجَهْلِهِمْ, حَتَّى حِينٍ: إِلَى وَقْتِ نُزُولِ العَذَابِ بِهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka biarkanlah mereka) biarkanlah orang-orang kafir Mekah itu (dalam kesesatannya) (sampai suatu waktu) hingga saat kematian mereka

ar: أَیَحۡسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم بِهِۦ مِن مَّالࣲ وَبَنِینَ
ar_simple: أیحسبون أنما نمدهم به من مال وبنین

t.sahih-int: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children
t.asad: Do they think that by all the wealth and offspring with which We provide them
t.yusuf-ali: Do they think that because We have granted them abundance of wealth and sons
t.pickthall: Think they that in the wealth and sons wherewith We provide them
t.arberry: What, do they think that We succour them with of wealth and children
t.hilali-khan: Do they think that We enlarge them in wealth and children
t.itani: Do they assume that, in furnishing them with wealth and children.
t.mubarakpuri: Do they think that in wealth and children with which We prolong them
t.qarib: Do they think that We provide them wealth and children
t.wahiduddin: Do they imagine that the wealth and children We have provided
t.shakir: Do they think that by what We aid them with of wealth and children
t.haleem: Do they reckon that, by giving them wealth and sons
t.maariful: Do they think that by consistently providing them with wealth and children
t.khattab: Do they think, since We provide them with wealth and children
t.ghali: Do they reckon that whatever wealth and sons We supply them with
t.irving: Do they reckon that We have only afforded them wealth and children because of it
t.iwq: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children

t_id.kemenag: Apakah mereka mengira bahwa harta dan anak-anak yang Kami berikan kepada mereka itu (berarti bahwa),
t_id.sabiq: Apakah orang-orang yang durhaka itu mengira bahwa ketika Kami membiarkan mereka menikmati kekayaan dan anak yang Kami berikan,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah mereka mengira bahwa sesungguhnya apa-apa yang Kami berikan kepada mereka) artinya, Kami limpahkan kepada mereka (berupa harta benda dan anak-anak) di dunia ini.
t_id.iwq: Apakah mereka mengira bahwa harta dan anak-anak yang Kami berikan kepada mereka itu (berarti bahwa),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أيحسبون أنما نمدهم به» نعطيهم «من مال وبنين» في الدنيا
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَيَحۡسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم بِهِۦ مِن مَّالٖ وَبَنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah mereka mengira bahwa sesungguhnya apa-apa yang Kami berikan kepada mereka) artinya, Kami limpahkan kepada mereka (berupa harta benda dan anak-anak) di dunia ini

ar: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمۡ فِی ٱلۡخَیۡرَ ٰتِۚ بَل لَّا یَشۡعُرُونَ
ar_simple: نسارع لهم فی ٱلخیر ت بل لا یشعرون

t.sahih-int: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive
t.asad: We [but want to] make them vie with one another in doing [what they consider] good works? Nay, but they do not perceive [their error]
t.yusuf-ali: We would hasten them on in every good? Nay, they do not understand
t.pickthall: We hasten unto them with good things? Nay, but they perceive not
t.arberry: We vie in good works for them? Nay, but they are not aware
t.hilali-khan: We hasten unto them with good things (in this worldly life so that they will have no share of good things in the Hereafter)? Nay, but they perceive not
t.itani: We race to give them the good things? In fact, they have no idea.
t.mubarakpuri: We hasten unto them with good things. Nay, but they perceive not.
t.qarib: because We rush to give them good things? No, but they are oblivious [to what is going on]
t.wahiduddin: have no other purpose except to help them in acquiring material benefits? No indeed. But they do not understand
t.shakir: We are hastening to them of good things? Nay, they do not perceive
t.haleem: We race to give them good things? They really have no idea
t.maariful: We are accelerating the (real) good things to them? The fact, however, is that they do not understand (the reality)
t.khattab: that We hasten to ˹honour˺ them ˹with˺ all kinds of good? No! They are not aware
t.ghali: We (provide them) swiftly with charitable (benefits)? No indeed, (but) they are not aware
t.irving: We hurry good things up for them, yet they do not even notice it
t.iwq: Is because We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive

t_id.kemenag: Kami bersegera memberikan kebaikan-kebaikan kepada mereka? Tidak, sebenarnya mereka tidak sadar.
t_id.sabiq: berarti Kami meridai mereka, lalu melimpahkan mereka berbagai kenikmatan dalam waktu singkat dan dalam jumlah yang banyak? Mereka sungguh-sungguh bagaikan binatang yang tidak dapat merasa karena tidak menggunakan akal pikirannya. Kami sama sekali tidak meridai mereka. Nikmat-nikmat itu hanya merupakan istidrâj (penundaan hukuman) Kami untuk mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kami bersegera) menyegerakan (memberikan kebaikan-kebaikan kepada mereka) tidak, sesungguhnya tidak demikian (sebenarnya mereka tidak sadar) bahwasanya hal itu adalah pengluluh atau Istidraj buat mereka.
t_id.iwq: Kami bersegera memberikan kebaikan-kebaikan kepada mereka? Tidak, sebenarnya mereka tidak sadar.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «نسارع» نعجل «لهم في الخيرات» لا «بل لا يشعرون» أن ذلك استدراج لهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡخَيۡرَٰتِۚ بَل لَّا يَشۡعُرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kami bersegera) menyegerakan (memberikan kebaikan-kebaikan kepada mereka) tidak, sesungguhnya tidak demikian (sebenarnya mereka tidak sadar) bahwasanya hal itu adalah pengluluh atau Istidraj buat mereka

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِینَ هُم مِّنۡ خَشۡیَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشۡفِقُونَ
ar_simple: إن ٱلذین هم من خشیة ربهم مشفقون

t.sahih-int: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord
t.asad: Verily, [only] they who stand in reverent awe of their Sustainer
t.yusuf-ali: Verily those who live in awe for fear of their Lord
t.pickthall: Lo! those who go in awe for fear of their Lord
t.arberry: Surely those who tremble in fear of their Lord
t.hilali-khan: Verily! Those who live in awe for fear of their Lord
t.itani: Those who, from awe of their Lord, are fearful.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, those who live in awe for fear of their Lord;
t.qarib: Those who stand in awe of their Lord
t.wahiduddin: Those who tremble with fear of their Lord
t.shakir: Surely they who from fear of their Lord are cautious
t.haleem: Those who stand in awe of their Lord
t.maariful: (Contrarily) those who are anxious out of awe of their Lord
t.khattab: Surely those who tremble in awe of their Lord
t.ghali: Surely the ones who are (themselves) timorous in apprehension of their Lord
t.irving: Those who feel anxious out of awe for their Lord
t.iwq: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang berhati-hati karena takut akan (azab) Tuhan mereka,
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang takut dan merasakan kebesaran Tuhannya, dan telah terbiasa bersikap demikian,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang karena perasaan khasyyah mereka kepada Rabb mereka) disebabkan mereka takut kepada-Nya (mereka merasa takut sekali) kepada azab-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang berhati-hati karena takut akan (azab) Tuhan mereka,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن الذين هم من خشية ربهم» خوفهم منه «مشفقون» خائفون من عذابه
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنۡ خَشۡيَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشۡفِقُونَ (مُّشْفِقُونَ: وَجِلُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang karena perasaan khasyyah mereka kepada Rabb mereka) disebabkan mereka takut kepada-Nya (mereka merasa takut sekali) kepada azab-Nya

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ هُم بِءَایَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ یُؤۡمِنُونَ
ar_simple: وٱلذین هم بءایت ربهم یؤمنون

t.sahih-int: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord
t.asad: and who believe in their Sustainer’s messages
t.yusuf-ali: Those who believe in the Signs of their Lord
t.pickthall: And those who believe in the revelations of their Lord
t.arberry: and those who believe in the signs of their Lord
t.hilali-khan: And those who believe in the Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of their Lord
t.itani: And those who believe in their Lord’s Verses.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who believe in the Ayat of their Lord;
t.qarib: who believe in the messages of their Lord
t.wahiduddin: and believe in His messages
t.shakir: And those who believe in the communications of their Lord
t.haleem: who believe in His messages
t.maariful: and those who believe in the verses of their Lord
t.khattab: and who believe in the revelations of their Lord
t.ghali: And the ones who (themselves) believe in the signs of their Lord
t.irving: and those who believe in their Lord´s signs
t.iwq: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang beriman dengan ayat-ayat Tuhan mereka,
t_id.sabiq: orang-orang yang beriman dengan tanda-tanda kekuasaan Allah yang terdapat di alam raya dan di dalam kitab suci yang diturunkan-Nya,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang terhadap ayat-ayat Rabb mereka) Alquran (mereka beriman) sangat percaya kepadanya.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang beriman dengan ayat-ayat Tuhan mereka,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين هم بآيات ربهم» القرآن «يؤمنون» يصدقون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang terhadap ayat-ayat Rabb mereka) Alquran (mereka beriman) sangat percaya kepadanya

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ هُم بِرَبِّهِمۡ لَا یُشۡرِكُونَ
ar_simple: وٱلذین هم بربهم لا یشركون

t.sahih-int: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord
t.asad: and who do not ascribe divinity to aught but their Sustainer
t.yusuf-ali: Those who join not (in worship) partners with their Lord
t.pickthall: And those who ascribe not partners unto their Lord
t.arberry: and those who associate naught with their Lord
t.hilali-khan: And those who join not anyone (in worship) as partners with their Lord
t.itani: And those who associate no partners with their Lord.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who join not anyone as partners with their Lord;
t.qarib: who do not associate anything with their Lord
t.wahiduddin: and do not ascribe partners to Him
t.shakir: And those who do not associate (aught) with their Lord
t.haleem: who do not ascribe partners to Him
t.maariful: and those who do not associate any partner to their Lord
t.khattab: and who associate none with their Lord
t.ghali: And the ones who (themselves) do not associate anything with their Lord
t.irving: and those who do not associate anything with their Lord
t.iwq: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang tidak mempersekutukan dengan Tuhan mereka (sesuatu apapun),
t_id.sabiq: orang-orang yang tidak menyekutukan Allah dengan sesuatu apa pun,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang tidak mempersekutukan dengan Rabb mereka) sesuatu apa pun.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang tidak mempersekutukan dengan Tuhan mereka (sesuatu apapun),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين هم بربهم لا يشركون» معه غيره
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِرَبِّهِمۡ لَا يُشۡرِكُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang tidak mempersekutukan dengan Rabb mereka) sesuatu apa pun

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ یُؤۡتُونَ مَاۤ ءَاتَوا۟ وَّقُلُوبُهُمۡ وَجِلَةٌ أَنَّهُمۡ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمۡ رَ ٰجِعُونَ
ar_simple: وٱلذین یؤتون ما ءاتوا وقلوبهم وجلة أنهم إلى ربهم ر جعون

t.sahih-int: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord
t.asad: and who give whatever they [have to] give with their hearts trembling at the thought that unto their Sustainer they must return
t.yusuf-ali: And those who dispense their charity with their hearts full of fear, because they will return to their Lord
t.pickthall: And those who give that which they give with hearts afraid because they are about to return unto their Lord
t.arberry: and those who give what they give, their hearts quaking that they are returning to their Lord
t.hilali-khan: And those who give that (their charity) which they give (and also do other good deeds) with their hearts full of fear (whether their alms and charities, etc., have been accepted or not), because they are sure to return to their Lord (for reckoning)
t.itani: And those who give what they give, while their hearts quake, knowing that to their Lord they will return.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who give that which they give with their hearts full of fear, because they are sure to return to their Lord.
t.qarib: and who give whatever they can while their hearts tremble at the thought that they will be returning to their Lord
t.wahiduddin: and those who give to others what has been bestowed upon them with their hearts trembling at the thought that they must return to their Lord
t.shakir: And those who give what they give (in alms) while their hearts are full of fear that to their Lord they must return
t.haleem: who always give with hearts that tremble at the thought that they must return to Him
t.maariful: And those who give whatever they give, with their hearts full of fear that to their Lord they are to return
t.khattab: and who do whatever ˹good˺ they do with their hearts fearful, ˹knowing˺ that they will return to their Lord—
t.ghali: And the ones who bring whatever they bring with hearts tremulous that they are returning to their Lord
t.irving: and those who give away anything they may give while their hearts feel wary lest they should return to their Lord
t.iwq: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang memberikan apa yang telah mereka berikan, dengan hati yang takut, (karena mereka tahu bahwa) sesungguhnya mereka akan kembali kepada Tuhan mereka,
t_id.sabiq: orang-orang yang mengeluarkan zakat dari kekayaan yang dikaruniakan Allah, dan melakukan pekerjaannya dengan penuh rasa khawatir kalau-kalau pekerjaannya itu tidak sempurna, karena sadar bahwa mereka akan kembali kepada Allah dan akan diperhitungkan melalui pembangkitan kembali,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang memberikan) yang menginfakkan (apa yang telah mereka berikan) mereka infakkan berupa zakat dan amal-amal saleh (dengan hati yang takut) takut amalnya tidak diterima (karena mereka tahu bahwa sesungguhnya mereka) sebelum lafal Annahum ini diperkirakan adanya huruf Lam yang menjarkannya (akan dikembalikan kepada Rabb mereka).
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang memberikan apa yang telah mereka berikan, dengan hati yang takut, (karena mereka tahu bahwa) sesungguhnya mereka akan kembali kepada Tuhan mereka,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين يؤتون» يعطون «ما آتوْا» أعطوا من الصدقة والأعمال الصالحة «وقلوبهم وجلة» خائفة أن لا تقبل منهم «أنهم» يقدر قبله لام الجر «إلى ربهم راجعون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤۡتُونَ مَآ ءَاتَواْ وَّقُلُوبُهُمۡ وَجِلَةٌ أَنَّهُمۡ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمۡ رَٰجِعُونَ (وَجِلَةٌ: خَائِفَةٌ مِنْ عَدَمِ القَبُولِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang memberikan) yang menginfakkan (apa yang telah mereka berikan) mereka infakkan berupa zakat dan amal-amal saleh (dengan hati yang takut) takut amalnya tidak diterima (karena mereka tahu bahwa sesungguhnya mereka) sebelum lafal Annahum ini diperkirakan adanya huruf Lam yang menjarkannya (akan dikembalikan kepada Rabb mereka)

ar: أُو۟لَـٰۤئِكَ یُسَـٰرِعُونَ فِی ٱلۡخَیۡرَ ٰتِ وَهُمۡ لَهَا سَـٰبِقُونَ
ar_simple: أولئك یسرعون فی ٱلخیر ت وهم لها سبقون

t.sahih-int: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein
t.asad: it is they who vie with one another in doing good works, and it is they who outrun [all others] in attaining to them
t.yusuf-ali: It is these who hasten in every good work, and these who are foremost in them
t.pickthall: These race for the good things, and they shall win them in the race
t.arberry: those vie in good works, outracing to them
t.hilali-khan: It is these who race for the good deeds, and they are foremost in them [e.g. offering the compulsory Salat (prayers) in their (early) stated, fixed times and so on
t.itani: It is they who race towards goodness. It is they who will reach it first.
t.mubarakpuri: It is these who hasten in the good deeds, and they are foremost in them.
t.qarib: these are the ones who vie to do good deeds, and they will be the first to attain them
t.wahiduddin: it is they who vie with one another in doing good works and shall be the foremost in doing so
t.shakir: These hasten to good things and they are foremost in (attaining) them
t.haleem: are the ones who race toward good things, and they will be the first to get them
t.maariful: those people are accelerating towards the (real) good things, and they are the foremost to attain them
t.khattab: it is they who race to do good deeds, always taking the lead
t.ghali: Those (come) swiftly with charitable (deeds), and they are outstrippers to them
t.irving: [all] those compete in doing good deeds and they will soon attain them
t.iwq: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip others therein

t_id.kemenag: mereka itu bersegera untuk mendapat kebaikan-kebaikan, dan merekalah orang-orang yang segera memperolehnya.
t_id.sabiq: mereka semua, dengan apa yang mereka kerjakan itu, bersegera dan mendahului orang lain untuk mencapai berbagai kebaikan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka itu bersegera untuk mendapatkan kebaikan-kebaikan, dan merekalah orang-orang yang segera memperolehnya) menurut ilmu Allah.
t_id.iwq: mereka itu bersegera untuk mendapat kebaikan-kebaikan, dan merekalah orang-orang yang segera memperolehnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أولئك يسارعون في الخيرات وهم لها سابقون» في علم الله
tafsir.siraj-ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ يُسَٰرِعُونَ فِي ٱلۡخَيۡرَٰتِ وَهُمۡ لَهَا سَٰبِقُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka itu bersegera untuk mendapatkan kebaikan-kebaikan, dan merekalah orang-orang yang segera memperolehnya) menurut ilmu Allah

ar: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفۡسًا إِلَّا وُسۡعَهَاۚ وَلَدَیۡنَا كِتَـٰبࣱ یَنطِقُ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَهُمۡ لَا یُظۡلَمُونَ
ar_simple: ولا نكلف نفسا إلا وسعها ولدینا كتب ینطق بٱلحق وهم لا یظلمون

t.sahih-int: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged
t.asad: And [withal.] We do not burden any human being with more than he is well able to bear: for with Us is a record that speaks the truth [about what men do and can do]; and none shall be wronged
t.yusuf-ali: On no soul do We place a burden greater than it can bear: before Us is a record which clearly shows the truth: they will never be wronged
t.pickthall: And we task not any soul beyond its scope, and with Us is a Record which speaketh the truth, and they will not be wronged
t.arberry: We charge not any soul save to its capacity, and with Us is a Book speaking truth, and they shall not be wronged
t.hilali-khan: And We tax not any person except according to his capacity, and with Us is a Record which speaks the truth, and they will not be wronged
t.itani: We never burden any soul beyond its capacity. And with Us is a record that tells the truth, and they will not be wronged.
t.mubarakpuri: And We task not any person except according to his capacity, and with Us is a Record which speaks the truth, and they will not be wronged.
t.qarib: We do not burden any soul with more than it can bear. There is a record with Us which speaks the Truth and they will not be treated unjustly
t.wahiduddin: We charge no soul with more than it can bear. We have a record which clearly shows the truth and they will not be wronged
t.shakir: And We do not lay on any soul a burden except to the extent of its ability, and with Us is a book which speaks the truth, and they shall not be dealt with unjustly
t.haleem: We do not burden any soul with more than it can bear- We have a Record that tells the truth- they will not be wronged
t.maariful: We do not place a burden on anyone except according to his ability. With Us there is a book which speaks with truth, and they shall not be wronged
t.khattab: We never require of any soul more than what it can afford. And with Us is a record which speaks the truth. None will be wronged
t.ghali: And We do not charge any self except to its capacity, and close to Us is a Book pronouncing the Truth, and they will not be done any injustice
t.irving: We only assign a soul something it can cope with. Before Us lies a Book which speaks up for Truth; they will not be dealt with unjustly
t.iwq: And We charge no soul except with that within its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged

t_id.kemenag: Kami tiada membebani seseorang melainkan menurut kesanggupannya, dan pada sisi Kami ada suatu kitab yang membicarakan kebenaran, dan mereka tidak dianiaya.
t_id.sabiq: Kami tidak akan membebani seseorang kecuali sesuatu yang mampu dilakukannya, dalam batas-batas kemampuan. Setiap perbuatan manusia tercatat dalam buku yang ada pada Kami, dan akan Kami beritahukan kepadanya seperti apa adanya. Mereka tidak akan dicurangi dengan penambahan siksa atau pengurangan pahala.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kami tiada membebani seseorang melainkan menurut kesanggupannya) yang sesuai dengan kemampuannya, oleh karenanya barang siapa tidak mampu melakukan salat sambil berdiri, maka ia boleh melakukannya sambil duduk, dan barang siapa tidak mampu melakukan puasa maka ia boleh berbuka (dan pada sisi Kami) di sisi Kami (ada suatu kitab yang membicarakan dengan benar) apa yang telah dilakukan oleh seseorang, yaitu Lohmahfuz; padanya ditulis semua amal-amal perbuatan (dan mereka) kita semua orang yang beramal (tidak dianiaya) barang sedikit pun dari amal-amalnya, oleh karenanya sedikit pun tidak dikurangi pahala amal kebaikannya, dan tidak pula ditambah dosa-dosanya.
t_id.iwq: Kami tiada membebani seseorang melainkan menurut kesanggupannya, dan pada sisi Kami ada suatu kitab yang membicarakan kebenaran, dan mereka tidak dianiaya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا نكلف نفسا إلا وسعها» طاقتها فمن لم يستطع أن يصلي قائما فليصل جالسا، ومن لم يستطع أن يصوم فليأكل «ولدينا» عندنا «كتاب ينطق بالحق» بما عملته وهو واللوح المحفوظ تسطر فيه الأعمال «وهم» أي النفوس العاملة «لا يظلمون» شيئا منها فلا ينقص من ثواب أعمال الخيرات ولا يزاد في السيئات
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفۡسًا إِلَّا وُسۡعَهَاۚ وَلَدَيۡنَا كِتَٰبٞ يَنطِقُ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kami tiada membebani seseorang melainkan menurut kesanggupannya) yang sesuai dengan kemampuannya, oleh karenanya barang siapa tidak mampu melakukan salat sambil berdiri, maka ia boleh melakukannya sambil duduk, dan barang siapa tidak mampu melakukan puasa maka ia boleh berbuka (dan pada sisi Kami) di sisi Kami (ada suatu kitab yang membicarakan dengan benar) apa yang telah dilakukan oleh seseorang, yaitu Lohmahfuz; padanya ditulis semua amal-amal perbuatan (dan mereka) kita semua orang yang beramal (tidak dianiaya) barang sedikit pun dari amal-amalnya, oleh karenanya sedikit pun tidak dikurangi pahala amal kebaikannya, dan tidak pula ditambah dosa-dosanya

ar: بَلۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡ فِی غَمۡرَةࣲ مِّنۡ هَـٰذَا وَلَهُمۡ أَعۡمَـٰلࣱ مِّن دُونِ ذَ ٰلِكَ هُمۡ لَهَا عَـٰمِلُونَ
ar_simple: بل قلوبهم فی غمرة من هذا ولهم أعمل من دون ذ لك هم لها عملون

t.sahih-int: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides disbelief which they are doing
t.asad: NAY, [as for those who have torn asunder the unity of faith] - their hearts are lost in ignorance of all this! But apart from that [breach of unity] they have [on their conscience even worse] deeds; and they will [continue to] commit them
t.yusuf-ali: But their hearts are in confused ignorance of this; and there are, besides that, deeds of theirs, which they will (continue) to do
t.pickthall: Nay, but their hearts are in ignorance of this (Qur'an), and they have other works, besides, which they are doing
t.arberry: Nay, but their hearts are in perplexity as to this, and they have deeds besides that that they are doing
t.hilali-khan: Nay, but their hearts are covered (blind) from understanding this (the Quran), and they have other (evil) deeds, besides, which they are doing
t.itani: But their hearts are puzzled because of this; and they have deeds that do not conform to this, which they continue to perpetrate.
t.mubarakpuri: Nay, but their hearts are covered from this, and they have other deeds, besides which they are doing.
t.qarib: However, the [unbelievers'] hearts are in confusion about this [message], and they do even do worse deeds
t.wahiduddin: But their hearts are heedless of this. Moreover, there are other deeds besides this which they do
t.shakir: Nay, their hearts are in overwhelming ignorance with respect to it and they have besides this other deeds which they do
t.haleem: But the disbelievers’ hearts are steeped [in ignorance of ] all this; and there are other things besides this that they do
t.maariful: But their hearts are in ignorance about this, and they have deeds, other than that, which they are continuously doing
t.khattab: But the hearts of those ˹who disbelieve˺ are oblivious to ˹all of˺ this, and they have other ˹evil˺ deeds, opposite to this, in which they are engrossed
t.ghali: No indeed, (but) their hearts are in perplexity as to this, and they have deeds other than that (even lesser than that) that they are doing
t.irving: Instead their hearts are full of excitement because of this. They have other deeds besides those which they are committing
t.iwq: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have evil deeds besides disbelief which they are doing

t_id.kemenag: Tetapi hati orang-orang kafir itu dalam kesesatan dari (memahami kenyataan) ini, dan mereka banyak mengerjakan perbuatan-perbuatan (buruk) selain daripada itu, mereka tetap mengerjakannya.
t_id.sabiq: Tetapi orang-orang kafir, akibat sikap membangkang dan sikap fanatisme mereka, lalai melakukan perbuatan baik dan tugas yang sebenarnya mampu mereka lakukan serta lalai akan telitinya perhitungan. Di samping itu, mereka selalu melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan yang keji.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tetapi hati mereka) yakni orang-orang kafir itu (dalam kealpaan) artinya, kebodohan (mengenai hal ini) yaitu Alquran (dan mereka banyak mengerjakan perbuatan-perbuatan selain daripada itu) selain amal-amal kebaikan yang dilakukan oleh orang-orang yang beriman (mereka tetap mengerjakannya) oleh sebab itu mereka diazab.
t_id.iwq: Tetapi hati orang-orang kafir itu dalam kesesatan dari (memahami kenyataan) ini, dan mereka banyak mengerjakan perbuatan-perbuatan (buruk) selain daripada itu, mereka tetap mengerjakannya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «بل قلوبهم» أي الكفار «في غمره» جهالة «من هذا» القرآن «ولهم أعمال من دون ذلك» المذكور للمؤمنين «هم لها عاملون» فيعذبون عليها
tafsir.siraj-ar: بَلۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡ فِي غَمۡرَةٖ مِّنۡ هَٰذَا وَلَهُمۡ أَعۡمَٰلٞ مِّن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ هُمۡ لَهَا عَٰمِلُونَ (غَمْرَةٍ مِّنْ هَذَا: ضَلَالٍ عَنْ هَذَا القُرْآنِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tetapi hati mereka) yakni orang-orang kafir itu (dalam kealpaan) artinya, kebodohan (mengenai hal ini) yaitu Alquran (dan mereka banyak mengerjakan perbuatan-perbuatan selain daripada itu) selain amal-amal kebaikan yang dilakukan oleh orang-orang yang beriman (mereka tetap mengerjakannya) oleh sebab itu mereka diazab

ar: حَتَّىٰۤ إِذَاۤ أَخَذۡنَا مُتۡرَفِیهِم بِٱلۡعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمۡ یَجۡءَرُونَ
ar_simple: حتى إذا أخذنا مترفیهم بٱلعذاب إذا هم یجءرون

t.sahih-int: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allah] for help
t.asad: until - after We shall have taken to task, through suffering, those from among them who [now] are lost in the pursuit of pleasures - they cry out in [belated] supplication
t.yusuf-ali: Until, when We seize in Punishment those of them who received the good things of this world, behold, they will groan in supplication
t.pickthall: Till when We grasp their luxurious ones with the punishment, behold! they supplicate
t.arberry: Till, when We seize with the chastisement the ones of them that live at ease, behold, they groan
t.hilali-khan: Until, when We grasp those of them who lead a luxurious life with punishment, behold! They make humble invocation with a loud voice
t.itani: Until, when We seize the decadent among them with torment, they begin to groan.
