t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya kami dan bapak-bapak kami telah diberi ancaman (dengan) ini dahulu, ini tidak lain hanyalah dongengan orang-orang dahulu kala!".
t_id.sabiq: "Kami dan nenek moyang kami," kata mereka melanjutkan, "dijanjikan dengan janji yang sama. Padahal janji itu hanyalah mitos dan dongeng orang terdahulu belaka."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kami dan bapak-bapak kami telah diberi ancaman dengan ini) yaitu dengan masalah akan dibangkitkan menjadi hidup kembali sesudah mati (dahulu, tiada lain) tidak lain (ia hanyalah dongengan-dongengan) kebohongan-kebohongan (orang-orang dahulu kala") wazan lafal Asaathiir sama dengan lafal Al Adhaahiik dan Al-A`aajiib, adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal Usthuurah artinya dongengan atau fiksi.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya kami dan bapak-bapak kami telah diberi ancaman (dengan) ini dahulu, ini tidak lain hanyalah dongengan orang-orang dahulu kala!".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لقد وعدنا نحن وآباؤنا هذا» أي البعث بعد الموت «من قبل إن» ما «هذا إلا أساطير» أكاذيب «الأولين» كالأضاحيك والأعاجيب جمع أسطورة بالضم
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَقَدۡ وُعِدۡنَا نَحۡنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا هَٰذَا مِن قَبۡلُ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kami dan bapak-bapak kami telah diberi ancaman dengan ini) yaitu dengan masalah akan dibangkitkan menjadi hidup kembali sesudah mati (dahulu, tiada lain) tidak lain (ia hanyalah dongengan-dongengan) kebohongan-kebohongan (orang-orang dahulu kala") wazan lafal Asaathiir sama dengan lafal Al Adhaahiik dan Al-A`aajiib, adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal Usthuurah artinya dongengan atau fiksi

ar: قُل لِّمَنِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمَن فِیهَاۤ إِن كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
ar_simple: قل لمن ٱلأرض ومن فیها إن كنتم تعلمون

t.sahih-int: Say, [O Muhammad], "To whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it, if you should know
t.asad: Say: “Unto whom belongs the earth and all that lives there on? [Tell me this] if you happen to know [the answer]!”
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "To whom belong the earth and all beings therein? (say) if ye know
t.pickthall: Say: Unto Whom (belongeth) the earth and whosoever is therein, if ye have knowledge
t.arberry: Say: 'Whose is the earth, and whoso is in it, if you have knowledge
t.hilali-khan: Say: "Whose is the earth and whosoever is therein? If you know
t.itani: Say, “To whom does the earth belong, and everyone in it, if you happen to know?”
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "Whose is the earth and whosoever is therein If you know!"
t.qarib: Say, "To whom belongs the earth and all that is in it, if you know
t.wahiduddin: Say, "To whom do the earth and all therein belong? Tell me, if you have any knowledge
t.shakir: Say: Whose is the earth, and whoever is therein, if you know
t.haleem: Say [Prophet], ‘Who owns the earth and all who live in it, if you know [so much]?’
t.maariful: Say, “Whose is the earth and all those therein if you have knowledge?”
t.khattab: Ask ˹them, O Prophet˺, “To whom belong the earth and all those on it, if you ˹really˺ know?”
t.ghali: Say, "To whom does the earth belong, and whoever is in it, in case you know
t.irving: SAY: "Who owns the earth and anyone on it, if you know [anything]
t.iwq: Say, O Muhammad, "To whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it, if you should know

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Kepunyaan siapakah bumi ini, dan semua yang ada padanya, jika kamu mengetahui?"
t_id.sabiq: Wahai Muhammad, katakan kepada mereka, "Siapakah gerangan yang menguasai bumi dengan manusia dan berbagai makhluk yang ada di dalamnya? Kalau kalian tahu, jawablah pertanyaanku!"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) kepada mereka, ("Kepunyaan siapakah bumi ini, dan semua yang ada padanya) yakni semua makhluk yang ada padanya (jika kalian mengetahui?") siapa pencipta dan pemiliknya.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Kepunyaan siapakah bumi ini, dan semua yang ada padanya, jika kamu mengetahui?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل» لهم «لمن الأرض ومن فيها» من الخلق «إن كنتم تعلمون» خالقها ومالكها
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُل لِّمَنِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمَن فِيهَآ إِن كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) kepada mereka, ("Kepunyaan siapakah bumi ini, dan semua yang ada padanya) yakni semua makhluk yang ada padanya (jika kalian mengetahui?") siapa pencipta dan pemiliknya

ar: سَیَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِۚ قُلۡ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ar_simple: سیقولون لله قل أفلا تذكرون

t.sahih-int: They will say, "To Allah." Say, "Then will you not remember
t.asad: And they will reply: “Unto God.” Say: “Will you not, then, bethink yourselves [of Him]?”
t.yusuf-ali: They will say, "To Allah!" say: "Yet will ye not receive admonition
t.pickthall: They will say: Unto Allah. Say: Will ye not then remember
t.arberry: They will say, God's.' Say: 'Will you not then remember
t.hilali-khan: They will say: "It is Allah's!" Say: "Will you not then remember
t.itani: They will say, “To God.” Say, “Will you not reflect?”
t.mubarakpuri: They will say: "It is Allah's!" Say: "Will you not then remember"
t.qarib: They will say, "To God." Say, "Then will you not take heed
t.wahiduddin: They will say, "To God." Say, "So will you not pay heed
t.shakir: They will say: Allah's. Say: Will you not then mind
t.haleem: and they will reply, ‘God.’ Say, ‘Will you not take heed?’
t.maariful: They will say, “Allah’s.” Say, “Would you still pay no heed
t.khattab: They will reply, “To Allah!” Say, “Why are you not then mindful?”
t.ghali: They will say, "To Allah." Say, "Will you not then be mindful
t.irving: They will say : "It is God´s." SAY: "Will you not bear it in mind
t.iwq: And they will say, "To Allah." Say, "Then will you not remember

t_id.kemenag: Mereka akan menjawab: "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah: "Maka apakah kamu tidak ingat?"
t_id.sabiq: Mereka tentu akan menyatakan bahwa bumi adalah milik Allah Swt. Kalau begitu, katakan lagi kepada mereka, "Lalu mengapa kalian menyekutukan-Nya? Tidakkah kalian menyadari bahwa Zat Yang menguasai itu semua pantas untuk disembah?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka akan menjawab, "Kepunyaan Allah." Katakanlah) kepada mereka, ("Maka apakah kalian tidak memikirkannya?") asal Tadzakkaruuna adalah Tatadzakkaruuna kemudian huruf Ta yang kedua diidgamkan atau dimasukkan ke dalam huruf Dzal setelah terlebih dahulu diganti menjadi Dzal, sehingga jadilah Tadzakkaruuna, artinya mengambil pelajaran. Maksudnya, apakah kalian tidak mengambil pelajaran daripadanya, karena kalian mengetahui, bahwa Tuhan Yang Maha Kuasa yang telah menciptakan untuk pertama kali, Maha Kuasa pula untuk menghidupkannya kembali, sesudah ciptaan-Nya mati.
t_id.iwq: Mereka akan menjawab: "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah: "Maka apakah kamu tidak ingat?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «سيقولون لله قل» لهم «أفلا تذَّكرون» بإدغام التاء الثانية في الذال تتعظون فتعلمون أن القادر على الخلق ابتداء قادر على الإحياء بعد الموت
tafsir.siraj-ar: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِۚ قُلۡ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka akan menjawab, "Kepunyaan Allah." Katakanlah) kepada mereka, ("Maka apakah kalian tidak memikirkannya?") asal Tadzakkaruuna adalah Tatadzakkaruuna kemudian huruf Ta yang kedua diidgamkan atau dimasukkan ke dalam huruf Dzal setelah terlebih dahulu diganti menjadi Dzal, sehingga jadilah Tadzakkaruuna, artinya mengambil pelajaran. Maksudnya, apakah kalian tidak mengambil pelajaran daripadanya, karena kalian mengetahui, bahwa Tuhan Yang Maha Kuasa yang telah menciptakan untuk pertama kali, Maha Kuasa pula untuk menghidupkannya kembali, sesudah ciptaan-Nya mati

ar: قُلۡ مَن رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَ ٰتِ ٱلسَّبۡعِ وَرَبُّ ٱلۡعَرۡشِ ٱلۡعَظِیمِ
ar_simple: قل من رب ٱلسمو ت ٱلسبع ورب ٱلعرش ٱلعظیم

t.sahih-int: Say, "Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Great Throne
t.asad: Say: “Who is it that sustains the seven heavens and is enthroned in His awesome almightiness?”
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "Who is the Lord of the seven heavens, and the Lord of the Throne (of Glory) Supreme
t.pickthall: Say: Who is Lord of the seven heavens, and Lord of the Tremendous Throne
t.arberry: Say: 'Who is the Lord of the seven heavens and the Lord of the mighty Throne
t.hilali-khan: Say: "Who is (the) Lord of the seven heavens, and (the) Lord of the Great Throne
t.itani: Say, “Who is the Lord of the seven heavens, and Lord of the Splendid Throne?”
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "Who is (the) Lord of the seven heavens, and (the) Lord of the Great Throne"
t.qarib: Say, "Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Mighty Throne
t.wahiduddin: Say, "Who is the Lord of the seven heavens, and of the Glorious Throne
t.shakir: Say: Who is the Lord of the seven heavens and the Lord of the mighty dominion
t.haleem: Say, ‘Who is the Lord of the seven heavens? Who is the Lord of the Mighty Throne?’
t.maariful: Say, “Who is the Lord of the seven heavens and the Lord of the Great Throne?”
t.khattab: ˹And˺ ask ˹them˺, “Who is the Lord of the seven heavens and the Lord of the Mighty Throne?”
t.ghali: Say, "Who is The Lord of the seven heavens and The Lord of the Ever-Magnificent Throne
t.irving: SAY: "Who is Lord of the Seven Heavens and Lord of the splendid Throne
t.iwq: Say, "Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Great Throne

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Siapakah Yang Empunya langit yang tujuh dan Yang Empunya 'Arsy yang besar?"
t_id.sabiq: Katakan pula, "Siapakah Tuhan Pemilik tujuh lapis langit dan singgasana agung?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah! "Siapakah Rabb langit yang tujuh dan Rabb Arasy yang besar") yakni Al Kursi.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Siapakah Yang Empunya langit yang tujuh dan Yang Empunya 'Arsy yang besar?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل من رب السماوات السبع ورب العرش العظيم» الكرسي
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ مَن رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ ٱلسَّبۡعِ وَرَبُّ ٱلۡعَرۡشِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah! "Siapakah Rabb langit yang tujuh dan Rabb Arasy yang besar") yakni Al Kursi

ar: سَیَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِۚ قُلۡ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ar_simple: سیقولون لله قل أفلا تتقون

t.sahih-int: They will say, "[They belong] to Allah." Say, "Then will you not fear Him
t.asad: [And] they will reply: “[All this power belongs] to God.” Say: “Will you not, then, remain conscious of Him?”
t.yusuf-ali: They will say, "(They belong) to Allah." Say: "Will ye not then be filled with awe
t.pickthall: They will say: Unto Allah (all that belongeth). Say: Will ye not then keep duty (unto Him)
t.arberry: They will say, 'God's.' Say: 'Will you not then be godfearing
t.hilali-khan: They will say: "Allah." Say: "Will you not then fear Allah (believe in His Oneness, obey Him, believe in the Resurrection and Recompense for each and every good or bad deed)
t.itani: They will say, “To God.” Say, “Will you not become righteous?”
t.mubarakpuri: They will say: "Allah." Say: "Will you not then have Taqwa"
t.qarib: They will say, "[They belong] to God." Say, "Then will you not be mindful
t.wahiduddin: They will say, "They belong to God." Say, "So do you not fear Him
t.shakir: They will say: (This is) Allah's. Say: Will you not then guard (against evil)
t.haleem: and they will reply, ‘God.’ Say, ‘Will you not be mindful?’
t.maariful: They will say, “(All this belongs) to Allah”. Say, “Would you still not fear Allah?”
t.khattab: They will reply, “Allah.” Say, “Will you not then fear ˹Him˺?”
t.ghali: They will say, "To Allah (all that belongs)." Say, "Will you not then be pious
t.irving: They will say: "They are God´s." SAY: "Will you do not your duty [by Him]
t.iwq: They will say, "They belong to Allah." Say, "Then will you not fear Him

t_id.kemenag: Mereka akan menjawab: "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah: "Maka apakah kamu tidak bertakwa?"
t_id.sabiq: Mereka tentu akan menyatakan bahwa pemiliknya adalah Allah Swt. Kalau begitu, katakan kepada mereka, "Tidakkah kalian takut akibat menyekutukan dan mendurhakai Tuhan Pencipta itu semua?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka akan menjawab, "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah! "Apakah kalian tidak bertakwa?") tidak takut bila kalian menyembah selain-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Mereka akan menjawab: "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah: "Maka apakah kamu tidak bertakwa?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «سيقولون الله قل أفلا تتقون» تحذرون عبادة غيره
tafsir.siraj-ar: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِۚ قُلۡ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka akan menjawab, "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah! "Apakah kalian tidak bertakwa?") tidak takut bila kalian menyembah selain-Nya

ar: قُلۡ مَنۢ بِیَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَیۡءࣲ وَهُوَ یُجِیرُ وَلَا یُجَارُ عَلَیۡهِ إِن كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
ar_simple: قل من بیده ملكوت كل شیء وهو یجیر ولا یجار علیه إن كنتم تعلمون

t.sahih-int: Say, "In whose hand is the realm of all things - and He protects while none can protect against Him - if you should know
t.asad: Say: “In whose hand rests the mighty dominion over all things, and who is it that protects, the while there is no protection against Him? [Tell me this] if you happen to know [the answer]!”
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "Who is it in whose hands is the governance of all things,- who protects (all), but is not protected (of any)? (say) if ye know
t.pickthall: Say: In Whose hand is the dominion over all things and He protecteth, while against Him there is no protection, if ye have knowledge
t.arberry: Say: 'In whose hand is the dominion of everything, protecting and Himself unprotected, if you have knowledge
t.hilali-khan: Say "In Whose Hand is the sovereignty of everything (i.e. treasures of each and everything)? And He protects (all), while against Whom there is no protector, (i.e. if Allah saves anyone none can punish or harm him, and if Allah punishes or harms anyone none can save him), if you know." [Tafsir Al-Qurtubi, Vol. 12, Page]
t.itani: Say, “In whose hand is the dominion of all things, and He protects and cannot be protected from, if you happen to know?”
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "In Whose Hand is the sovereignty of everything And He protects, while against Whom there is no protector, if you know"
t.qarib: Say, "In whose hand is the dominion over all things. Who protects, while none can protect against Him, if you happen to know
t.wahiduddin: Say, "In whose hands lies sovereignty over all things, protecting all, while none can seek protection against Him? Tell me, if you have any knowledge
t.shakir: Say: Who is it in Whose hand is the kingdom of all things and Who gives succor, but against Him Succor is not given, if you do but know
t.haleem: Say, ‘Who holds control of everything in His hand? Who protects, while there is no protection against Him, if you know [so much]?’
t.maariful: Say, “Who is the One in whose hand lies the kingdom of every thing and who gives protection, and no protection can be given against him, if you have knowledge?”
t.khattab: Ask ˹them also,˺ “In Whose Hands is the authority over all things, protecting ˹all˺ while none can protect against Him, if you ˹really˺ know?”
t.ghali: Say, "In whose hand is the dominion of everything, and He gives neighborly (protection), and He is not given neighborly (protection by anyone), in case you know
t.irving: SAY: "In Whose hand lies sovereignty over everything? He protects, while against Him there is no protection, if you but realized it
t.iwq: Say, "In whose hand is the realm of all things - and He protects while none can protect against Him - if you should know

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Siapakah yang di tangan-Nya berada kekuasaan atas segala sesuatu sedang Dia melindungi, tetapi tidak ada yang dapat dilindungi dari (azab)-Nya, jika kamu mengetahui?"
t_id.sabiq: Katakan pula, "Siapakah gerangan yang memiliki segala sesuatu, yang memiliki kekuasaan penuh atas segala sesuatu, yang melindungi siapa saja yang dikehendaki-Nya dengan kekuasaan-Nya dan Tuhan yang siksa-Nya kepada seseorang tidak dapat dihalangi oleh siapa pun? Kalau kalian mengetahui jawabannya, jawablah pertanyaanku ini!"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah! "Siapakah yang di tangan-Nya berada kekuasaan) yakni merajai (segala sesuatu) lafal Malakuut huruf Ta yang ada padanya menunjukkan makna Mubalaghah, yakni kekuasaan di atas segala kekuasaan (sedangkan Dia melindungi dan tidak membutuhkan perlindungan) Dia melindungi dan tidak memerlukan perlindungan (jika kalian mengetahui?")
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Siapakah yang di tangan-Nya berada kekuasaan atas segala sesuatu sedang Dia melindungi, tetapi tidak ada yang dapat dilindungi dari (azab)-Nya, jika kamu mengetahui?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل من بيده ملكوت» ملك «كل شيء» والتاء للمبالغة «وهو يُجير ولا يُجار عليه» يَحمي ولا يُحمى عليه «إن كنتم تعلمون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ مَنۢ بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ وَهُوَ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيۡهِ إِن كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ (يُجِيرُ: يَحْمِي وَيُغِيثُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ, وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ: لَا يُغَاثُ أَحَدٌ وَيُحْمَى مِنْهُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah! "Siapakah yang di tangan-Nya berada kekuasaan) yakni merajai (segala sesuatu) lafal Malakuut huruf Ta yang ada padanya menunjukkan makna Mubalaghah, yakni kekuasaan di atas segala kekuasaan (sedangkan Dia melindungi dan tidak membutuhkan perlindungan) Dia melindungi dan tidak memerlukan perlindungan (jika kalian mengetahui)

ar: سَیَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِۚ قُلۡ فَأَنَّىٰ تُسۡحَرُونَ
ar_simple: سیقولون لله قل فأنى تسحرون

t.sahih-int: They will say, "[All belongs] to Allah." Say, "Then how are you deluded
t.asad: [And] they will reply: “[All this power belongs] to God.” Say: ‘How, then, can you be so deluded?”
t.yusuf-ali: They will say, "(It belongs) to Allah." Say: "Then how are ye deluded
t.pickthall: They will say: Unto Allah (all that belongeth). Say: How then are ye bewitched
t.arberry: They will say, 'God's.' Say: 'How then are you bewitched
t.hilali-khan: They will say: "(All that belongs) to Allah." Say: "How then are you deceived and turn away from the truth
t.itani: They will say, “To God.” Say, “Then are you bewitched?”
t.mubarakpuri: They will say: "(All that belongs) to Allah." Say: "How then are you deceived and turn away from the truth"
t.qarib: They will say, "[All belongs] to God." Say, "Then how can you be so mislead
t.wahiduddin: They will say, "All this belongs to God." Say to them, "How are you then deluded
t.shakir: They will say: (This is) Allah's. Say: From whence are you then deceived
t.haleem: and they will reply, ‘God.’ Say, ‘Then how can you be so deluded?’
t.maariful: They will say, “(All this belongs) to Allah.” Say, “Then by which magic are you drawn crazy?”
t.khattab: They will reply, “Allah.” Say, “How are you then so deluded?”
t.ghali: They will say, "To Allah (all that belongs)." Say, "However then are you bewitched
t.irving: They will say: "It is in God´s." SAY: "How is it you act so bewildered?"´
t.iwq: They will say, "All belongs to Allah." Say, "Then how are you deluded

t_id.kemenag: Mereka akan menjawab: "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah: "(Kalau demikian), maka dari jalan manakah kamu ditipu?"
t_id.sabiq: Mereka akan menyatakan, "Allah." Kalau begitu, katakan kepada mereka, "Lalu mengapa kalian tertipu oleh keinginan hawa nafsu dan oleh bujukan setan, lalu tidak taat kepada Allah?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka akan menjawab, "Kepunyaan Allah") menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Allah, baik dalam ayat ini maupun dalam ayat sebelumnya. Demikian itu karena makna yang dimaksud adalah, kepunyaan siapakah hal-hal yang telah disebutkan itu (Katakanlah! "Kalau demikian maka dari jalan manakah kalian merasa ditipu?") ditipu dan dikelabui dari perkara yang hak, yaitu menyembah Allah semata. Maksudnya, bagaimanakah bisa terbayangkan dalam benak kalian bahwasanya hal ini batil?
t_id.iwq: Mereka akan menjawab: "Kepunyaan Allah". Katakanlah: "(Kalau demikian), maka dari jalan manakah kamu ditipu?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «سيقولون لله» وفي قراءة بلام الجر في الموضعين نظرا إلى أن المعنى من له ما ذكر «قل فأنى تسحرون» تخدعون وتصرفون عن الحق عبادة الله وحده أي كيف تخيل لكم أنه باطل
tafsir.siraj-ar: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِۚ قُلۡ فَأَنَّىٰ تُسۡحَرُونَ (فَأَنَّى تُسْحَرُونَ: فَكَيْفَ تَذْهَبُ عُقُولُكُمْ وَتُخْدَعُونَ عَنْ تَوْحِيدِهِ؟)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka akan menjawab, "Kepunyaan Allah") menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Allah, baik dalam ayat ini maupun dalam ayat sebelumnya. Demikian itu karena makna yang dimaksud adalah, kepunyaan siapakah hal-hal yang telah disebutkan itu (Katakanlah! "Kalau demikian maka dari jalan manakah kalian merasa ditipu?") ditipu dan dikelabui dari perkara yang hak, yaitu menyembah Allah semata. Maksudnya, bagaimanakah bisa terbayangkan dalam benak kalian bahwasanya hal ini batil

ar: بَلۡ أَتَیۡنَـٰهُم بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَإِنَّهُمۡ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
ar_simple: بل أتینهم بٱلحق وإنهم لكذبون

t.sahih-int: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and indeed they are liars
t.asad: Nay, We have conveyed unto them the truth: and yet, behold, they are intent on lying [to themselves]
t.yusuf-ali: We have sent them the Truth: but they indeed practise falsehood
t.pickthall: Nay, but We have brought them the Truth, and lo! they are liars
t.arberry: Nay, but We brought them the truth and they are truly liars
t.hilali-khan: Nay, but We have brought them the truth (Islamic Monotheism), and verily, they (disbelievers) are liars
t.itani: In fact, We have given them the truth, and they are liars.
t.mubarakpuri: Nay, but We have brought them the truth, and verily, they are liars.
t.qarib: In fact, We have sent them the Truth, but they lie
t.wahiduddin: We have revealed to them the truth. But they are certainly liars
t.shakir: Nay! We have brought to them the truth, and most surely they are liars
t.haleem: The fact is, We brought them the truth and they are lying
t.maariful: The fact is that We have brought to them The Truth, and they are absolute liars
t.khattab: In fact, We have brought them the truth, and they are certainly liars
t.ghali: No indeed, (but) We have come up to them with (i.e., because) the Truth, and surely they are indeed liars
t.irving: Rather We have brought them the Truth while they deny it
t.iwq: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and verily they are liars

t_id.kemenag: Sebenarnya Kami telah membawa kebenaran kepada mereka, dan sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar orang-orang yang berdusta.
t_id.sabiq: Sungguh, Kami telah menerangkan kebenaran kepada mereka melalui rasul-rasul utusan Kami. orang-orang kafir itu sungguh bohong belaka dalam segala hal yang bertentangan dengan kebenaran itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sebenarnya Kami telah membawa kebenaran kepada mereka) dengan sesungguhnya (dan sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar orang-orang yang berdusta) sewaktu mereka menentang kebenaran itu; kebenaran tersebut adalah,
t_id.iwq: Sebenarnya Kami telah membawa kebenaran kepada mereka, dan sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar orang-orang yang berdusta.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «بل آتيناهم بالحق» بالصدق «وإنهم لكذبون» في نفيه وهو
tafsir.siraj-ar: بَلۡ أَتَيۡنَٰهُم بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَإِنَّهُمۡ لَكَٰذِبُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sebenarnya Kami telah membawa kebenaran kepada mereka) dengan sesungguhnya (dan sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar orang-orang yang berdusta) sewaktu mereka menentang kebenaran itu; kebenaran tersebut adalah

ar: مَا ٱتَّخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِن وَلَدࣲ وَمَا كَانَ مَعَهُۥ مِنۡ إِلَـٰهٍۚ إِذࣰا لَّذَهَبَ كُلُّ إِلَـٰهِۭ بِمَا خَلَقَ وَلَعَلَا بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲۚ سُبۡحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا یَصِفُونَ
ar_simple: ما ٱتخذ ٱلله من ولد وما كان معه من إله إذا لذهب كل إله بما خلق ولعلا بعضهم على بعض سبحن ٱلله عما یصفون

t.sahih-int: Allah has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. [If there had been], then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have sought to overcome others. Exalted is Allah above what they describe [concerning Him]
t.asad: Never did God take unto Himself any offspring, nor has there ever been any deity side by side with Him: [for, had there been any,] lo! each deity would surely have stood apart [from the others] in whatever it had created, and they would surely have [tried to] overcome one another! Limitless in His glory is God, [far] above anything that men may devise by way of definition
t.yusuf-ali: No son did Allah beget, nor is there any god along with Him: (if there were many gods), behold, each god would have taken away what he had created, and some would have lorded it over others! Glory to Allah! (He is free) from the (sort of) things they attribute to Him
t.pickthall: Allah hath not chosen any son, nor is there any god along with Him; else would each god have assuredly championed that which he created, and some of them would assuredly have overcome others. Glorified be Allah above all that they allege
t.arberry: God has not taken to Himself any son, nor is there any god with Him; for then each god would have taken off that he created and some of them would have risen up over others; glory to be God, beyond that they describe
t.hilali-khan: No son (or offspring or children) did Allah beget, nor is there any ilah (god) along with Him; (if there had been many gods), behold, each god would have taken away what he had created, and some would have tried to overcome others! Glorified be Allah above all that they attribute to Him
t.itani: God has never begotten a son, nor is there any god besides Him. Otherwise, each god would have taken away what it has created, and some of them would have gained supremacy over others. Glory be to God, far beyond what they describe.
t.mubarakpuri: No son (or offspring) did Allah beget, nor is there any god along with Him. (If there had been many gods), then each god would have taken away what he had created, and some would have tried to overcome others! Glorified be Allah above all that they attribute to Him!
t.qarib: God has not taken any son, nor has there ever been any other god but Him. [Had there been], then each god would have taken aside what it created, and sought to overcome the others. May God be exalted in His glory, far above what they ascribed to Him
t.wahiduddin: God has not taken to Himself a son, nor is there any other deity besides Him; otherwise, each god would have walked away with what he had created. They would surely have tried to overcome one another. Glory be to God, above all that they ascribe to Him
t.shakir: Never did Allah take to Himself a son, and never was there with him any (other) god-- in that case would each god have certainly taken away what he created, and some of them would certainly have overpowered others; glory be to Allah above what they describe
t.haleem: God has never had a child. Nor is there any god beside Him- if there were, each god would have taken his creation aside and tried to overcome the others. May God be exalted above what they describe
t.maariful: Allah has not taken a son to Himself, nor was there any god with Him. Had there been so, every god would have taken away what he created, and each one of them would have been aggressive against the other. Pure is Allah from what they describe
t.khattab: Allah has never had ˹any˺ offspring, nor is there any god besides Him. Otherwise, each god would have taken away what he created, and they would have tried to dominate one another. Glorified is Allah above what they claim
t.ghali: In no way has Allah taken to Him any child, and in no way has there been with Him any god. Lo, for that each god would indeed have gone away with whatever he created, and some of them would indeed have exalted themselves over others. (Literally: over some (others) All Extolment be to Allah over whatever they describe
t.irving: God has not adopted any son, nor is there any [other] deity alongside Him, otherwise each god would carry off whatever it has created, and some of them would gain the upper hand over others. Glory be to God beyond what they describe
t.iwq: Allah has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. If there had been, then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have sought to overcome others. Exalted is Allah above what they describe concerning Him

t_id.kemenag: Allah sekali-kali tidak mempunyai anak, dan sekali-kali tidak ada tuhan (yang lain) beserta-Nya, kalau ada tuhan beserta-Nya, masing-masing tuhan itu akan membawa makhluk yang diciptakannya, dan sebagian dari tuhan-tuhan itu akan mengalahkan sebagian yang lain. Maha Suci Allah dari apa yang mereka sifatkan itu,
t_id.sabiq: Allah tidak mempunyai anak. Dia Mahasuci dari hal yang demikian. Allah juga tidak mempunyai sekutu. Sebab, kalau Dia mempunyai sekutu, tentu masing-masing tuhan itu akan menguasai dan memiliki ciptaannya sendiri-sendiri. Akibatnya, satu sama lain akan saling bertikai seperti yang terjadi di antara para raja. Akibatnya lagi, alam raya akan mengalami kerusakan. Maka, sungguh Allah Mahasuci dari apa yang dikatakan orang-orang musyrik yang menentang kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah sekali-kali tidak mempunyai anak, dan sekali-kali tidak ada tuhan yang lain beserta-Nya, kalau ada tuhan beserta-Nya) jika ada tuhan lain di samping Dia (masing-masing tuhan itu akan membawa makhluk yang diciptakannya) yang menguasai makhluknya sendiri dan mempertahankannya dari makhluk tuhan yang lain (dan sebagian dari tuhan-tuhan itu akan mengalahkan sebagian yang lain) sebagian di antara mereka berupaya untuk mengalahkan sebagian yang lain sebagaimana apa yang biasa dilakukan oleh raja-raja di dunia. (Maha Suci Allah) lafal Subhaanallaah ini berarti mensucikan Dia (dari apa yang mereka sifatkan) kepada-Nya, seperti apa yang telah disebutkan tadi.
t_id.iwq: Allah sekali-kali tidak mempunyai anak, dan sekali-kali tidak ada tuhan (yang lain) beserta-Nya, kalau ada tuhan beserta-Nya, masing-masing tuhan itu akan membawa makhluk yang diciptakannya, dan sebagian dari tuhan-tuhan itu akan mengalahkan sebagian yang lain. Maha Suci Allah dari apa yang mereka sifatkan itu,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ما اتخذ الله من ولد وما كان معه من إله إذاً» أي لو كان معه إله «لذهب كل إله بما خلق» انفرد به ومنع الآخر من الاستيلاء عليه «ولعلا بعضهم على بعض» مغالبة كفعل ملوك الدنيا «سبحان الله» تنزيهاً له «عما يصفونـ» ـه به مما ذكر
tafsir.siraj-ar: مَا ٱتَّخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِن وَلَدٖ وَمَا كَانَ مَعَهُۥ مِنۡ إِلَٰهٍۚ إِذٗا لَّذَهَبَ كُلُّ إِلَٰهِۭ بِمَا خَلَقَ وَلَعَلَا بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖۚ سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ (وَلَعَلَا: لَغَالَبَ وَطَلَبَ العُلُوَّ, عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ: عَنْ وَصْفِهِمْ إِيَّاهُ بِالشَّرِيكِ، وَالوَلَدِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allah sekali-kali tidak mempunyai anak, dan sekali-kali tidak ada tuhan yang lain beserta-Nya, kalau ada tuhan beserta-Nya) jika ada tuhan lain di samping Dia (masing-masing tuhan itu akan membawa makhluk yang diciptakannya) yang menguasai makhluknya sendiri dan mempertahankannya dari makhluk tuhan yang lain (dan sebagian dari tuhan-tuhan itu akan mengalahkan sebagian yang lain) sebagian di antara mereka berupaya untuk mengalahkan sebagian yang lain sebagaimana apa yang biasa dilakukan oleh raja-raja di dunia. (Maha Suci Allah) lafal Subhaanallaah ini berarti mensucikan Dia (dari apa yang mereka sifatkan) kepada-Nya, seperti apa yang telah disebutkan tadi

ar: عَـٰلِمِ ٱلۡغَیۡبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَتَعَـٰلَىٰ عَمَّا یُشۡرِكُونَ
ar_simple: علم ٱلغیب وٱلشهدة فتعلى عما یشركون

t.sahih-int: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, so high is He above what they associate [with Him]
t.asad: knowing all that is beyond the reach of a created being’s perception as well as all that can be witnessed by a creature’s senses or mind and, hence, sublimely exalted is He above anything to which they may ascribe a share in His divinity
t.yusuf-ali: He knows what is hidden and what is open: too high is He for the partners they attribute to Him
t.pickthall: Knower of the Invisible and the Visible! and Exalted be He over all that they ascribe as partners (unto Him)
t.arberry: who has knowledge of the Unseen and the Visible; high exalted be He, above that they associate
t.hilali-khan: All-Knower of the unseen and the seen! Exalted be He over all that they associate as partners to Him
t.itani: The Knower of the hidden and the manifest. He is exalted, far above what they associate.
t.mubarakpuri: All-Knower of the unseen and the seen! Exalted be He over all that they associate as partners to Him!
t.qarib: The Knower of all that is beyond human's perception, as well as all that can be witnessed by humans. May He be exalted above all whom they associate with Him
t.wahiduddin: Knower of the unseen and the visible; He is exalted above all that which they associate with Him
t.shakir: The Knower of the unseen and the seen, so may He be exalted above what they associate (with Him)
t.haleem: He knows what is not seen as well as what is seen; He is far above any partner they claim for Him
t.maariful: He is the Knower of the hidden and the manifest. So, He is far higher than their ascribing of partners to Him
t.khattab: ˹He is the˺ Knower of the seen and unseen. Exalted is He above what they associate ˹with Him˺
t.ghali: The Knower of the Unseen and the Witnessed; so Supremely Exalted be He above whatever they associate (with Him)
t.irving: Knower of the Unseen and the Visible: Exalted is He over anything they may associate [with Him]
t.iwq: He is Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, so high is He above what they associate with Him

t_id.kemenag: Yang mengetahui semua yang ghaib dan semua yang nampak, maka Maha Tinggilah Dia dari apa yang mereka persekutukan.
t_id.sabiq: Allah mengetahui segala sesuatu dengan ilmu-Nya. Dia mengetahui apa yang tampak dan tidak tampak oleh kita. Maka, sungguh Allah Mahasuci dari kemungkinan memiliki sekutu, seperti yang dikatakan oleh orang-orang kafir.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yang mengetahui semua yang gaib dan semua yang tampak) maksudnya semua yang tidak tampak dan semua yang tampak. Kalau dibaca 'Aalimil Ghaibi menjadi sifat, artinya yang mengetahui dan seterusnya. Jika dibaca 'Aalimul Ghaibi berarti menjadi Khabar dari Mubtada yang tidak disebutkan yaitu lafal Huwa, artinya Dia Mengetahui yang gaib (maka Maha Tinggi Dia) Maha Besar Dia (dari apa yang mereka persekutukan) kepada-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Yang mengetahui semua yang ghaib dan semua yang nampak, maka Maha Tinggilah Dia dari apa yang mereka persekutukan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «عالم الغيب والشهادة» ما غاب وما شوهد بالجر صفة والرفع خبر هو مقدرا «فتعالى» تعظم «عما يشركونـ» ـه معه
tafsir.siraj-ar: عَٰلِمِ ٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَٱلشَّهَٰدَةِ فَتَعَٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yang mengetahui semua yang gaib dan semua yang tampak) maksudnya semua yang tidak tampak dan semua yang tampak. Kalau dibaca 'Aalimil Ghaibi menjadi sifat, artinya yang mengetahui dan seterusnya. Jika dibaca 'Aalimul Ghaibi berarti menjadi Khabar dari Mubtada yang tidak disebutkan yaitu lafal Huwa, artinya Dia Mengetahui yang gaib (maka Maha Tinggi Dia) Maha Besar Dia (dari apa yang mereka persekutukan) kepada-Nya

ar: قُل رَّبِّ إِمَّا تُرِیَنِّی مَا یُوعَدُونَ
ar_simple: قل رب إما ترینی ما یوعدون

t.sahih-int: Say, [O Muhammad], "My Lord, if You should show me that which they are promised
t.asad: SAY: “O my Sustainer! If it be Thy will to let me witness [the fulfillment of] whatever they [who blaspheme against Thee] have been promised [to suffer] –
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "O my Lord! if Thou wilt show me (in my lifetime) that which they are warned against
t.pickthall: Say: My Lord! If Thou shouldst show me that which they are promised
t.arberry: Say: 'O my Lord, if Thou shouldst show me that they are promised
t.hilali-khan: Say (O Muhammad SAW): " My Lord! If You would show me that with which they are threatened (torment)
t.itani: Say, “My Lord, if You would show me what they are promised.
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "My Lord! If You would show me that with which they are threatened, "
t.qarib: Say, "My Lord, if You are going to show me what you have promised them
t.wahiduddin: Pray, "Lord, if you would show me that [the punishment] of which they have been warned
t.shakir: Say: O my Lord! if Thou shouldst make me see what they are threatened with
t.haleem: Say, ‘Lord, if You are going to show me the punishment You have promised them
t.maariful: (O prophet) say (in prayer), “O my Lord, if You are to show me (in my life) that (punishment) which they (the infidels) are threatened with
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “My Lord! Should You show me what they are threatened with
t.ghali: Say, "Lord, in case You ever definitely show me what they are promised
t.irving: SAY: "My Lord, will you show me what they are threatened with
t.iwq: Say, O Muhammad, "My Lord, if You should show me that which they are promised

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku, jika Engkau sungguh-sungguh hendak memperlihatkan kepadaku azab yang diancamkan kepada mereka,
t_id.sabiq: Katakan, wahai Rasulullah, "Ya Tuhanku, jika Engkau menurunkan siksa di dunia seperti telah Engkau janjikan, padahal aku berada di tengah-tengah mereka,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah! "Ya Rabbku! Jika) lafal Imma pada asalnya terdiri daripada gabungan antara In Syarthiyyah dan Ma Zaidah (Engkau sungguh-sungguh hendak memperlihatkan kepadaku apa yang diancamkan kepada mereka) berupa azab, hal ini benar-benar terjadi dalam perang Badar, yaitu banyak dari kalangan orang-orang musyrik yang mati terbunuh.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku, jika Engkau sungguh-sungguh hendak memperlihatkan kepadaku azab yang diancamkan kepada mereka,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل رب إما» فيه إدغام إن الشرطية في الزائدة «ترينّي ما يوعدونـ» ـه من العذاب هو صادق بالقتل ببدر
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُل رَّبِّ إِمَّا تُرِيَنِّي مَا يُوعَدُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah! "Ya Rabbku! Jika) lafal Imma pada asalnya terdiri daripada gabungan antara In Syarthiyyah dan Ma Zaidah (Engkau sungguh-sungguh hendak memperlihatkan kepadaku apa yang diancamkan kepada mereka) berupa azab, hal ini benar-benar terjadi dalam perang Badar, yaitu banyak dari kalangan orang-orang musyrik yang mati terbunuh

ar: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجۡعَلۡنِی فِی ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِینَ
ar_simple: رب فلا تجعلنی فی ٱلقوم ٱلظلمین

t.sahih-int: My Lord, then do not place me among the wrongdoing people
t.asad: do not, O my Sustainer, let me be one of those evildoing folk!”
t.yusuf-ali: Then, O my Lord! put me not amongst the people who do wrong
t.pickthall: My Lord! then set me not among the wrongdoing folk
t.arberry: O my Lord, put me not among the people of the evildoers
t.hilali-khan: My Lord! Then (save me from Your Punishment), and put me not amongst the people who are the Zalimun (polytheists and wrong-doing)
t.itani: My Lord, do not place me among the wicked people.”
t.mubarakpuri: "My Lord! Then, put me not amongst the people who are the wrongdoers."
t.qarib: then, My Lord, do not place me among such unjust people
t.wahiduddin: then do not place me, Lord, with the wrongdoers
t.shakir: My Lord! then place me not with the unjust
t.haleem: then Lord, do not include me among the evildoers!’
t.maariful: then, my Lord, do not place me among the wrongdoing people.”
t.khattab: then, my Lord, do not count me among the wrongdoing people.”
t.ghali: Lord, then do not make me among the unjust people
t.irving: My Lord, do not place me among such wrongdoing folk
t.iwq: My Lord, then do not place me among wrongdoing people

t_id.kemenag: ya Tuhanku, maka janganlah Engkau jadikan aku berada di antara orang-orang yang zalim".
t_id.sabiq: maka aku mohon kepada-Mu agar Engkau tidak menyiksaku bersama orang-orang kafir yang melampuai batas itu."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabbku! Maka janganlah Engkau jadikan aku berada di antara orang-orang yang zalim.") karena aku pun nanti akan binasa pula bersama dengan mereka.
t_id.iwq: ya Tuhanku, maka janganlah Engkau jadikan aku berada di antara orang-orang yang zalim".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «رب فلا تجعلني في القوم الظالمين» فأهلك بإهلاكهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجۡعَلۡنِي فِي ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabbku! Maka janganlah Engkau jadikan aku berada di antara orang-orang yang zalim.") karena aku pun nanti akan binasa pula bersama dengan mereka

ar: وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰۤ أَن نُّرِیَكَ مَا نَعِدُهُمۡ لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
ar_simple: وإنا على أن نریك ما نعدهم لقدرون

t.sahih-int: And indeed, We are able to show you what We have promised them
t.asad: [Pray thus] for, behold, We are most certainly able to let thee witness [the fulfillment, even in this world, of] whatever We promise them
t.yusuf-ali: And We are certainly able to show thee (in fulfilment) that against which they are warned
t.pickthall: And verily We are Able to show thee that which We have promised them
t.arberry: Assuredly, We are able to show thee that We promise them
t.hilali-khan: And indeed We are Able to show you (O Muhammad SAW) that with which We have threatened them
t.itani: We are surely Able to show you what We promise them.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed We are able to show you that with which We have threatened them.
t.qarib: We are surely able to show you what We have promised them
t.wahiduddin: We certainly have the power to show you what they have been warned about
t.shakir: And most surely We are well able to make you see what We threaten them with
t.haleem: We certainly are able to show you the punishment We have promised them
t.maariful: And of course, We do have the power to show you that with which We have threatened them
t.khattab: We are indeed able to show you what We have threatened them with
t.ghali: And surely We are indeed the Determiners over showing you (i.e., the Prophet) whatever We promise them
t.irving: We are Able indeed to show you whatever We are threatening them with
t.iwq: And verily, We are able to show you what We have promised them

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Kami benar-benar kuasa untuk memperlihatkan kepadamu apa yang Kami ancamkan kepada mereka.
t_id.sabiq: Kami sungguh Mahakuasa dan mampu untuk memperlihatkan kepadamu siksa yang telah Kami janjikan kepada mereka. Oleh karena itu, kamu tidak perlu risau dan tenanglah dengan pertolongan Kami.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami benar-benar kuasa untuk memperlihatkan kepadamu apa yang Kami ancamkan kepada mereka).
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Kami benar-benar kuasa untuk memperlihatkan kepadamu apa yang Kami ancamkan kepada mereka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإنا على أن نريك ما نعدهم لقادرون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّرِيَكَ مَا نَعِدُهُمۡ لَقَٰدِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan sesungguhnya Kami benar-benar kuasa untuk memperlihatkan kepadamu apa yang Kami ancamkan kepada mereka

ar: ٱدۡفَعۡ بِٱلَّتِی هِیَ أَحۡسَنُ ٱلسَّیِّئَةَۚ نَحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا یَصِفُونَ
ar_simple: ٱدفع بٱلتی هی أحسن ٱلسیئة نحن أعلم بما یصفون

t.sahih-int: Repel, by [means of] what is best, [their] evil. We are most knowing of what they describe
t.asad: [But whatever they may say or do,] repel the evil [which they commit] with something that is better: We are fully aware of what they attribute [to Us]
t.yusuf-ali: Repel evil with that which is best: We are well acquainted with the things they say
t.pickthall: Repel evil with that which is better. We are Best Aware of that which they allege
t.arberry: Repel thou the evil with that which is fairer. We Ourselves know very well that they describe
t.hilali-khan: Repel evil with that which is better. We are Best-Acquainted with the things they utter
t.itani: Repel evil by what is better. We are aware of what they describe.
t.mubarakpuri: Repel evil with that which is better. We are best-acquainted with the things they utter.
t.qarib: Overcome evil with good- We are well aware of what they are saying
t.wahiduddin: Repel evil with what is best, We are well aware of the things they say
t.shakir: Repel evil by what is best; We know best what they describe
t.haleem: Repel evil with good- We are well aware of what they attribute to Us
t.maariful: Repel evil with that which is best. We are well aware of what they describe
t.khattab: Respond to evil with what is best. We know well what they claim
t.ghali: Repel the odious (act) with that which is fairest. We, Ever We, know best whatever they describe
t.irving: Repay evil with something that is finer; We are quite Aware of anything they describe
t.iwq: Repel, by means of what is best, their evil. We are most knowing of what they describe

t_id.kemenag: Tolaklah perbuatan buruk mereka dengan yang lebih baik. Kami lebih mengetahui apa yang mereka sifatkan.
t_id.sabiq: Lanjutkanlah dakwahmu. Hadapilah perlakuan buruk mereka dengan tindakan yang lebik baik seperti memaafkan dan sebagainya. Kami pun sungguh sangat mengetahui keburukan-keburukan yang mereka katakan tentang dirimu dan tentang dakwahmu. Kami akan membalas mereka atas perbuatannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tolaklah dengan menampilkan hal yang lebih baik) yaitu budi pekerti yang baik, bersikap lapang dada dan berpaling dari mereka yang kafir (hal yang buruk itu) perlakuan mereka yang menyakitkan terhadap dirimu. Ayat ini diturunkan sebelum ada perintah untuk berperang. (Kami lebih mengetahui apa yang mereka sifatkan) kedustaan dan buat-buatan mereka, maka kelak Kami akan membalasnya kepada mereka.
t_id.iwq: Tolaklah perbuatan buruk mereka dengan yang lebih baik. Kami lebih mengetahui apa yang mereka sifatkan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أدفع بالتي هي أحسن» أي الخصلة من الصفح والإعراض عنهم «السيئة» أذاهم إياك وهذا قبل الأمر بالقتال «نحن أعلم بما يصفون» يكذبون ويقولون فنجازيهم عليه
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱدۡفَعۡ بِٱلَّتِي هِيَ أَحۡسَنُ ٱلسَّيِّئَةَۚ نَحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَصِفُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tolaklah dengan menampilkan hal yang lebih baik) yaitu budi pekerti yang baik, bersikap lapang dada dan berpaling dari mereka yang kafir (hal yang buruk itu) perlakuan mereka yang menyakitkan terhadap dirimu. Ayat ini diturunkan sebelum ada perintah untuk berperang. (Kami lebih mengetahui apa yang mereka sifatkan) kedustaan dan buat-buatan mereka, maka kelak Kami akan membalasnya kepada mereka

ar: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنۡ هَمَزَ ٰتِ ٱلشَّیَـٰطِینِ
ar_simple: وقل رب أعوذ بك من همز ت ٱلشیطین

t.sahih-int: And say, "My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils
t.asad: And say: “O my Sustainer! I seek refuge with Thee from the promptings of all evil impulses
t.yusuf-ali: And say "O my Lord! I seek refuge with Thee from the suggestions of the Evil Ones
t.pickthall: And say: My Lord! I seek refuge in Thee from suggestions of the evil ones
t.arberry: And say: 'O my Lord, I take refuge in Thee from the evil suggestions of the Satans
t.hilali-khan: And say: "My Lord! I seek refuge with You from the whisperings (suggestions) of the Shayatin (devils)
t.itani: And say, “My Lord, I seek refuge with You from the urgings of the devils.
t.mubarakpuri: And say: "My Lord! I seek refuge with You from the whisperings of the Shayatin."
t.qarib: And say, "My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils
t.wahiduddin: and say, "My Lord, I seek refuge with You from the prompting of the devils
t.shakir: And say: O my Lord! I seek refuge in Thee from the evil suggestions of the Shaitans
t.haleem: and say, ‘Lord, I take refuge with You from the goadings of the evil ones
t.maariful: And say, “My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the strokes of the satans (devils)
t.khattab: And say, “My Lord! I seek refuge in You from the temptations of the devils
t.ghali: And say, "Lord, I take refuge in You from the promptings of Ash-Shayatin, (The ever-vicious (ones), i.e., the devils
t.irving: SAY: "My Lord, I seek refuge with You from the devils promptings
t.iwq: And say, "My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils

t_id.kemenag: Dan katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku aku berlindung kepada Engkau dari bisikan-bisikan syaitan.
t_id.sabiq: Katakan, wahai Muhammad, "Ya Tuhan, aku berlindung kepada-Mu dari pengaruh godaan setan pada diriku dengan berbuat sesuatu yang tidak Engkau perkenankan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan katakanlah! "Ya Rabbku! Aku berlindung kepada Engkau) aku meminta perlindungan (dari bisikan-bisikan setan) dari kecenderungan-kecenderungan setan yang selalu setan embus-embuskan itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku aku berlindung kepada Engkau dari bisikan-bisikan syaitan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقل رب أعوذ» أعتصم «بك من همزات الشياطين» نزعاتهم بما يوسوسون به
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنۡ هَمَزَٰتِ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينِ (هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ: وَسَاوِسِهِمْ، وَنَزَغَاتِهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan katakanlah! "Ya Rabbku! Aku berlindung kepada Engkau) aku meminta perlindungan (dari bisikan-bisikan setan) dari kecenderungan-kecenderungan setan yang selalu setan embus-embuskan itu

ar: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَن یَحۡضُرُونِ
ar_simple: وأعوذ بك رب أن یحضرون

t.sahih-int: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me
t.asad: and I seek refuge with Thee, O my Sustainer, lest they come near unto me!’
t.yusuf-ali: And I seek refuge with Thee O my Lord! lest they should come near me
t.pickthall: And I seek refuge in Thee, my Lord, lest they be present with me
t.arberry: and I take refuge in Thee, O my Lord, lest they attend me
t.hilali-khan: And I seek refuge with You, My Lord! lest they may attend (or come near) me
t.itani: And I seek refuge with You, my Lord, lest they become present.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And I seek refuge with You, My Lord! lest they should come near me."
t.qarib: and I seek refuge in You, my Lord, so they may not come near me
t.wahiduddin: I seek refuge with You, Lord, lest they should come near me
t.shakir: And I seek refuge in Thee! O my Lord! from their presence
t.haleem: I seek refuge with you, Lord, so that they may not come near me.’
t.maariful: and I seek refuge in You, my Lord, even from their coming near me.”
t.khattab: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, that they ˹even˺ come near me.”
t.ghali: And I take refuge in You, Lord, that they should not be present with me
t.irving: I seek refuge with you, my Lord, lest they accompany me
t.iwq: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me

t_id.kemenag: Dan aku berlindung (pula) kepada Engkau ya Tuhanku, dari kedatangan mereka kepadaku".
t_id.sabiq: Aku berlindung pula kepada-Mu dari kehadiran mereka pada setiap perbuatanku, agar apa yang akau lakukan itu benar-benar murni hanya untuk-Mu."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan aku berlindung pula kepada Engkau, ya Rabbku, dari kedatangan setan-setan itu kepadaku") dalam perkara-perkaraku, karena sesungguhnya mereka datang hanya dengan membawa keburukan belaka.
t_id.iwq: Dan aku berlindung (pula) kepada Engkau ya Tuhanku, dari kedatangan mereka kepadaku".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأعوز بك رب أن يحضرون» في أموري لأنهم إنما يحضرون بسوء
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَن يَحۡضُرُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan aku berlindung pula kepada Engkau, ya Rabbku, dari kedatangan setan-setan itu kepadaku") dalam perkara-perkaraku, karena sesungguhnya mereka datang hanya dengan membawa keburukan belaka

ar: حَتَّىٰۤ إِذَا جَاۤءَ أَحَدَهُمُ ٱلۡمَوۡتُ قَالَ رَبِّ ٱرۡجِعُونِ
ar_simple: حتى إذا جاء أحدهم ٱلموت قال رب ٱرجعون

t.sahih-int: [For such is the state of the disbelievers], until, when death comes to one of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back
t.asad: [AS FOR THOSE who will not believe in the life to come, they go on lying to themselves] until, when death approaches any of them, he prays: “O my Sustainer! Let me return, let me return [to life]
t.yusuf-ali: (In Falsehood will they be) Until, when death comes to one of them, he says: "O my Lord! send me back (to life)
t.pickthall: Until, when death cometh unto one of them, he saith: My Lord! Send me back
t.arberry: Till, when death comes to one of them, he says, 'My Lord, return me
t.hilali-khan: Until, when death comes to one of them (those who join partners with Allah), he says: "My Lord! Send me back
t.itani: Until, when death comes to one of them, he says, “My Lord, send me back.
t.mubarakpuri: Until, when death comes to one of them, he says: "My Lord! Send me back,"
t.qarib: When death comes to one of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back
t.wahiduddin: When death comes to any of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back
t.shakir: Until when death overtakes one of them, he says: Send me back, my Lord, send me back
t.haleem: When death comes to one of them, he cries, ‘My Lord, let me return
t.maariful: (The infidels go on doing their misdeeds) until when death comes to one of them, he will say, “My Lord send me back
t.khattab: When death approaches any of them, they cry, “My Lord! Let me go back
t.ghali: Until, when death comes to one of them, he says, " Lord! Return (The pronoun (attached to the verb) is plural; i.e., let the angels return me) me
t.irving: since whenever death comes to any one of them, he says: "My Lord, send me back
t.iwq: For such is the state of the disbelievers, until, when death comes to one of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back

t_id.kemenag: (Demikianlah keadaan orang-orang kafir itu), hingga apabila datang kematian kepada seseorang dari mereka, dia berkata: "Ya Tuhanku kembalikanlah aku (ke dunia),
t_id.sabiq: Mereka akan tetap pada sikap mendustakannya. Sehingga, apabila waktu kematian telah menjemput salah seorang di anatara mereka, ia pun menyatakan penyesalannya dengan berkata, "Ya Tuhan, kembalikanlah aku ke dunia.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sehingga) lafal Hattaa menunjukkan makna Ibtida atau permulaan (apabila datang kematian kepada seseorang dari mereka) kemudian ia melihat kedudukannya di neraka dan di surga seandainya ia beriman (dia berkata, "Ya Rabbku! Kembalikanlah aku) ke dunia. Ungkapan Jamak pada lafal Irji'uuni mengandung makna Ta'zhim atau mengagungkan.
t_id.iwq: (Demikianlah keadaan orang-orang kafir itu), hingga apabila datang kematian kepada seseorang dari mereka, dia berkata: "Ya Tuhanku kembalikanlah aku (ke dunia),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «حتى» ابتدائية «إذا جاء أحدهم الموت» ورأى مقعده من النار ومقعده من الجنة لو آمن «قال رب ارجعون» الجمع للتعظيم
tafsir.siraj-ar: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ أَحَدَهُمُ ٱلۡمَوۡتُ قَالَ رَبِّ ٱرۡجِعُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sehingga) lafal Hattaa menunjukkan makna Ibtida atau permulaan (apabila datang kematian kepada seseorang dari mereka) kemudian ia melihat kedudukannya di neraka dan di surga seandainya ia beriman (dia berkata, "Ya Rabbku! Kembalikanlah aku) ke dunia. Ungkapan Jamak pada lafal Irji'uuni mengandung makna Ta'zhim atau mengagungkan

ar: لَعَلِّیۤ أَعۡمَلُ صَـٰلِحࣰا فِیمَا تَرَكۡتُۚ كَلَّاۤۚ إِنَّهَا كَلِمَةٌ هُوَ قَاۤئِلُهَاۖ وَمِن وَرَاۤئِهِم بَرۡزَخٌ إِلَىٰ یَوۡمِ یُبۡعَثُونَ
ar_simple: لعلی أعمل صلحا فیما تركت كلا إنها كلمة هو قائلها ومن ورائهم برزخ إلى یوم یبعثون

t.sahih-int: That I might do righteousness in that which I left behind." No! It is only a word he is saying; and behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected
t.asad: so that I might act righteously in whatever I have failed [aforetime]!” Nay, it is indeed but a [meaningless] word that he utters: for behind those [who leave the world] there is a barrier [of death] until the Day when all will be raised from the dead
t.yusuf-ali: In order that I may work righteousness in the things I neglected." - "By no means! It is but a word he says."- Before them is a Partition till the Day they are raised up
t.pickthall: That I may do right in that which I have left behind! But nay! It is but a word that he speaketh; and behind them is a barrier until the day when they are raised
t.arberry: haply I shall do righteousness in that I forsook.' Nay, it is but a word he speaks; and there; behind them, is a barrier until the day that they shall be raised up
t.hilali-khan: So that I may do good in that which I have left behind!" No! It is but a word that he speaks, and behind them is Barzakh (a barrier) until the Day when they will be resurrected
t.itani: That I may do right in what I have neglected.” By no means! It is just a word that he utters. And behind them is a barrier, until the Day they are resurrected.
t.mubarakpuri: "So that I may do good in that which I have left behind!" No! (Kalla) It is but a word that he speaks; and in front of them is Barzakh until the Day when they will be resurrected.
t.qarib: so that I may make amends for what I left undone." Never! This is but a word he is saying; for behind them there is a [dimensional) barrier until the Day when all will be resurrected
t.wahiduddin: so that I may do good works in the world I have left behind." Never! It is indeed but a meaningless word that he utters. A barrier shall stand behind such people till the Day they are raised up again
t.shakir: Haply I may do good in that which I have left. By no means! it is a (mere) word that he speaks; and before them is a barrier until the day they are raised
t.haleem: so as to make amends for the things I neglected.’ Never! This will not go beyond his words: a barrier stands behind such people until the very Day they are resurrected
t.maariful: so that I may act righteously in that (world) which I have left behind.” Never! It is simply a word he utters, and in front of such people there is a barrier till the day when they will be resurrected
t.khattab: so I may do good in what I left behind.” Never! It is only a ˹useless˺ appeal they make. And there is a barrier behind them until the Day they are resurrected
t.ghali: That possibly I will do righteousness in that which I have left (behind)." Not at all! surely it is (only) a word he says, and beyond them (i.e., all mankind) is an isthmus until the Day they are made to rise again
t.irving: so I may act honorably with anything I may have left behind"´ Indeed not! It is merely a remark he is making. Beyond them there lies a barrier till the day when they will be raised up again
t.iwq: That I might do righteousness in that which I left behind." No! It is only a word he is saying; and behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected

t_id.kemenag: agar aku berbuat amal yang saleh terhadap yang telah aku tinggalkan. Sekali-kali tidak. Sesungguhnya itu adalah perkataan yang diucapkannya saja. Dan di hadapan mereka ada dinding sampal hari mereka dibangkitkan.
t_id.sabiq: Di sana aku akan melakukan amal saleh pada kekayaan dan waktu yang telah aku tinggalkan." Tetapi, permintaannya tidak akan dikabulkan. Ucapan itu dilontarkan tanpa akan mendatangkan faedah apa-apa dan tanpa akan diterima. Kalaupun permintaannya dikabulkan, ia pasti tidak akan melaksanakannya. Walaupun begitu, ia tidak akan dapat kembali. Kematian menjadi penghalang antara orang-orang seperti itu dan apa yang diangan-angankannya sampai mereka dibangkitkan Allah kelak.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Agar aku berbuat amal yang saleh) dengan mengatakan, 'Aku bersaksi tiada Tuhan selain Allah', hal ini akan menjadi penghapus (terhadap yang telah aku tinggalkan") aku sia-siakan umurku. Maksudnya, supaya hal itu menjadi penggantinya. Maka Allah berfirman, ("Sekali-kali tidak) tidak ada kembali lagi. (Sesungguhnya itu) permohonan untuk kembali ke dunia (adalah perkataan yang diucapkannya saja) tidak ada manfaat bagi pembicaranya. (Dan di hadapan mereka) (ada dinding) penghalang yang menahan mereka untuk dapat kembali lagi ke dunia (sampai hari mereka dibangkitkan") yang tiada kembali lagi sesudahnya.
t_id.iwq: agar aku berbuat amal yang saleh terhadap yang telah aku tinggalkan. Sekali-kali tidak. Sesungguhnya itu adalah perkataan yang diucapkannya saja. Dan di hadapan mereka ada dinding sampal hari mereka dibangkitkan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لعلي أعمل صالحا» بأن أشهد أن لا إله إلا الله يكون «فيما تركت» ضيعت من عمري أي في مقابلته قال تعال: «كلا» أي لا رجوع «إنها» أي رب ارجعون «كلمة هو قائلها» ولا فائدة له فيها «ومن ورائهم» أمامهم «برزخ» حاجز يصدهم عن الرجوع «إلى يوم يبعثون» ولا رجوع بعده
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَعَلِّيٓ أَعۡمَلُ صَٰلِحٗا فِيمَا تَرَكۡتُۚ كَلَّآۚ إِنَّهَا كَلِمَةٌ هُوَ قَآئِلُهَاۖ وَمِن وَرَآئِهِم بَرۡزَخٌ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ (بَرْزَخٌ: حَاجِزٌ دُونَ الرَّجْعَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Agar aku berbuat amal yang saleh) dengan mengatakan, 'Aku bersaksi tiada Tuhan selain Allah', hal ini akan menjadi penghapus (terhadap yang telah aku tinggalkan") aku sia-siakan umurku. Maksudnya, supaya hal itu menjadi penggantinya. Maka Allah berfirman, ("Sekali-kali tidak) tidak ada kembali lagi. (Sesungguhnya itu) permohonan untuk kembali ke dunia (adalah perkataan yang diucapkannya saja) tidak ada manfaat bagi pembicaranya. (Dan di hadapan mereka) (ada dinding) penghalang yang menahan mereka untuk dapat kembali lagi ke dunia (sampai hari mereka dibangkitkan") yang tiada kembali lagi sesudahnya

ar: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِی ٱلصُّورِ فَلَاۤ أَنسَابَ بَیۡنَهُمۡ یَوۡمَئِذࣲ وَلَا یَتَسَاۤءَلُونَ
ar_simple: فإذا نفخ فی ٱلصور فلا أنساب بینهم یومئذ ولا یتساءلون

t.sahih-int: So when the Horn is blown, no relationship will there be among them that Day, nor will they ask about one another
t.asad: Then, when the trumpet [of resurrection] is blown, no ties of kinship will on that Day prevail among them, and neither will they ask about one another
t.yusuf-ali: Then when the Trumpet is blown, there will be no more relationships between them that Day, nor will one ask after another
t.pickthall: And when the trumpet is blown there will be no kinship among them that day, nor will they ask of one another
t.arberry: For when the Trumpet is blown, that day there shall be no kinship any more between them, neither will they question one another
t.hilali-khan: Then, when the Trumpet is blown, there will be no kinship among them that Day, nor will they ask of one another
t.itani: When the Horn is blown, no relations between them will exist on that Day, and they will not ask after one another.
t.mubarakpuri: Then, when the Trumpet is blown, there will be no kinship among them that Day, nor will they ask of one another.
t.qarib: So when the Horn is blown, no ties of kinship will bind them on that Day, nor will they ask about one another
t.wahiduddin: When the trumpet is blown, on that Day there will be no ties of relationship between them; neither will they ask about one another
t.shakir: So when the trumpet is blown, there shall be no ties of relationship between them on that day, nor shall they ask of each other
t.haleem: On that Day when the Trumpet is blown, the ties between them will be as nothing and they will not ask about each other
t.maariful: Thereafter, when the Sūr (the trumpet) is blown, no ties of kinship will remain between them any more, nor will they inquire about one another
t.khattab: Then, when the Trumpet will be blown, there will be no kinship between them on that Day, nor will they ˹even care to˺ ask about one another
t.ghali: Then when the Trumpet is blown, upon that Day there will be no consanguity (any more) among them, nor will they ask one another
t.irving: Once the Trumpet is blown, no ties of kinship will exist between them on that day, nor may they question one another
t.iwq: Thus when the Horn is blown, no relationship will there be among them that Day, nor will they ask about one another

t_id.kemenag: Apabila sangkakala ditiup maka tidaklah ada lagi pertalian nasab di antara mereka pada hari itu, dan tidak ada pula mereka saling bertanya.
t_id.sabiq: Maka, apabila waktu yang Kami janjikan itu telah datang, mereka Kami bangkitkan dengan memanggil mereka supaya keluar dari dalam kubur. Hal itu mirip dengan peniupan terompet (sangkakala), lalu mereka pun datang dengan terpencar-pencar. Kedekatan seseorang kepada orang lain tidak akan berarti apa-apa. Masing-masing tidak dapat meminta kepada orang lain sesuatu yang berguna untuknya. Pada hari itu, masing-masing disibukkan oleh urusannya sendiri.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apabila sangkakala ditiup) tiupan malaikat Israfil yang pertama atau yang kedua (maka tidaklah ada lagi pertalian nasab di antara mereka pada hari itu) yang dapat mereka bangga-banggakan (dan tidak pula mereka saling bertanya) tentang nasab tersebut, berbeda dengan ketika mereka hidup di dunia. Hal tersebut disebabkan kengerian yang menyibukkan diri mereka pada hari kiamat itu, yakni melihat sebagian kengerian-kengerian yang ada padanya. Pada sebagian waktu dari hari kiamat mereka sadar pula, sebagaimana yang diungkapkan oleh ayat yang lain, yaitu, "Dan sebagian dari mereka menghadap kepada sebagian yang lain berbantah-bantahan." (Q.S. Ash-Shaffat, 27).
t_id.iwq: Apabila sangkakala ditiup maka tidaklah ada lagi pertalian nasab di antara mereka pada hari itu, dan tidak ada pula mereka saling bertanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فإذا نُفخ في الصور» القرن النفخة الأولى أو الثانية «فلا أنساب بينهم يومئذ» يتفاخرون بها «ولا يتساءلون» عنها خلاف حالهم في الدنيا لما يشغلهم من عظم الأمر عن ذلك في بعض مواطن القيامة، وفي بعضها يفيقون وفي آية (فأقبل بعضهم على بعض يتساءلون)
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَلَآ أَنسَابَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ وَلَا يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apabila sangkakala ditiup) tiupan malaikat Israfil yang pertama atau yang kedua (maka tidaklah ada lagi pertalian nasab di antara mereka pada hari itu) yang dapat mereka bangga-banggakan (dan tidak pula mereka saling bertanya) tentang nasab tersebut, berbeda dengan ketika mereka hidup di dunia. Hal tersebut disebabkan kengerian yang menyibukkan diri mereka pada hari kiamat itu, yakni melihat sebagian kengerian-kengerian yang ada padanya. Pada sebagian waktu dari hari kiamat mereka sadar pula, sebagaimana yang diungkapkan oleh ayat yang lain, yaitu, "Dan sebagian dari mereka menghadap kepada sebagian yang lain berbantah-bantahan." (Q.S. Ash-Shaffat)

ar: فَمَن ثَقُلَتۡ مَوَ ٰزِینُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَـٰۤئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ
ar_simple: فمن ثقلت مو زینه فأولئك هم ٱلمفلحون

t.sahih-int: And those whose scales are heavy [with good deeds] - it is they who are the successful
t.asad: And they whose weight [of righteousness] is heavy in the balance - it is they, they who will have attained to a happy state
t.yusuf-ali: Then those whose balance (of good deeds) is heavy,- they will attain salvation
t.pickthall: Then those whose scales are heavy, they are the successful
t.arberry: Then he whose scales are heavy -- they are the prosperers
t.hilali-khan: Then, those whose scales (of good deeds) are heavy, - these, they are the successful
t.itani: Those whose scales are heavy—those are the successful.
t.mubarakpuri: Then, those whose Scales (of good deeds) are heavy, these! they are the successful.
t.qarib: And those whose balance [of good deeds) is heavy, it is they who will be successful
t.wahiduddin: then those whose scales weigh heavy with good works will be successful
t.shakir: Then as for him whose good deeds are preponderant, these are the successful
t.haleem: those whose good deeds weigh heavy will be successful
t.maariful: So, the one whose scales (of good deeds) turn out to be heavy, then such people are the successful ones
t.khattab: As for those whose scale is heavy ˹with good deeds˺, it is they who will be successful
t.ghali: So he whose scales weigh heavy, then those are they who are the prosperers
t.irving: Those whose scales are heavy will be prosperous
t.iwq: And those whose scales are heavy with good deeds - it is they who are the successful

t_id.kemenag: Barangsiapa yang berat timbangan (kebaikan)nya, maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang dapat keberuntungan.
t_id.sabiq: Oleh karena itu, amal adalah ukuran penghargaan Allah kepada manusia. Siapa yang memiliki akidah yang benar dan amal saleh yang bernilai dalam timbangan Allah, akan beruntung.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Barang siapa yang berat timbangannya) karena amal-amal kebaikan (maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang mendapat keberuntungan) yakni orang-orang yang beruntung.
t_id.iwq: Barangsiapa yang berat timbangan (kebaikan)nya, maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang dapat keberuntungan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فمن ثقلت موازينه» بالحسنات «فأولئك هم المفلحون» الفائزون
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَمَن ثَقُلَتۡ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ (ثَقُلَتْ مَوَازِينُهُ: كَثُرَتْ حَسَنَاتُهُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Barang siapa yang berat timbangannya) karena amal-amal kebaikan (maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang mendapat keberuntungan) yakni orang-orang yang beruntung

ar: وَمَنۡ خَفَّتۡ مَوَ ٰزِینُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَـٰۤئِكَ ٱلَّذِینَ خَسِرُوۤا۟ أَنفُسَهُمۡ فِی جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدُونَ
ar_simple: ومن خفت مو زینه فأولئك ٱلذین خسروا أنفسهم فی جهنم خلدون

t.sahih-int: But those whose scales are light - those are the ones who have lost their souls, [being] in Hell, abiding eternally
t.asad: whereas they whose weight is light in the balance - it is they who will have squandered their own selves, [destined] to abide in hell
t.yusuf-ali: But those whose balance is light, will be those who have lost their souls, in Hell will they abide
t.pickthall: And those whose scales are light are those who lose their souls, in hell abiding
t.arberry: and he whose scales are light -- they have lost their souls in Gehenna dwelling forever
t.hilali-khan: And those whose scales (of good deeds) are light, they are those who lose their ownselves, in Hell will they abide
t.itani: But those whose scales are light—those are they who have lost their souls; in Hell they will dwell forever.
t.mubarakpuri: And those whose Scales (of good deeds) are light, they are those who lose themselves, in Hell will they abide.
t.qarib: but those whose balance is light, those are the ones who have lost their souls and will remain in Hell forever
t.wahiduddin: But those whose scales weigh light will have ruined their souls; in Hell will they abide
t.shakir: And as for him whose good deeds are light, these are they who shall have lost their souls, abiding in hell
t.haleem: but those whose balance is light will have lost their souls for ever and will stay in Hell
t.maariful: and the one whose scales turn out to be light, then such people are the ones who harmed their own selves; in Jahannam (Hell) they are to remain for ever
t.khattab: But those whose scale is light, they will have doomed themselves, staying in Hell forever
t.ghali: And he whose scales weigh light, then those are the ones who have lost their (own) selves in Hell eternally (abiding)
t.irving: while those whose scales are light will be the ones who have lost their souls; they will remain in Hell
t.iwq: But those whose scales are light - those are the ones who have lost their souls, being in Hell, abiding eternally

t_id.kemenag: Dan barangsiapa yang ringan timbangannya, maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang merugikan dirinya sendiri, mereka kekal di dalam neraka Jahannam.
t_id.sabiq: Dan siapa yang tidak memiliki kebaikan dan perbuatan yang bernilai di sisi Allah, berarti telah merugikan diri sendiri dengan cara menjualnya kepada setan. Mereka akan disiksa di neraka dan akan hidup kekal dalam siksaan itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan barang siapa yang ringan timbangannya) karena dosa-dosanya (maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang merugikan dirinya sendiri) maka mereka (kekal di dalam neraka Jahanam).
t_id.iwq: Dan barangsiapa yang ringan timbangannya, maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang merugikan dirinya sendiri, mereka kekal di dalam neraka neraka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ومن خفت موازينه» بالسيئات «فأولئك الذين خسروا أنفسهم» فهم «في جهنم خالدون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَنۡ خَفَّتۡ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓاْ أَنفُسَهُمۡ فِي جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan barang siapa yang ringan timbangannya) karena dosa-dosanya (maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang merugikan dirinya sendiri) maka mereka (kekal di dalam neraka Jahanam)

ar: تَلۡفَحُ وُجُوهَهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ وَهُمۡ فِیهَا كَـٰلِحُونَ
ar_simple: تلفح وجوههم ٱلنار وهم فیها كلحون

t.sahih-int: The Fire will sear their faces, and they therein will have taut smiles
t.asad: the fire will scorch their faces, and they will abide therein with their lips distorted in pain
t.yusuf-ali: The Fire will burn their faces, and they will therein grin, with their lips displaced
t.pickthall: The fire burneth their faces, and they are glum therein
t.arberry: the Fire smiting their faces the while they glower there
t.hilali-khan: The Fire will burn their faces, and therein they will grin, with displaced lips (disfigured)
t.itani: The Fire lashes their faces, and therein they grimace.
t.mubarakpuri: The Fire will burn their faces, and therein they will grin, with displaced lips (disfigured).
t.qarib: The Fire will sear their faces, distorting them horribly and painfully
t.wahiduddin: The Fire will scorch their faces and they will abide therein with their faces distorted
t.shakir: The fire shall scorch their faces, and they therein shall be in severe affliction
t.haleem: the Fire will scorch their faces and their lips will be twisted in pain
t.maariful: Fire will scorch their faces, and they will be disfigured therein
t.khattab: The Fire will burn their faces, leaving them deformed
t.ghali: The Fire is searing their faces, and they are therein glumly glowering
t.irving: The fire will scorch their faces while they will glower away in it
t.iwq: The Fire will sear their faces, and they therein will have taut smiles

t_id.kemenag: Muka mereka dibakar api neraka, dan mereka di dalam neraka itu dalam keadaan cacat.
t_id.sabiq: Wajah mereka dibakar dengan api. Karena begitu buruknya nasib mereka, mereka tampak menyeramkan dan kasar.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Muka mereka dibakar api neraka) api neraka membakarnya (dan mereka di dalam neraka itu dalam keadaan cacat) bibir mereka bagian atas dan bawah mengkerut memperlihatkan gigi-gigi mereka, kemudian dikatakan kepada mereka,
t_id.iwq: Muka mereka dibakar api neraka, dan mereka di dalam neraka itu dalam keadaan cacat.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «تلفح وجوههم النار» تحرقها «وهم فيها كالحون» شمرت شفاههم العليا والسفلى عن أسنانهم، ويقال لهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: تَلۡفَحُ وُجُوهَهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ وَهُمۡ فِيهَا كَٰلِحُونَ (تَلْفَحُ: تَحْرِقُ, كَالِحُونَ: عَابِسُونَ قَلُصَتْ شِفَاهُهُمْ، وَبَرَزَتْ أَسْنَانُهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Muka mereka dibakar api neraka) api neraka membakarnya (dan mereka di dalam neraka itu dalam keadaan cacat) bibir mereka bagian atas dan bawah mengkerut memperlihatkan gigi-gigi mereka, kemudian dikatakan kepada mereka

ar: أَلَمۡ تَكُنۡ ءَایَـٰتِی تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَیۡكُمۡ فَكُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
ar_simple: ألم تكن ءایتی تتلى علیكم فكنتم بها تكذبون

t.sahih-int: [It will be said]. "Were not My verses recited to you and you used to deny them
t.asad: [And God will say:] “Were not My messages conveyed unto you, and were you [not] wont to give them the lie?”
t.yusuf-ali: Were not My Signs rehearsed to you, and ye did but treat them as falsehood
t.pickthall: (It will be said): Were not My revelations recited unto you, and then ye used to deny them
t.arberry: What, were My signs not recited to you, and you cried them lies
t.hilali-khan: Were not My Verses (this Quran) recited to you, and then you used to deny them
t.itani: “Were not My revelations recited to you, and you kept on rejecting them?”
t.mubarakpuri: "Were not My Ayat recited to you, and then you used to deny them"
t.qarib: Were not My verses recited to you and did you not reject them
t.wahiduddin: Were not My messages recited to you and did you not reject them
t.shakir: Were not My communications recited to you? But you used to reject them
t.haleem: ‘Were My messages not recited over and over to you and still you rejected them?’
t.maariful: (It will be said to such people), “Were My verses not used to be recited to you and you used to reject them?”
t.khattab: ˹It will be said,˺ “Were My revelations not recited to you, but you used to deny them?”
t.ghali: Were not My ayat (Verses, signs) recited to you, yet you used to cry them lies
t.irving: Were My signs not recited to you as you (all) were rejecting them
t.iwq: It will be said. "Were not My verses recited to you and you used to deny them

t_id.kemenag: Bukankah ayat-ayat-Ku telah dibacakan kepadamu sekalian, tetapi kamu selalu mendustakannya?
t_id.sabiq: Allah mencela mereka dengan mengatakan, "Ayat-ayat-Ku yang Aku turunkan ke bumi telah dibacakan kepada kalian, tetapi kalian mendustakannya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Bukankah ayat-ayat-Ku) dari Alquran (telah dibacakan kepada kamu sekalian) maksudnya kalian telah diperingatkan melaluinya (tetapi kalian selalu mendustakannya?)
t_id.iwq: Bukankah ayat-ayat-Ku telah dibacakan kepadamu sekalian, tetapi kamu selalu mendustakannya?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ألم تكن آياتي» من القرآن «تتلي عليكم» تُخوَّفُون بها «فكنتم بها تكذبون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَلَمۡ تَكُنۡ ءَايَٰتِي تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَكُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Bukankah ayat-ayat-Ku) dari Alquran (telah dibacakan kepada kamu sekalian) maksudnya kalian telah diperingatkan melaluinya (tetapi kalian selalu mendustakannya)

ar: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا غَلَبَتۡ عَلَیۡنَا شِقۡوَتُنَا وَكُنَّا قَوۡمࣰا ضَاۤلِّینَ
ar_simple: قالوا ربنا غلبت علینا شقوتنا وكنا قوما ضالین

t.sahih-int: They will say, "Our Lord, our wretchedness overcame us, and we were a people astray
t.asad: They will exclaim: “O our Sustainer! Our bad luck has overwhelmed us, and so we went astray
t.yusuf-ali: They will say: "our Lord! Our misfortune overwhelmed us, and we became a people astray
t.pickthall: They will say: Our Lord! Our evil fortune conquered us, and we were erring folk
t.arberry: They shall say, 'Our Lord, our adversity prevailed over us; we were an erring people
t.hilali-khan: They will say: "Our Lord! Our wretchedness overcame us, and we were (an) erring people
t.itani: They will say, “Our Lord, our wretchedness prevailed over us, and we were a people astray.
t.mubarakpuri: They will say: "Our Lord! Our wretchedness overcame us, and we were (an) erring people."
t.qarib: They will say, "Our Lord, our defiance overcame us, and we were led astray
t.wahiduddin: They will answer, "Lord, misfortune overcame us and we became an erring people
t.shakir: They shall say: O our Lord! our adversity overcame us and we were an erring people
t.haleem: They will say, ‘Lord, our waywardness overcame us and we went astray
t.maariful: They will say, “Our Lord, our wretchedness prevailed over us, and we were a people wandering astray
t.khattab: They will cry, “Our Lord! Our ill-fate took hold of us, so we became a misguided people
t.ghali: They will say, "Our Lord, our wretchedness has overcome us, and we were an erring people
t.irving: They will say: "Our Lord, our misery has overwhelmed us and we were errant folk
t.iwq: And they will say, "Our Lord, our wretchedness overcame us, and we were a people astray

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata: "Ya Tuhan kami, kami telah dikuasai oleh kejahatan kami, dan adalah kami orang-orang yang sesat.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka menjawab, dengan mengakui kesalahannya, "Ya Tuhan, kedurhakaan kami begitu banyaknya hingga mengakibatkan kesengsaraan ini. Kami, dengan perbuatan itu, telah tersesat dari jalan menuju memperoleh pahala."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Ya Rabb kami! Kami telah dikuasai oleh kejahatan kami) menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Syaqawatunaa, keduanya merupakan Mashdar dan bermakna sama, yaitu kejahatan kami (dan adalah kami orang-orang yang sesat) dari jalan petunjuk.
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata: "Ya Tuhan kami, kami telah dikuasai oleh kejahatan kami, dan adalah kami orang-orang yang sesat.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا ربنا غلبت علينا شقوتنا» وفي قراءة شقاوتنا بفتح أوله وألف وهما مصدران بمعنى «وكنا قوماً ضالين» عن الهداية
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ رَبَّنَا غَلَبَتۡ عَلَيۡنَا شِقۡوَتُنَا وَكُنَّا قَوۡمٗا ضَآلِّينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Ya Rabb kami! Kami telah dikuasai oleh kejahatan kami) menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Syaqawatunaa, keduanya merupakan Mashdar dan bermakna sama, yaitu kejahatan kami (dan adalah kami orang-orang yang sesat) dari jalan petunjuk

ar: رَبَّنَاۤ أَخۡرِجۡنَا مِنۡهَا فَإِنۡ عُدۡنَا فَإِنَّا ظَـٰلِمُونَ
ar_simple: ربنا أخرجنا منها فإن عدنا فإنا ظلمون

t.sahih-int: Our Lord, remove us from it, and if we were to return [to evil], we would indeed be wrongdoers
t.asad: O our Sustainer! Cause us to come out of this [suffering] - and then, if ever We revert [to sinning], may we truly be [deemed] evildoers!”
t.yusuf-ali: Our Lord! bring us out of this: if ever we return (to Evil), then shall we be wrong-doers indeed
t.pickthall: Our Lord! Oh, bring us forth from hence! If we return (to evil) then indeed we shall be wrong-doers
t.arberry: Our Lord, bring us forth out of it! Then, if we revert, we shall be evildoers indeed
t.hilali-khan: Our Lord! Bring us out of this; if ever we return (to evil), then indeed we shall be Zalimun: (polytheists, oppressors, unjust, and wrong-doers, etc)
t.itani: Our Lord! Bring us out of this. If we ever returned, we would truly be evil.”
