t.mubarakpuri: "Our Lord! Bring us out of this. If ever we return (to evil), then indeed we shall be wrongdoers."
t.qarib: Our Lord, get us out of here, and, if we go back to our evil ways, we would be unjust
t.wahiduddin: Lord, deliver us from Hell. Then, if we revert again, we shall definitely be wrongdoers
t.shakir: O our Lord! Take us out of it; then if we return (to evil) surely we shall be unjust
t.haleem: Lord, take us away from this and if we go back to our old ways, then we shall really be evildoers.’
t.maariful: Our Lord, get us out from here; if we do this again, then of course, we will be transgressors.”
t.khattab: Our Lord! Take us out of this ˹Fire˺. Then if we ever return ˹to denial˺, we will truly be wrongdoers.”
t.ghali: Our Lord, bring us (forth) out of it! So, in case we go back (to disbelief) then surely we will be unjust
t.irving: Our Lord, get us out of here! If we ever should return [to disobedience], then we would indeed be wrongdoers
t.iwq: Our Lord, remove us from it, and if we were to return to evil, we would indeed be wrongdoers

t_id.kemenag: Ya Tuhan kami, keluarkanlah kami daripadanya (dan kembalikanlah kami ke dunia), maka jika kami kembali (juga kepada kekafiran), sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang zalim".
t_id.sabiq: Mereka berkata lagi, "Ya Tuhan kami, keluarkanlah kami dari neraka dan kembalikan kami ke dunia. Kalau setelah itu kami kembali berbuat durhaka dan kufur, sungguh kami benar-benar menzalimi diri sendiri."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabb kami! Keluarkanlah kami daripadanya maka jika kami kembali) kepada pelanggaran lagi (maka sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang zalim").
t_id.iwq: Ya Tuhan kami, keluarkanlah kami daripadanya (dan kembalikanlah kami ke dunia), maka jika kami kembali (juga kepada kekafiran), sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang zalim".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ربنا أخرجنا منها فإن عدنا» إلى المخالفة «فإنا ظالمون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: رَبَّنَآ أَخۡرِجۡنَا مِنۡهَا فَإِنۡ عُدۡنَا فَإِنَّا ظَٰلِمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabb kami! Keluarkanlah kami daripadanya maka jika kami kembali) kepada pelanggaran lagi (maka sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang zalim)

ar: قَالَ ٱخۡسَءُوا۟ فِیهَا وَلَا تُكَلِّمُونِ
ar_simple: قال ٱخسءوا فیها ولا تكلمون

t.sahih-int: He will say, "Remain despised therein and do not speak to Me
t.asad: [But] He will say: “Away with you into this [ignominy]! And speak no more unto Me
t.yusuf-ali: He will say: "Be ye driven into it (with ignominy)! And speak ye not to Me
t.pickthall: He saith: Begone therein, and speak not unto Me
t.arberry: Slink you into it,' He shall say, 'and do not speak to Me
t.hilali-khan: He (Allah) will say: "Remain you in it with ignominy! And speak you not to Me
t.itani: He will say, “Be despised therein, and do not speak to Me.
t.mubarakpuri: He (Allah) will say: "Remain you in it with ignominy! And speak you not to Me!"
t.qarib: He will say, "Remain despised where you are and do not speak to Me
t.wahiduddin: God will say, "Stay there and do not speak to Me
t.shakir: He shall say: Go away into it and speak not to Me
t.haleem: He will say, ‘Away with you! In you go! Do not speak to Me
t.maariful: He (Allah) will say, “Stay in it, humiliated, and do not speak to Me
t.khattab: Allah will respond, “Be despised in there! Do not ˹ever˺ plead with Me ˹again˺
t.ghali: He will say, "Begone into it spurned, and do not speak to Me
t.irving: He will say: "Sink down into it, and never speak to Me
t.iwq: And he will say, "Remain despised therein and do not speak to Me

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Tinggallah dengan hina di dalamnya, dan janganlah kamu berbicara dengan Aku.
t_id.sabiq: Allah berkata kepada mereka dengan nada mencela, "Diam! Kalian sangat rendah dan terhina. Jangan ajak Aku bicara sama sekali."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman) kepada mereka melalui lisan malaikat Malik penjaga neraka, sesudah jangka waktu yang lamanya dua kali lipat umur dunia, ("Tinggallah dengan hina di dalamnya) makin menjauhlah kalian di dalam neraka dengan hina (dan janganlah kalian berbicara dengan Aku") untuk meminta supaya azab dihentikan dari diri kalian; dijawab demikian supaya mereka tidak mempunyai harapan lagi untuk dapat diangkat dari dalam neraka.
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Tinggallah dengan hina di dalamnya, dan janganlah kamu berbicara dengan Aku.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» لهم بلسان مالك بعد قدر الدنيا مرتين «أخسؤا فيها» ابعدوا في النار أذلاء «ولا تكلمون» في رفع العذاب عنكم لينقطع رجاؤهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ ٱخۡسَـُٔواْ فِيهَا وَلَا تُكَلِّمُونِ (اخْسَؤُوا: امْكُثُوا أَذِلَّاءَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman) kepada mereka melalui lisan malaikat Malik penjaga neraka, sesudah jangka waktu yang lamanya dua kali lipat umur dunia, ("Tinggallah dengan hina di dalamnya) makin menjauhlah kalian di dalam neraka dengan hina (dan janganlah kalian berbicara dengan Aku") untuk meminta supaya azab dihentikan dari diri kalian; dijawab demikian supaya mereka tidak mempunyai harapan lagi untuk dapat diangkat dari dalam neraka

ar: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فَرِیقࣱ مِّنۡ عِبَادِی یَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَاۤ ءَامَنَّا فَٱغۡفِرۡ لَنَا وَٱرۡحَمۡنَا وَأَنتَ خَیۡرُ ٱلرَّ ٰحِمِینَ
ar_simple: إنه كان فریق من عبادی یقولون ربنا ءامنا فٱغفر لنا وٱرحمنا وأنت خیر ٱلر حمین

t.sahih-int: Indeed, there was a party of My servants who said, 'Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful
t.asad: “Behold, there were among My servants such as would pray, ‘O our Sustainer! We have come to believe [in Thee]; forgive, then, our sins and bestow Thy mercy on us: for Thou art the truest bestower of mercy!’
t.yusuf-ali: A part of My servants there was, who used to pray 'our Lord! we believe; then do Thou forgive us, and have mercy upon us: For Thou art the Best of those who show mercy
t.pickthall: Lo! there was a party of My slaves who said: Our Lord! We believe, therefor forgive us and have mercy on us for Thou art Best of all who show mercy
t.arberry: There is a party of My servants who said, "Our Lord, we believe; therefore forgive us, and have mercy on us, for Thou art the best of the merciful
t.hilali-khan: Verily! There was a party of My slaves, who used to say: "Our Lord! We believe, so forgive us, and have mercy on us, for You are the Best of all who show mercy
t.itani: There was a group of My servants who would say, `Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us, and have mercy on us; You are the Best of the merciful.'
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, there was a party of My servants who used to say: "Our Lord! We believe, so forgive us and have mercy on us, for You are the Best of all who show mercy!"
t.qarib: Among My worshipers there were those who used to say, 'Our Lord, We have believed, so forgive us and have mercy on us, for You are the most Merciful
t.wahiduddin: Among My servants, there were those who said, "Lord, We believe, so forgive us and have mercy on us. You are the best one to show mercy
t.shakir: Surely there was a party of My servants who said: O our Lord! we believe, so do Thou forgive us and have mercy on us, and Thou art the best of the Merciful ones
t.haleem: Among My servants there were those who said, “Lord, We believe. Forgive us and have mercy on us: You are the most merciful of all.”
t.maariful: There was indeed a group of My servants who used to say, ‘Our Lord, we adhere to the (true) faith, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and you are the best of all the merciful.’
t.khattab: Indeed, there was a group of My servants who used to pray, ‘Our Lord! We have believed, so forgive us and have mercy on us, for You are the best of those who show mercy,’
t.ghali: Surely there was a group of My bondmen who said, "Our Lord, we believe, so forgive us and have mercy on us, and You are The Most Charitable of the merciful
t.irving: A group of My servants used to say: ´Our Lord, we believe, so forgive us and have mercy on us; You are the Best One to show mercy!´
t.iwq: Indeed, there was a party of My servants who said, 'Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya, ada segolongan dari hamba-hamba-Ku berdoa (di dunia): "Ya Tuhan kami, kami telah beriman, maka ampunilah kami dan berilah kami rahmat dan Engkau adalah Pemberi rahmat Yang Paling Baik.
t_id.sabiq: Kami tidak menzalimi kalian, tetapi kalianlah yang menzalimi diri sendiri. Sebab, ternyata, orang-orang Mukmin dan saleh di antara hamba-hamba Kami berkata di dunia, "Ya Tuhan kami, kami telah beriman, maka ampunilah dosa kami dan berilah kami kasih sayang-Mu. Engkau adalah yang terbaik di antara pemberi kasih sayang."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya ada segolongan dari hamba-hamba-Ku) mereka adalah kaum Muhajirin (berdoa, "Ya Rabb kami! Kami telah beriman, maka ampunilah kami dan berilah kami rahmat dan Engkau adalah Pemberi rahmat Yang Paling Baik").
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya, ada segolongan dari hamba-hamba-Ku berdoa (di dunia): "Ya Tuhan kami, kami telah beriman, maka ampunilah kami dan berilah kami rahmat dan Engkau adalah Pemberi rahmat Yang Paling Baik.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنه كان فريق من عبادي» هم المهاجرون «يقولون ربنا آمنا فاغفر لنا وارحما وأنت خير الراحمين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فَرِيقٞ مِّنۡ عِبَادِي يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ ءَامَنَّا فَٱغۡفِرۡ لَنَا وَٱرۡحَمۡنَا وَأَنتَ خَيۡرُ ٱلرَّـٰحِمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya ada segolongan dari hamba-hamba-Ku) mereka adalah kaum Muhajirin (berdoa, "Ya Rabb kami! Kami telah beriman, maka ampunilah kami dan berilah kami rahmat dan Engkau adalah Pemberi rahmat Yang Paling Baik)

ar: فَٱتَّخَذۡتُمُوهُمۡ سِخۡرِیًّا حَتَّىٰۤ أَنسَوۡكُمۡ ذِكۡرِی وَكُنتُم مِّنۡهُمۡ تَضۡحَكُونَ
ar_simple: فٱتخذتموهم سخریا حتى أنسوكم ذكری وكنتم منهم تضحكون

t.sahih-int: But you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them
t.asad: but you made them a target of your derision to the point where it made you forget all remembrance of Me; and you went on and on laughing at them
t.yusuf-ali: But ye treated them with ridicule, so much so that (ridicule of) them made you forget My Message while ye were laughing at them
t.pickthall: But ye chose them for a laughing-stock until they caused you to forget remembrance of Me, while ye laughed at them
t.arberry: But you took them for a laughing-stock, till they made you forget My remembrance, mocking at them
t.hilali-khan: But you took them for a laughingstock, so much so that they made you forget My Remembrance while you used to laugh at them
t.itani: But you made then a target of ridicule, until they made you forget My remembrance; and you used to laugh at them.
t.mubarakpuri: But you took them for a laughing stock, so much so that they made you forget My remembrance while you used to laugh at them!
t.qarib: But you were so preoccupied with mocking them that you forgot about Me, while you were laughing at them
t.wahiduddin: But you made a laughing stock of them to the point where it made you forget My remembrance; and you went on laughing at them
t.shakir: But you took them for a mockery until they made you forget My remembrance and you used to laugh at them
t.haleem: But you kept on laughing at them: so intent were you on laughing at them that it made you forget My warning
t.maariful: But you made fun of them, so much so that they caused you to forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them
t.khattab: but you were ˹so busy˺ making fun of them that it made you forget My remembrance. And you used to laugh at them
t.ghali: Yet, you took them to yourselves (as a target) for scoffing, till they made you forget My Remembrance, and you used to laugh at them
t.irving: You took them for a laughingstock until they made you forget to remember Me since you had been laughing so hard at them
t.iwq: But you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them

t_id.kemenag: Lalu kamu menjadikan mereka buah ejekan, sehingga (kesibukan) kamu mengejek mereka, menjadikan kamu lupa mengingat Aku, dan adalah kamu selalu mentertawakan mereka,
t_id.sabiq: Dahulu, kalian selalu mengejek mereka. Sampai-sampai, kesibukan mengejek mereka itu membuat kalian lupa mengingat-Ku dan beribadah kepada-Ku, lalu tidak mengimani dan mematuhi-Ku. Kalian menertawakan mereka dengan penuh ejekan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu kalian menjadikan mereka buah ejekan) lafal Sikhriyyan dapat pula dibaca Sukhriyyan keduanya merupakan bentuk Mashdar, maknanya adalah ejekan. Di antara mereka yang menjadi bahan ejekan orang-orang musyrik adalah sahabat Bilal, sahabat Shuhaib, sahabat Ammar, sahabat Salman (sehingga menjadikan kalian lupa mengingat Aku) kalian melupakannya disebabkan kalian sibuk dengan memperolok-olokkan mereka. Mengingat mereka sering lupa, maka sifat pelupa dinisbatkan kepada mereka (dan adalah kalian selalu menertawakan mereka).
t_id.iwq: Lalu kamu menjadikan mereka buah ejekan, sehingga (kesibukan) kamu mengejek mereka, menjadikan kamu lupa mengingat Aku, dan adalah kamu selalu mentertawakan mereka,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاتخذتموهم سُخرياً» بضم السين وكسرها مصدر بمعنى الهزء، منهم: بلال وصهيب وعمار وسلمان «حتى أنسوكم ذكري» فتركتموه لاشتغالكم بالاستهزاء بهم فهم سبب الإنساء فنسب إليهم «وكنتم منهم تضحكون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱتَّخَذۡتُمُوهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّا حَتَّىٰٓ أَنسَوۡكُمۡ ذِكۡرِي وَكُنتُم مِّنۡهُمۡ تَضۡحَكُونَ (فَاتَّخَذْتُمُوهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا: اشْتَغَلْتُمْ بِالاِسْتِهْزَاءِ بِهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lalu kalian menjadikan mereka buah ejekan) lafal Sikhriyyan dapat pula dibaca Sukhriyyan keduanya merupakan bentuk Mashdar, maknanya adalah ejekan. Di antara mereka yang menjadi bahan ejekan orang-orang musyrik adalah sahabat Bilal, sahabat Shuhaib, sahabat Ammar, sahabat Salman (sehingga menjadikan kalian lupa mengingat Aku) kalian melupakannya disebabkan kalian sibuk dengan memperolok-olokkan mereka. Mengingat mereka sering lupa, maka sifat pelupa dinisbatkan kepada mereka (dan adalah kalian selalu menertawakan mereka)

ar: إِنِّی جَزَیۡتُهُمُ ٱلۡیَوۡمَ بِمَا صَبَرُوۤا۟ أَنَّهُمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡفَاۤئِزُونَ
ar_simple: إنی جزیتهم ٱلیوم بما صبروا أنهم هم ٱلفائزون

t.sahih-int: Indeed, I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - that they are the attainers [of success]
t.asad: [But,] behold, today I have rewarded them for their patience in adversity: verily, it is they, they who have achieved a triumph!”
t.yusuf-ali: I have rewarded them this Day for their patience and constancy: they are indeed the ones that have achieved Bliss
t.pickthall: Lo! I have rewarded them this day forasmuch as they were steadfast in that they, even they, are the triumphant
t.arberry: Now today I have recompensed them for their patient endurance; they are the triumphant
t.hilali-khan: Verily! I have rewarded them this Day for their patience, they are indeed the ones that are successful
t.itani: Today, I have rewarded them for their endurance. They are the ones who are the triumphant.”
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, I have rewarded them this Day for their patience; they are indeed the ones that are successful.
t.qarib: I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - they are the successful
t.wahiduddin: I have rewarded them this Day for their steadfastness, and it is they who have triumphed
t.shakir: Surely I have rewarded them this day because they were patient, that they are the achievers
t.haleem: Today I have rewarded them for their patience: it is they who will succeed.’
t.maariful: Today I have so recompensed them for their observing patience that they are the triumphant.”
t.khattab: Today I have indeed rewarded them for their perseverance: they are certainly the triumphant.”
t.ghali: Surely today, I have recompensed them for that they (endured) patiently; (and) (i.e., because) they are the ones who are triumphant
t.irving: I have rewarded them today for how patient they have been; they are triumphant
t.iwq: Indeed, I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - that they are the attainers of success

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Aku memberi balasan kepada mereka di hari ini, karena kesabaran mereka; sesungguhnya mereka itulah orang-orang yang menang".
t_id.sabiq: Mereka, orang-orang Mukmin itu, Kami balas dengan keberuntungan, sebab mereka tabah dalam menghadapi ejekan dan kekejaman kalian.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Aku memberi balasan kepada mereka di hari ini) kenikmatan yang abadi (karena kesabaran mereka) dalam menghadapi ejekan kalian dan perlakuan yang menyakitkan dari kalian terhadap mereka (sesungguhnya mereka) bila dibaca Innahum berarti jumlah Isti'naf, artinya, sesungguhnya mereka. Jika dibaca Annahum berarti menjadi Maf'ul kedua dari lafal Jazaituhum, artinya, bahwasanya mereka (itulah orang-orang yang menang) memperoleh apa yang mereka dambakan.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Aku memberi balasan kepada mereka di hari ini, karena kesabaran mereka; sesungguhnya mereka itulah orang-orang yang menang".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إني جزيتهم اليوم» النعيم المقيم «بما صبروا» على استهزائكم بهم وأذاكم إياهم «إنهم» بكسر الهمزة «هم الفائزون» بمطلوبهم استئناف وبفتحها مفعول ثان لجزيتهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنِّي جَزَيۡتُهُمُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ بِمَا صَبَرُوٓاْ أَنَّهُمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡفَآئِزُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Aku memberi balasan kepada mereka di hari ini) kenikmatan yang abadi (karena kesabaran mereka) dalam menghadapi ejekan kalian dan perlakuan yang menyakitkan dari kalian terhadap mereka (sesungguhnya mereka) bila dibaca Innahum berarti jumlah Isti'naf, artinya, sesungguhnya mereka. Jika dibaca Annahum berarti menjadi Maf'ul kedua dari lafal Jazaituhum, artinya, bahwasanya mereka (itulah orang-orang yang menang) memperoleh apa yang mereka dambakan

ar: قَـٰلَ كَمۡ لَبِثۡتُمۡ فِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ عَدَدَ سِنِینَ
ar_simple: قل كم لبثتم فی ٱلأرض عدد سنین

t.sahih-int: [Allah] will say, "How long did you remain on earth in number of years
t.asad: [And] He will ask [the doomed]: “What number of years have you spent on earth?”
t.yusuf-ali: He will say: "What number of years did ye stay on earth
t.pickthall: He will say: How long tarried ye in the earth, counting by years
t.arberry: He shall say, 'How long have you tarried in the earth, by number of years
t.hilali-khan: He (Allah) will say: "What number of years did you stay on earth
t.itani: He will say, “How many years did you remain on earth?”
t.mubarakpuri: He will say: "What number of years did you stay on earth"
t.qarib: He said: "How many years were you on earth
t.wahiduddin: He will ask, "How many years did you stay on earth
t.shakir: He will say: How many years did you tarry in the earth
t.haleem: He will say, ‘How many years were you on earth?’
t.maariful: He (Allah) will say (to unbelievers), “How long did you stay on the earth by number of years?”
t.khattab: He will ask ˹them˺, “How many years did you remain on earth?”
t.ghali: (He Allah) will say, "How long have you lingered in the earth, by number of years
t.irving: He will say [further]: "How many years did you stay on earth
t.iwq: Allah will say, "How long did you remain on earth in number of years

t_id.kemenag: Allah bertanya: "Berapa tahunkah lamanya kamu tinggal di bumi?"
t_id.sabiq: Allah berkata kepada orang-orang kafir, "Berapa tahun kalian hidup di dunia?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berfirmanlah) Allah swt. kepada mereka melalui lisan malaikat Malik. Menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Qul, yakni katakanlah kepada mereka, ("Berapa lamakah kalian tinggal di bumi) di dunia dan di dalam kuburan kalian (yakni berapa tahunkah bilangannya?") lafal 'Adada Siniina berkedudukan menjadi Tamyiz.
t_id.iwq: Allah bertanya: "Berapa tahunkah lamanya kamu tinggal di bumi?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» تعالى لهم بلسان مالك وفي قراءة قل «كم لبثتم في الأرض» في الدنيا وفي قبوركم «عدد سنين» تمييز
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَٰلَ كَمۡ لَبِثۡتُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ عَدَدَ سِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berfirmanlah) Allah swt. kepada mereka melalui lisan malaikat Malik. Menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Qul, yakni katakanlah kepada mereka, ("Berapa lamakah kalian tinggal di bumi) di dunia dan di dalam kuburan kalian (yakni berapa tahunkah bilangannya?") lafal 'Adada Siniina berkedudukan menjadi Tamyiz

ar: قَالُوا۟ لَبِثۡنَا یَوۡمًا أَوۡ بَعۡضَ یَوۡمࣲ فَسۡءَلِ ٱلۡعَاۤدِّینَ
ar_simple: قالوا لبثنا یوما أو بعض یوم فسءل ٱلعادین

t.sahih-int: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate
t.asad: They will answer: ‘We have spent there a day, or part of a day; but ask those who [are able to] count [time] …”
t.yusuf-ali: They will say: "We stayed a day or part of a day: but ask those who keep account
t.pickthall: They will say: We tarried by a day or part of a day. Ask of those who keep count
t.arberry: They shall say, 'We have tarried a day, or part of a day; ask the numberers
t.hilali-khan: They will say: "We stayed a day or part of a day. Ask of those who keep account
t.itani: They will say, “We remained a day, or part of a day; but ask those who keep count.”
t.mubarakpuri: They will say: "We stayed a day or part of a day. Ask of those who keep account."
t.qarib: They will say, "We were there a day or part of a day; ask those who keep track of it
t.wahiduddin: They will say, "We stayed a day or part of a day. Ask those who have kept count
t.shakir: They will say: We tarried a day or part of a day, but ask those who keep account
t.haleem: and they will reply, ‘We stayed a day or a part of a day, but ask those who keep count.’
t.maariful: They will say, “We stayed for a day or for a part of a day. So, ask those (angels) who have (exact) calculation.”
t.khattab: They will reply, “We remained ˹only˺ a day or part of a day. But ask those who kept count.”
t.ghali: They will say, "We have lingered a day, or part (Literally: Some (part) of a day, so ask the numberers
t.irving: They will say: "We stayed a day or part of a day. Ask the timekeepers
t.iwq: And they will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate

t_id.kemenag: Mereka menjawab: "Kami tinggal (di bumi) sehari atau setengah hari, maka tanyakanlah kepada orang-orang yang menghitung".
t_id.sabiq: Demikian pendeknya kehidupan dunia jika dibandingkan dengan lamanya masa tinggal mereka di dalam siksaan, mereka menjawab, "Kami hidup sehari atau setengah hari. Tanyakan saja kepada orang-orang yang dapat menghitung dengan benar, karena kami sibuk menghadapi siksaan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Kami tinggal hanya sehari atau setengah hari) mereka ragu, dan menganggap pendek masa tinggal mereka disebabkan kengerian mereka melihat besarnya azab di hari itu (maka tanyakanlah kepada malaikat-malaikat yang menghitung") amal perbuatan makhluk.
t_id.iwq: Mereka menjawab: "Kami tinggal (di bumi) sehari atau setengah hari, maka tanyakanlah kepada orang-orang yang menghitung".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا لبثنا يوماً أو بعض يوم» شكّوا في ذلك واستقصروه لعظم ما هم فيه من العذاب «فاسأل العادين» أي الملائكة المحصين أعمال الخلق
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ لَبِثۡنَا يَوۡمًا أَوۡ بَعۡضَ يَوۡمٖ فَسۡـَٔلِ ٱلۡعَآدِّينَ (الْعَادِّينَ: الحُسَّابَ الَّذِينَ يَعُدُّونَ الأَيَّامَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Kami tinggal hanya sehari atau setengah hari) mereka ragu, dan menganggap pendek masa tinggal mereka disebabkan kengerian mereka melihat besarnya azab di hari itu (maka tanyakanlah kepada malaikat-malaikat yang menghitung") amal perbuatan makhluk

ar: قَـٰلَ إِن لَّبِثۡتُمۡ إِلَّا قَلِیلࣰاۖ لَّوۡ أَنَّكُمۡ كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
ar_simple: قل إن لبثتم إلا قلیلا لو أنكم كنتم تعلمون

t.sahih-int: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known
t.asad: [Whereupon] He will say: “You have spent there but a short while: had you but known [how short it was to be]
t.yusuf-ali: He will say: "Ye stayed not but a little,- if ye had only known
t.pickthall: He will say: Ye tarried but a little if ye only knew
t.arberry: He shall say, 'You have tarried but a little, did you know
t.hilali-khan: He (Allah) will say: "You stayed not but a little, if you had only known
t.itani: He will say, “You remained only for a little while, if you only knew.
t.mubarakpuri: He will say: "You stayed not but a little, if you had only known!"
t.qarib: He will say, "You stayed but a little, if only you had known
t.wahiduddin: He will say, "You only stayed for a little while, if only you knew
t.shakir: He will say: You did tarry but a little-- had you but known (it)
t.haleem: He will say, ‘You stayed but a little, if you had only known
t.maariful: He will say, “You did not stay but for a little. Would that you had understood (this at that time)
t.khattab: He will say, “You only remained for a little while, if only you knew
t.ghali: He will say, "You have decidedly lingered (nothing) except a little, if (only) you knew
t.irving: He will say: "You only lasted a little while, if you only realized it
t.iwq: And he will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Kamu tidak tinggal (di bumi) melainkan sebentar saja, kalau kamu sesungguhnya mengetahui"
t_id.sabiq: Allah berkata lagi kepada mereka, "Kalian hidup di dunia hanya sebentar saja. Kalau saja kalian mengetahui akibat kekufuran dan sikap durhaka dan bahwa kenikmatan dunia itu sangat sedikit, kalian tentu sudah beriman dan taat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berfirmanlah) Allah swt. melalui lisan malaikat Malik. Menurut qiraat yang lain lafal Qaala dibaca Qul, artinya katakanlah. ("Tiada lain) (kalian tinggal hanya sebentar saja, kalau kalian sesungguhnya mengetahui") lama masa tinggal kalian itu, sedikit sekali jika dibandingkan keabadian kalian di dalam neraka.
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Kamu tidak tinggal (di bumi) melainkan sebentar saja, kalau kamu sesungguhnya mengetahui"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» تعالى بلسان مالك وفي قراءة قل «إن» أي ما «لبثتم إلا قليلاً لو أنكم كنتم تعلمون» مقدرا لبثكم من الطول كان قليلا بالنسبة إلى لبثكم في النار
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَٰلَ إِن لَّبِثۡتُمۡ إِلَّا قَلِيلٗاۖ لَّوۡ أَنَّكُمۡ كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berfirmanlah) Allah swt. melalui lisan malaikat Malik. Menurut qiraat yang lain lafal Qaala dibaca Qul, artinya katakanlah. ("Tiada lain) (kalian tinggal hanya sebentar saja, kalau kalian sesungguhnya mengetahui") lama masa tinggal kalian itu, sedikit sekali jika dibandingkan keabadian kalian di dalam neraka

ar: أَفَحَسِبۡتُمۡ أَنَّمَا خَلَقۡنَـٰكُمۡ عَبَثࣰا وَأَنَّكُمۡ إِلَیۡنَا لَا تُرۡجَعُونَ
ar_simple: أفحسبتم أنما خلقنكم عبثا وأنكم إلینا لا ترجعون

t.sahih-int: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned
t.asad: Did you, then, think that We created you in mere idle play, and that you would not have to return to Us?”
t.yusuf-ali: Did ye then think that We had created you in jest, and that ye would not be brought back to Us (for account)
t.pickthall: Deemed ye then that We had created you for naught, and that ye would not be returned unto Us
t.arberry: What, did you think that We created you only for sport, and that you would not be returned to Us
t.hilali-khan: Did you think that We had created you in play (without any purpose), and that you would not be brought back to Us
t.itani: Did you think that We created you in vain, and that to Us you will not be returned?”
t.mubarakpuri: "Did you think that We had created you in play, and that you would not be brought back to Us"
t.qarib: Did you think, then, that We created you in vain, or that you would not be returned to Us
t.wahiduddin: Do you imagine that We created you without any purpose and that you would not be brought back to Us
t.shakir: What! did you then think that We had created you in vain and that you shall not be returned to Us
t.haleem: Did you think We had created you in vain, and that you would not be brought back to Us?’
t.maariful: So did you think that We created you for nothing, and that you will not be brought back to Us?”
t.khattab: Did you then think that We had created you without purpose, and that you would never be returned to Us?”
t.ghali: Did you then reckon that We created you only for sport and that you would not be returned to Us
t.irving: Did you reckon We have created you just for fun and that you would never be returned to Us
t.iwq: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned

t_id.kemenag: Maka apakah kamu mengira, bahwa sesungguhnya Kami menciptakan kamu secara main-main (saja), dan bahwa kamu tidak akan dikembalikan kepada Kami?
t_id.sabiq: Apakah kalian mengira bahwa Kami menciptakan kalian tanpa ada hikmahnya, lalu kalian berbuat kejahatan di muka bumi? Apakah kalian mengira bahwa kalian tidak akan dibangkitkan untuk diberi balasan? Tidak sama sekali!"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah kalian mengira, bahwa sesungguhnya Kami menciptakan kalian secara bermain-main) yakni tidak ada hikmah dan manfaatnya (dan bahwa kalian tidak akan dikembalikan kepada Kami?) kalau dibaca Laa Turja'uuna artinya, kalian tidak dikembalikan. Dan kalau dibaca Tarji'uuna artinya, kalian akan kembali. Tentu saja tidak, sebenarnya supaya kalian menjadi hamba-hamba-Ku untuk Kami perintah dan Kami larang, kemudian kalian kembali kepada Kami untuk menerima pembalasan amal perbuatan kalian. Hal ini sebagaimana yang diungkapkan oleh firman-Nya yang lain, yaitu, "Dan Aku tidak menciptakan jin dan manusia melainkan supaya mereka menyembah Aku." (Q.S. Adz-Dzariyat, 56).
t_id.iwq: Maka apakah kamu mengira, bahwa sesungguhnya Kami menciptakan kamu secara main-main (saja), dan bahwa kamu tidak akan dikembalikan kepada Kami?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أفحسبتم أنما خلقناكم عبثا» لا لحكمة «وأنكم إلينا لا ترجعون» بالبناء للفاعل وللمفعول؟ لا بل لنتعبدكم بالأمر والنهي ترجعوا إلينا ونجازي على ذلك (وما خلقت الجن والإنس إلا ليعبدون)
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَفَحَسِبۡتُمۡ أَنَّمَا خَلَقۡنَٰكُمۡ عَبَثٗا وَأَنَّكُمۡ إِلَيۡنَا لَا تُرۡجَعُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah kalian mengira, bahwa sesungguhnya Kami menciptakan kalian secara bermain-main) yakni tidak ada hikmah dan manfaatnya (dan bahwa kalian tidak akan dikembalikan kepada Kami?) kalau dibaca Laa Turja'uuna artinya, kalian tidak dikembalikan. Dan kalau dibaca Tarji'uuna artinya, kalian akan kembali. Tentu saja tidak, sebenarnya supaya kalian menjadi hamba-hamba-Ku untuk Kami perintah dan Kami larang, kemudian kalian kembali kepada Kami untuk menerima pembalasan amal perbuatan kalian. Hal ini sebagaimana yang diungkapkan oleh firman-Nya yang lain, yaitu, "Dan Aku tidak menciptakan jin dan manusia melainkan supaya mereka menyembah Aku." (Q.S. Adz-Dzariyat)

ar: فَتَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمَلِكُ ٱلۡحَقُّۖ لَاۤ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلۡعَرۡشِ ٱلۡكَرِیمِ
ar_simple: فتعلى ٱلله ٱلملك ٱلحق لا إله إلا هو رب ٱلعرش ٱلكریم

t.sahih-int: So exalted is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne
t.asad: [KNOW,] then, [that] God is sublimely exalted, the Ultimate Sovereign, the Ultimate Truth: there is no deity save Him, the Sustainer, in bountiful almightiness enthroned
t.yusuf-ali: Therefore exalted be Allah, the King, the Reality: there is no god but He, the Lord of the Throne of Honour
t.pickthall: Now Allah be Exalted, the True King! There is no Allah save Him, the Lord of the Throne of Grace
t.arberry: Then high exalted be God, the King, the True! There is no god but He? the Lord of the noble Throne
t.hilali-khan: So Exalted be Allah, the True King, La ilaha illa Huwa (none has the right to be worshipped but He), the Lord of the Supreme Throne
t.itani: So Exalted is God, the Ruler, the Real. There is no god except He, the Lord of the Noble Throne.
t.mubarakpuri: So Exalted be Allah, the True King: None has the right to be worshipped but He, the Lord of Al-`Arsh Al-Karim!
t.qarib: How sublimely exalted is God, the Ultimate Sovereign, the Ultimate Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne of His majesty
t.wahiduddin: Then, exalted be God, the true King, there is no deity except Him, the Lord of the Glorious Throne
t.shakir: So exalted be Allah, the True King; no god is there but He, the Lord of the honorable dominion
t.haleem: Exalted be God, the true King, there is no god but Him, the Lord of the Glorious Throne
t.maariful: So, High above all is Allah, the King, the True. There is no god but He, the Lord of the Noble Throne
t.khattab: Exalted is Allah, the True King! There is no god ˹worthy of worship˺ except Him, the Lord of the Honourable Throne
t.ghali: Then Supremely Exalted be Allah, The King, The Truth! There is no god except He, The Lord of the Honorable Throne
t.irving: Exalted is God, the true King! There is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne
t.iwq: Thus exalted is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne

t_id.kemenag: Maka Maha Tinggi Allah, Raja Yang Sebenarnya; tidak ada Tuhan selain Dia, Tuhan (Yang mempunyai) 'Arsy yang mulia.
t_id.sabiq: Keagungan hanyalah milik Allah Swt. Dialah Raja Pemilik segalanya. Tidak ada yang patut disembah dengan sebenarnya kecuali Dia. Dia adalah pemilik singgasana yang agung.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka Maha Tinggi Allah) dari main-main dan hal-hal lainnya yang tidak layak bagi kebesaran-Nya (Raja Yang Sebenarnya; tidak ada Tuhan selain Dia, Rabb Yang mempunyai Arasy yang mulia) yakni Al-Kursi atau singgasana bagi raja.
t_id.iwq: Maka Maha Tinggi Allah, Raja Yang Sebenarnya; tidak ada Tuhan selain Dia, Tuhan (Yang mempunyai) 'Arsy yang mulia.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فتعالى الله» عن العبث وغيره مما لا يليق به «الملك الحق لا إله إلا هو رب العرش الكريم» الكرسي: هو السرير الحسن
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَتَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمَلِكُ ٱلۡحَقُّۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلۡعَرۡشِ ٱلۡكَرِيمِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka Maha Tinggi Allah) dari main-main dan hal-hal lainnya yang tidak layak bagi kebesaran-Nya (Raja Yang Sebenarnya; tidak ada Tuhan selain Dia, Rabb Yang mempunyai Arasy yang mulia) yakni Al-Kursi atau singgasana bagi raja

ar: وَمَن یَدۡعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ لَا بُرۡهَـٰنَ لَهُۥ بِهِۦ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦۤۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا یُفۡلِحُ ٱلۡكَـٰفِرُونَ
ar_simple: ومن یدع مع ٱلله إلها ءاخر لا برهن له به فإنما حسابه عند ربه إنه لا یفلح ٱلكفرون

t.sahih-int: And whoever invokes besides Allah another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed
t.asad: Hence, he who invokes, side by side with God, any other deity [- a deity] for whose existence he has no evidence - shall but find his reckoning with his Sustainer: [and,] verily, such deniers of the truth will never attain to a happy state
t.yusuf-ali: If anyone invokes, besides Allah, Any other god, he has no authority therefor; and his reckoning will be only with his Lord! and verily the Unbelievers will fail to win through
t.pickthall: He who crieth unto any other god along with Allah hath no proof thereof. His reckoning is only with his Lord. Lo! disbelievers will not be successful
t.arberry: And whosoever calls upon another god with God, whereof he has no proof, his reckoning is with his Lord; surely the unbelievers shall not prosper
t.hilali-khan: And whoever invokes (or worships), besides Allah, any other ilah (god), of whom he has no proof, then his reckoning is only with his Lord. Surely! Al-Kafirun (the disbelievers in Allah and in the Oneness of Allah, polytheists, pagans, idolaters, etc.) will not be successful
t.itani: Whoever invokes another god besides God—he has no proof thereof—his reckoning rests with his Lord. The disbelievers will not succeed.
t.mubarakpuri: And whoever invokes besides Allah, any other god, of whom he has no proof; then his reckoning is only with his Lord. Surely, disbelievers will not be successful.
t.qarib: Whoever calls another deity besides God with no evidence for its existence, then his reckoning will be with his Lord. the unbelievers will never triumph
t.wahiduddin: He, who invokes another deity along with God, a deity of whose divinity he has no proof, will be brought to account by his Lord. Certainly, those who deny the truth shall never prosper
t.shakir: And whoever invokes with Allah another god-- he has no proof of this-- his reckoning is only with his Lord; surely the unbelievers shall not be successful
t.haleem: Whoever prays to another god alongside Him- a god for whose existence he has no evidence- will face his reckoning with his Lord. Those who reject the truth will not prosper
t.maariful: And whoever invokes another god with Allah, while he has no proof for it, his reckoning is only with his Lord. Surely, the infidels will not achieve success
t.khattab: Whoever invokes, besides Allah, another god—for which they can have no proof—they will surely find their penalty with their Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will never succeed
t.ghali: And whoever invokes another god with Allah, whereof he has no proof, then surely his reckoning will only be in the Reckoning of his Lord; surely the disbelievers will not prosper
t.irving: Anyone who appeals to any other deity along with God (Himself), has no proof for it. His reckoning rests only with his Lord. Disbelievers will not succeed
t.iwq: And whoever invokes besides Allah another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, those who disbelieve will not succeed

t_id.kemenag: Dan barangsiapa menyembah tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, padahal tidak ada suatu dalilpun baginya tentang itu, maka sesungguhnya perhitungannya di sisi Tuhannya. Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang kafir itu tiada beruntung.
t_id.sabiq: Barangsiapa menyembah tuhan lain bersama Allah tanpa memiliki dalil yang menunjukkan keberhakan tuhan itu untuk disembah, maka Allah pasti akan membalasnya atas perbuatan syiriknya itu. Orang-orang kafir sungguh tidak akan beruntung. Yang beruntung hanyalah orang-orang Mukmin.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan barang siapa menyembah tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, padahal tak ada suatu dalil pun baginya tentang itu) lafal Laa Burhaana ini menjadi sifat yang Kasyifah atau yang terbuka, akan tetapi tidak dimengerti, karena pada kenyataannya hal itu mustahil (maka sesungguhnya perhitungannya) yakni pembalasan perbuatannya itu (di sisi Rabbnya. Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang kafir itu tidak beruntung) yakni tidak berbahagia.
t_id.iwq: Dan barangsiapa menyembah tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, padahal tidak ada suatu dalilpun baginya tentang itu, maka sesungguhnya perhitungannya di sisi Tuhannya. Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang kafir itu tiada beruntung.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ومن يدع مع الله إلها آخر لا برهان له به» صفة كاشفة لا مفهوم لها «فإنما حسابه» جزاؤه «عند ربه إنه لا يفلح الكافرون» لا يسعدون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَن يَدۡعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ لَا بُرۡهَٰنَ لَهُۥ بِهِۦ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفۡلِحُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan barang siapa menyembah tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, padahal tak ada suatu dalil pun baginya tentang itu) lafal Laa Burhaana ini menjadi sifat yang Kasyifah atau yang terbuka, akan tetapi tidak dimengerti, karena pada kenyataannya hal itu mustahil (maka sesungguhnya perhitungannya) yakni pembalasan perbuatannya itu (di sisi Rabbnya. Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang kafir itu tidak beruntung) yakni tidak berbahagia

ar: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ وَٱرۡحَمۡ وَأَنتَ خَیۡرُ ٱلرَّ ٰحِمِینَ
ar_simple: وقل رب ٱغفر وٱرحم وأنت خیر ٱلر حمین

t.sahih-int: And, [O Muhammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful
t.asad: Hence, [O believer,] say: “O my Sustainer! Grant [me] forgiveness and bestow Thy mercy [upon me]: for Thou art the truest bestower of mercy!”
t.yusuf-ali: So say: "O my Lord! grant Thou forgiveness and mercy for Thou art the Best of those who show mercy
t.pickthall: And (O Muhammad) say: My Lord! Forgive and have mercy, for Thou art Best of all who show mercy
t.arberry: And say: 'My Lord, forgive and have mercy, for Thou art the best of the merciful
t.hilali-khan: And say (O Muhammad SAW): "My Lord! Forgive and have mercy, for You are the Best of those who show mercy
t.itani: And say, “My Lord, forgive and have mercy, for You are the Best of the merciful.”
t.mubarakpuri: And say: "My Lord! Forgive and have mercy, for You are the Best of those who show mercy!"
t.qarib: And, say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy; and You are the most Merciful-to-all
t.wahiduddin: Say, "Lord, forgive us and have mercy. You are the best of those who show mercy
t.shakir: And say: O my Lord! forgive and have mercy, and Thou art the best of the Merciful ones
t.haleem: Say [Prophet], ‘Lord, forgive and have mercy: You are the most merciful of all.’
t.maariful: And say (O prophet) “My Lord, grant pardon and have mercy, for you are the best of all the merciful.”
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “My Lord! Forgive and have mercy, for You are the best of those who show mercy.”
t.ghali: And say, "Lord! Forgive and have mercy, and you are The Most Charitable of the merciful
t.irving: SAY: "My Lord, forgive and show mercy! You are the Best One to show mercy
t.iwq: And, O Muhammad, say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful

t_id.kemenag: Dan katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku berilah ampun dan berilah rahmat, dan Engkau adalah Pemberi rahmat Yang Paling baik".
t_id.sabiq: Katakan, wahai Rasulullah, sambil berdoa dan pasrah kepada Tuhanmu, "Ya Tuhanku, ampunilah dosaku dan karuniakanlah aku kasih sayang-Mu, karena Engkaulah yang terbaik di antara pemberi kasih sayang. Sebab kasih sayang-Mu amat luas dan amat dekat dengan orang-orang yang berbuat baik."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan katakanlah! "Ya Rabbku! Berilah ampun dan berilah rahmat) kepada orang-orang Mukmin dalam bentuk rahmat di samping ampunan itu (dan Engkau adalah pemberi rahmat yang paling baik") artinya Pemberi rahmat yang paling utama.
t_id.iwq: Dan katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku berilah ampun dan berilah rahmat, dan Engkau adalah Pemberi rahmat Yang Paling baik".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقل رب اغفر وارحم» المؤمنين في الرحمة زيادة عن المغفرة «وأنت خير الراحمين» أفضل راحم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ وَٱرۡحَمۡ وَأَنتَ خَيۡرُ ٱلرَّـٰحِمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan katakanlah! "Ya Rabbku! Berilah ampun dan berilah rahmat) kepada orang-orang Mukmin dalam bentuk rahmat di samping ampunan itu (dan Engkau adalah pemberi rahmat yang paling baik") artinya Pemberi rahmat yang paling utama
